tried the lager beer it was pretty good,along with it ordered onion rings and Moroccan chicken with a dip . surprisingly the Moroccan chicken was good and i ordered it again .. loved it!! later i requested the waiter to call up the chef who made the Moroccan chicken!!! service was nice. food was lovely. ambiance was OK overall worth visiting again... good job guy's .. keep up the spirit :)
Excellent service, good drinks, nice food, classic music and decor. Definitely a place to go more often, if not for price.. The challenge on the house is an exciting item to try one day..

Ambience is decent, ground and first floor are non-smoking section, the second floor is a smoking zone. The nachos which i ordered was good, decent quantity. The second time when I went, they said they do not have nachos! I had to try the chicken popcorn (it tasted pretty nice).The dark beer was awesome. The pricing is on the higher considering this is a up market place. But worth trying once. The quantity of the veg items which we ordered, some sorta mushroom and cheese balls was very lessOverall:Ambience: 3/5 decent, nothing great, nice and airy on the second floorService: 3/5, the waiters do not speak the local language and expect you to speak only in english or hindiFood: 3.5 /5Cost:...read more
Beer is ultimate!!!! Love the food served here too!! Overall an awesome place to hangout and chillax!! Love the ambiance and service too!! People here are quiet friendly and make u feel comfortable

This is one place which is not extravagant but have got all the basics right. Like the feel and ambience of the place, the staff is courteous, good mock tail options etc.. The only let down is the lack of good veggie stuff. Have been there 3 times now, didn't like the veg stuff I ordered... Hope my next experience is good.
The biere club is an alright place to hangout. I have been here a few times. Beers are good. But their special one are just passé. Food is fine.
This is top of the chart breweries in bangalore. I specifically love their spiced ale. Their tandoori platter goes very well with the brew and also the nachos, which are fresh and superb.

Visited to attend the East Indian Comedy Show. Food is good, ambience is rustic and relaxed. Incidentally, people serving my orders were equally rustic and not well trained. I was not made to feel comfortable and the waiter seemed to be confusing me than suggesting things to order.
It's a nice place to chill with friends and eat some food. I have been here many times and also end up having lot of fun. Positive vibes and good crowd.

One of my favorite pubs in bangalore. Excellent food and beer. Only slightly disappointed they stopped my favorite drink - the mango beer. Also, they have managed to honor the region from each of the dishes come from. Great ambiance to catch up with friends. A paradise for a beer connoisseur

bierre club oktoberfest ROCKS!! just WOW... Went there with just 1500 bucks in our pocket... Reached by 12.30 noon... And started drinking with my buddies.... Amazing variety of beers... On par with arbor... The food.... Well the food was good and unlimited... No complaints... whatsoever... Service was real nice and as the sun was setting people were flowing and crowd was getting better and better and we were still drinking.... All in all i would say worth every freaking penny.... Ps : we headed out at around 10.30...

We planned to get to this place just after our exams got over to get drunk. We had often heard of this place as it served good brewed beer. We had checked into this place around 4. We ordered our choice of beers & we were not so happy enough when we tasted it. The food was brilliant. The music was great. The hospitality was amazing. I just hope to find a better taste of beer when I walk in next.

Beer can't be any better than what is served here. Right in the heart of Bangalore city Biere club is always high on both quality and taste. I always have a Lager, Wheat or Stout beer with Salsa dipped potatoes wedges !! A must must must visit for Beer lovers.

I love this place. My parents not so much cos we took them up on the top floor with all the smokers and where.music was loudest. Food is really good here. The beer isn't. I'll definitely get back here soon.

I finally got to visit this place, after lot of recommendations from everyone. Well it's nice, ambience is good. Services is very good and staffs are really friendly. Tried couple of beers, ale, wheat, special etc. Only the wheat one is good. Since I don't like dark beer. The food is good too. The music is okay. But if u compare with abc, toit and prost, then I feel they can improve the interiors too. Otherwise it's a good place to hang out.
Could be the best beer in Bangalore. Great food and music. Easy on pocket too. Interesting trivia - this used to be KPMG office at some point in the past.
Excellent collection of beers (both taste and variety, especially ginger ale), great ambience and setting. Must visit, as the combo of food and beer here would never disappoint. :-)

Been there on an afternoon and you know what: this place stinks, literally. Let me be clear, bad air circulation. Probably not as bad as your average watering holes of blore, but yeah. The chefs special was pork ribs with rum = not bad at all minus the stink. The fish steak whatever was cool too. Vanilla shake tasted like lassi. Plus the music was loud for a weekday afternoon.
Beer - a good selection to choose from obviously Food - awesome Music - loved it A great place to unwind with friends . A must visit if u in bangalore
Good place, amazing non veg platters. Heard from colleagues that the beer is quite good. Overall a place worth revisiting . Wide range of drinks and starters

If I have to save one place in the city, it would be this one???? My wheat beer ❤ Like their pizzas, not heavy and really fresh goes well with the beers. Food has always been good, be it the old menu or the new one. From the time it's opened, it's dedicatedly been my at least ones or sometimes four times a month place ???? Summers are never complete without mango beer????

The first ever microbrewery in Bangalore still maintains the quality of the brew . Not many other microbreweries (except arbor and biere club ) have quality brew these days. Excellent variety! Food is decent ,but don't expect too much of authentic Mediterranean cuisine. However, the service here is absolutely shambolic for a place like this! No courtesy or etiquette at all inspite of dropping by a Saturday afternoon with not much crowd

This place is just awesome food is gr8, nice music had blast tonight, I had lots of trouble to park my vehicle there -:( vested 1/2 hurs on parking only, they need to improve on service also a lot I guess...

Another famous microbrewery.. Great beers.. Belgian strong ale was my choice.. Worth evry penny.. Pizzas again.. Even pizza huts n dominos dont serve such yummy pizzas.. But d problem s d same wd al these wonderful places.. Thy al close by 12..!!

One of the best microbreweries in town.... The Beer and Service is something you could look forward to... The food could be have been a tad better to keep up with the high standards.... Should try out The Hangover Breakfast here

Went there on Thursday night for a standup Comedy show by Sapan Verma. The place is a real chilled out with cool graffiti on walls,microbrewed beer and a majestic entrance. We tried smoked cheese and sweet pepper pizza with virgin mojito and Belgian brew. The beer was alright and frankly, i have had better. So, I felt it was a lil over hyped. But do visit this place on the first Thursday of the month for a kicks-ass stand up comedy show.

One of the first micro breweries in Bangalore and I wanted to try their beers. I love the ambience of the place. The top most floor being my favourite. The beers were good when they first started but the taste tends to vary each time I visit. This happens with other micro breweries too. Personally, I feel arbour brews better beer. The food is good. I have only had starters and never tried the mains. I will visit this place again for the mains!

I really like this place. The beer was good and the food was good too. Love the old english feel that you get when you step into this place! The pizza is also heavenly! Top quality stuff. Definitely one of my top breweries in Bangalore.
Awesome ambience!! Must visit place for a weekend hangout. Thin crust pizzas are must eat in menu. It is the one of the crowded place in Lavelle road. Recommend for resevation

I was told this was the first brewery in the entire of South India. I had visited this place 7 years back and till today during my 2nd visit this place has hardly changed. However the one thing that has changed is the crowd. In my previous visit, the place was absolutely packed.... Both floors. In this one and that too on a Saturday night the place was barely 50 percent full and that to only the ground floor. The only reason i can attribute is that microbreweries popping up all over bangalore and the place is a little on the expensive side. The brews are alright. We had the Mediterranean pizza and the nachos crusted chicken. Both were strictly ok. ..

One of the best brewed beers in the whole of bangalore. Their wheat beer is one of the most awesome wheat beer I have ever had in my life. Overall a very good experience and a Saturday Night well spent!

This place is huge and i went here first on my return to bangalore after a long time. Lavelle Road is a fine place. Across the road from the Harley showroom this is the ideal beer place. Really liked the lager here and the side eats. Bacon wrapped sausages were good. Ambience is great up on the second floor with football being screened live. Great city. Great place.

One of the few best micro breweries in Bangalore n also located in a prime location in lavelle road...the spirits here have thr own flavour...the ambience is juz perfect wit the cool breeze in the balcony of 2nd floor...juz a perfect weekend hangout to relieve all the stress..

Don't understand what the hype is about ! Not deserving of the love it gets .... Pretty ordinary. For example we ordered cheesy fries and all we got was soggy french fries with tasteless stringy cheese on top. Won't come back here ! Thoroughly disappointed !
It's a really cool place location is awesome ambience is nice you should have reservations on Saturday for sure, one of the best self brewed beer places I've been to try it all

I walked into this place with my wife on a Sunday evening. Waited for someone to attend me and when no one turned, I approached a steward and said: Me: Could you please arrange a table for two of us? Steward: Sorry sir, as you can see we are full and walked away. Waited for five minutes and asked the same steward: Me: How about upstairs? Could you please check if I can get table there? Steward: With a sarcastic smile on his face, You can go upstairs and try your luck!!! Try my luck?? Seriously? Felt humiliated but approached the top floor. Plenty of empty tables and I was glad. Waited for about 10 minutes for someone to hand over the menu but no one turned up.. Called few...read more

I have been to The Biere Club thrice now. No doubt they have really good beer but it just fades away with average food and a below average service. My last visit was a total let down. They served wine and beer with a great enthusiasm but they delayed serving of the kebab platter by more than an hour even after reminding them twice. In the end, I lost my patience and had to go the reception to complain. When we finally got the food, it was cold, very average in taste. It's a good place to have a chilled beer but that'a about it.

Have been through this part of town quite often and always had this place on the to visit list. Yesterday we planned and made for this pub to gulp down beer and food. What did we order : Booze : wheat beer Grub : veg taco for the souls who do not eat non veg and fish for the rest of our buddies . They have the concept of tasting the beer before you decide to choose the poison that would suit you the best for the evening chargeable at 40 buck. A good concept as it helps you choose among the few beers served and what I chose was wheat . Less bitter than the rest , being a sweet tooth don't prefer bitter stuff. Well, now when you have boozed so much you will compare with other places and...read more

Used to beer samplers being free in Delhi and Gurgaon, the first reaction to seeing this as paid item was 'are you serious?'. However, the place grows on you once you spend some time there. Nice beer and some beer cocktails, retro music and a huge smoking area. Didn't focus much on food though.
They serve one of the best brew beer. Great taste. Love this place. If u wish to smoke than go to top floor. Amazing place. Happy to help staff.

Being the first Microbrewery in Bangalore this place lives upto the expectation. Their Belgian Witbier is probably my favorite beer in Bangalore, along with the Hefeweizen from Windmills Craftworks. Food is also quite good here. The seafood pizza is awesome.

Small place, with okish beer. Despite having a few options, nothing that stands out tall. The rooftop is much better than the ground floor. Music is average, food isn't great either. My friends had to leave most of their dishes. Not too crowded nor the music is too loud. So if u r in mood to have a conversation with background music, u may decide to come here. Rooftop is the only save grace for this place.

THE WHEAT BEER! Thats the signature beer guys. Must visit place with friends, family and clients. Its amazing how they are still doing. A great job in spite of heavy competition around. Great job guys Keep up the good work. The kebab platter and chicken popcorn cannot be missed. A must visit place.

Went with friends for dinner after finishing a reception party of our friend, I heard lot about this place but found Nothing great. Food was very normal nothing spl to mention. Service was very bad. Very Disappointed..... Food: 2/5 Ambience: 3/5 Service: 0.5/5 Value for Money: 2/5
Place is good They have the brewery but beers are not very good. Crowd is very good especially in weekends Little expensive but it's worth if u get place in top floor

A place like The Biere Club has got one thing right - it's beer. The brews here are great. We first sampled all the six beers on board and finally decided on the old ale. An amazing beer. A tad strong. As for the food - the Caesar's salad and the Mediterranean pizza were amazing. The kebab platters were not that great. Would avoid that the next time. Ambience was good. A nice place to hang out with family and friends.

I'm pretty much pleased with the place - that is the long and short of my review. The ambience is subdued and cozy, the volume of the music in the top floor isn't too loud, and the beer is exceptional, and the food does good justice to the tap brews. I only wish that parking arrangements were better.

Have been to this place twice and it didn't seem to disappoint a bit. Tried Lager and club special after trying the tasters. Not so many options for a vegetarians. Tried the Mediterranean pizza which seemed to be fine. There always is a chef's choice to go for. Superb ambience and music.Extra credits for the wonderful service. Smoking and open seating area available as well. Overall,it's all about the beer at the Biere club and the brewery certainly lives upto the expectations.

My friends and me had decided to visit this place for the Christmas Brunch. The spread was huge and tasted even better. Initially was going to try veg, but I couldn't resist non-veg seeing the menu. Thus selected non-veg. Turkey was nice and well roasted. Onion rings were exceptional. Coming to the craft beer, they were serving Golden Ale, Belgian Wit and a Christmas Ale which were decent. However, I would still prefer to go to other brew houses in Bengaluru (read A.B.C.) for the beer. Nevertheless, its worth a visit for its history of being the first craft brewery in Bengaluru.

A microbrewery that I have been to quite a few times. A pretty impressive place with a pretty impressive address. The Biere club serves you very good craft beer. The Ale's and stouts here trump most beers you would find in Bangalore. And its not just their beer, they take their food seriously too , especially the brunch items off the menu. A good mix of people , nice music and courteous service make The Biere club a sought after place. 4.1/5

It's been our regular office party place. Ambience is good, for a large group of say 20 people bill has never crossed beyond 1.25k per person.... That's promising. One can spend an entire night on beer and pizza over there. Good way to spend a weekend.

Great place in a great location. Brews are pretty good . great meat options in starters. My vegetarian friend found it tough as it was not all that great . staff are friendly and nice. Pizzas are worth trying . will visit again soon !!!!!
Place is very good with loud music and fantastic environment. Food is decent and ambience is perfect. Service guys can be bit more chilled than with those serious faces..

Well, used to be gold when it started had the best crowd in town. Somehow fells a little fallen now. Yet, some things go unchanged, if you are ever in the mood for a light, sweet beer, Biere Club's Heffenwezier is the beer to drink. Some roasted stuffed mushrooms, and chili smoked chicken will the meal devine. Parking is the biggest problem that you may face. Pretty good service.

This place is hard to be missed, located at the corner of lavelle road. To start with, the place has an excellent ambience. They have tried to depict the history of brewing beer through paintings on the wall and on coasters, place mats etc. Secondly they have an innovative beer menu, i.e. beer cocktails. This is first brewery which started serving it. Their beer cocktails and crafted beer are both amazing. Alongside, they have an excellent variety of food. Starting from appetizers to desserts, everything gets an A. The staff is attentive and courteous enough to explain the types of beer and how they taste. It's an excellent place to catch up with your friends. I'd say, one visit to this...read more

I love coming back to this place! They have the best wheat beer, tasty finger bites, lovely music and lovelier crowd. My veg lasagna was so good that a meat lover abandoned his chicken and stole from my plate (I wouldn't vouch for that poor chicken though). Try and grab a seat on the 2nd floor overlooking the road, best spot for the Blore weather.

They can't do much wrong here, beer was awesome. We started with tasting all the available beer options. The nonveg platter was to die for, it just was so so good. The lamb burgers were also nice. Overall the experience was awesome.

If you are trying to decide where to go, and haven't been here already - its a no brainer! The biere club is the safest bet for a fun evening with great drinks and food and crowd. For those that prefer conversations, stay on the ground floor :D I ordered the veg burger- it was so healthy and tasty! But everything else on the menu sounded so good too- I will need a lot more visits to figure out what's served best here!:)
Was amongst the 1st few pubs of Bangalore which gave the feel of the west.. good ambiance.. good crowed.. good beer.. good food.. still a much liked place..

Excellent beer trued both the Belgian wheat and the Stout. Ordered spicy lollypop - the one with the special in house chilli was damn hot and spicy. I had to gulp half my beer to soothe my tongue. The other lollypop with the mint chutney was sooooo good . the taste of the chutney still lingers in my mouth. Ordered the usual chicken winglets and it was also really good. Ordered a chocolate spongy cake with ice cream. It was decent. I would have wished to have a cheesecake or a panacotta in the desert menu. Choice was limited in deserts. The staff was polite and fast. The position of TVs were not impressive specially for two people tables. Will definitely go back together.
The chicken wings is a must try! The drinks are quite okay. It's a loud place. So if u want a quick drink this is the place to go to. It's quite crowded too.
Not bad ambience. Both dark and blond beers are great here. Food is delicious too. Topped burritos with chicken is exquisite and the prices are pretty decent.

The beer is crisp!! It's one of the oldest brewery of bangalore and you will love to be there with your group. Our group consists of veggies and this is an awesome place for us the food was marvelous!! If you are a veggie must go for this place as you will love mushrooms and some dish named potatoes with corn that was amazing to taste. The staff was also good but the background music was more amazing.. You will surely miss your college days at that time. There are multiple floors of the resto though we reserved for non smoking zone but that looked sofesticated so shifted to smoking zone but there wasn't that much smoke luckily. We went on Monday so it's was not fully packed. If...read more

Great Food and Beer. I am not an expert on Beer but I do have my favourites here. I am particularly fond of the Wheat Beer and Indian Pale Ale. Their breakfast menu on weekends is also great. Specially the fritatas (Fried onions, potatoes, spinach and tomatoes and of course the sausage and ham). Heavy on the pocket so multiple visits required to get a better idea of the Menu :D

I was here for an afternoon lunch, not the best time to really enjoy the place maybe. However, I absolutely loved the place. A quiet time is also a great time to be around this place. The colours they have used fo rtheir interiors, the art wall - nice. The food was great. The service too. Their bar looks quite extensive and I saw a few notices about upcoming live events which weren't only about music. I think I am going there again!

This place is located right at the crossing of Lavelle road and vittal mallya road. We went there late evening, and it was quite crowded. The ambience is good, the waiters are courteous and friendly. The cocktails were good and so was the food. The cost is on the expensive side.

Very impressive! It was the first time we had been there and the food was delicious. But it was not the food that made me love the place, it was the staff! My friend had ordered a non alcoholic cocktail which he did not like, so it was kept aside. The waiter who was serving us noticed it and came back to ask why he did not take the drink? When he told him that he did not like it much, immediately they offered us to take another drink instead of this. It was a very thoughtful gesture and would definitely keep me going there often!

Good food, tasty beer, nice pizzas and cheerful music. You'll find a lot of families here on weekends, which is a v.healthy sight. But the best part about this place in my opinion, is the service. My nonalcoholic friend ordered a Virgin Mary and didn't know what to expect. Unfortunately, he didn't happen to like it, while me and the other friend gulped down some awesome beer and a Virgin Sangria. The waiter on noticing the two of our glasses being almost empty, while my friend's was the only one full, came up to us and asked if there was a problem with the drink. We replied that it wasn't what he expected unlike the both of us who were relishing every drop of our drink. The waiter then...read more

Excellent ambience, especially the swinging couches in the open. Had shredded lamb with capsicum and onions. Freakishly spicy but heavenly taste. Will go again and have some more lamb dishes. But I did get it after two of us finished the beer tower.

We came here on a Friday date night and really enjoyed this place . The drinks were good and loved the food! We ordered a plate of the mini lamb kibbeh burgers which were yummmm followed by the V+NV mixed platter. This was way too much food for the 2 of us . Here's what we loved in the platter- assorted fries, marinated olives, chicken wings and fish. Rest were ok.
Nice ambience and gives a feeling of a proper brewery. Though there was only one waiter present to take order at times. Four cheese pizza and mixed frittata are a must have.

Bierre Club is where my tryst with craft beers started and so i'm shamelessly biased with my review. Jokes apart, it figures in my top 5 microbreweries in Bangalore and is equally famous for craft beers, cocktails, breakfast spread, tapas style pub grub, kebabs. platters and pizzas. I like almost all their brews and keep coming back here in-spite of the new micro breweries in town. Its spread across multiple floors and yet is always crowded., reservations are a must. You guys are doing a great job, Happy Brewing!

The Bier Club is situated in the posh area near UB City and definitely gets a 5/5 for its location. But, the tables on the inside are a bit disappointing. The Beer was good but not as good as other places in Bangalore. It is a good place to catch up with friends but would not be on my to-do list in Bangalore!

One of the best hang out places in bangalore. I must say the biere club has everything in it. The best part is they occasionly host some comedy shows too which is terrific and extremely relaxing. The interiors are awesome. Now being a veggie and a non drinker I had good options on my hand,while my friends invariably compared the beer with what they had in Toit in terms of taste. Their pizzas are great. However the best part of this place is the way the bill is given to us. It's smartly wrapped up in a cover stating. "Damages". A must try place for every bangalorean.

Checked into this place a few times with friends, although I do NOT drink at all but I have to say I have been intimated as well as fascinated by this place for a long time now. The location and the people along with the staff make it a must go for anyone alcoholic, you might not just want to miss this one in this city.

A must visit place Fresh beer on tap from micro brewery Do try the tasting glasses of all 5 in house beers After tasting all,settled for the Ale glass Wasn't disappointed Ordered nachos with beans too Resonance priced...good food....great atmosphere

D first brew in blore...a wonderful place to spend a weekend...loved d food n d beer...friendly and helpfull staff...the place was full wen we reached...plus the crowd is also gud here...ll Def come back...
Bad food and service. My stomach still upset with the food I had there. Credit card machine didn't work either! Even the decor is very average..
One of the good places for beer lovers. With good ambience. Good staff. And varieties of beer, cocktails and mocktails to offer for everyone.
Absolutely fantastic! Had been there for new year with my friends. Did taste all the beers but fell in love With wheat beer. Parking is an issue. Beer 5/5 Food 4.5/5 Ambience 4.5/5 Service 4/5
Yashwanth A had great fun 😊 unforgettable night..!! fa weekends it was an awsum place to bang. I will give 5 rating . The drinks wat they serve are prepared in biere club

The oldest brewers in south India,and one of the best too! The biere club, situated in the posh locality of Lavelle road, is one of the better places to hangout and drink till your livers burst. The price is reasonable. The food is good. We tasted almost all the beers and had pizza and spicy chicken starters. The pizza was really good. The double ipa beer was the best. Highly recommend for a gala Saturday evening.

Beer flavours are excellent! Tomato basil thin crust pizza, Humms with Falafel, Nachos complemented our drinks very well! Would like to try cinnamon flavours in beer hope they bring it on near future! Overall enjoyed my time there and will visit again!!
Just like another top class brewery. Food definitely good which is an added benefit. I assume one of the oldest brewery in Bangalore. Ideal place for couples.
Nice ambience... Brilliant interiors with great bear and food... Probably the best bear in town... And we cannot forget the music and crowd????

It's true, the beer is very good, but I had probably the best Margarita I've ever had. Good friendly staff, nice spacious bars and a nice "Hum" of music and chat. Haven't eaten there yet, but it looks great, nice but unfussed. The upstairs, partially open air bars are great, you can take a cigarette with your drink, without going outback, like a naughty schoolboy!Cheers, I'll be back, tonight actually!

We went here on 14th Feb. We had a reservation so no problem der. The place looks amazing. Cool graffiti on walls, nice music, own brew... So everything looks nice. We reached our table, and a spoiler... The chair looks like a school meeting hall chair. We ordered wheat beer pitcher, potato wedges, mixed veg and non veg platter, chicken kabab platter. I would say without a doubt food is awesome. The beer was heavenly. Surely, the order was delayed. But I didn't mind, given d fact the place was crowded. Veg and Non veg platter is not a good option. Other den dat rest was good.

Situated on one the most prominent area of Bangalore and very close to my office at UB City , Biere Club has always caught my imagination since its inception few years ago.One of my favorite microbreweries in that part of city , my most recent trip was to attend a Wine Appreciation event held there last week.Claimed to be the first ever Craft brewery of Bangalore , the ambiance gives you a instant good feeling once you are in the vicinity. They have recently opened the The Biere Club Chophouse that serves grills and steaks too. It also has a pub counter and pool table to compliment the environment.Their array of crafted beers,Beer shandys ,bublies and wines (rose, White & reds)...read more +8 Photo(s)
The service sucks now...the staff do not let you move between floors....if you do so they apparently mix up the bills and create a big fuss...the quality of the brews has also declined of late...

This place is very good. Recommended. Excellent beer samples, which they ofcourse brew in house (their micro breweries) and good food. I like their french fries, which comes in a tiny bucket and dips along with it. Nice touch. The pizzas are good too. A definite value for money and I bet you would only walk out with a smile on your face.
Had heard about this place from friends and finally when I dropped in wasn't disappointed. Great brews great music rustic ambience and service to match.

A showcase of brilliant ambience where you find a very fine crowd who enjoy the night with some drinks and finger food. Table reservation is recommended but inspite of us booking the table we were asked to sit on bar chairs. The service is really slow because they have a paucity of waiters. Another major let down is the variety of food and mocktails. The food doesn't taste exceptionally great but renders good quality with quantity. I had hot and spicy mary and virgin sangria to drink ; upto the mark. I had a very bland tasting spaghetti in white sauce. Fish and chips were good but the chocolate cake dessert was out of the world to end the night on a good note.
Happening place any time of the week, microbreweries are always special, you'll always find varieties and different taste. I'd like to visit again and explore their menu
Tasted the best beer of my life "wheat beer" Its too smooth to take in. However the chairs are not that comfortable, they are pretty much 90 degree n u can't relax.

Had been here today as a casual Friday visit with family... We all liked the place... Infact the ground floor absolutely kids friendly with decently loud music and sufficient space.... My two n a half year old niece enjoyed running around the painted walls... Liked this place coz very few microbreweries have a kids friendly environment, this is definitely one among them... We had the German lager beer, which was decent.... N the food tasted well too... Chicken Nachos, bites platter (2nd in the list), fettuccine pasta, morrocan spiced chicken, chicken breast cous cous salad, assorted fries....

The decor and ambience is very spirited. Quite apt for a place like this. Their beer is really good and so is the food. The platters are quite elaborate and their thin crust pizzas are a joy. The place is just awesome for a lazy day or to catch up after a busy day at work. The location is almost unbeatable. I'll go there any chance I get.

The crowd is awesome who seem to enjoy the ambience to the fullest. The beers were great specially the 'Craft Special' one, it was really special and I have never tasted any beer like that before. The food was just ok and was not that great. The music was good. One should definitely visit it for the ambience and the fine beer.

Awesome Wheat Brew. Lovely Ambience. Must have the chicken wings! You visit is incomplete without it. Only concern is the staff becomes un-empathetic near closing hours. Feels as if you're being served for free...!

Every about this place is just ok.. not very great and not very bad.. so an average place for you to spend your money.. Now to details:  We ordered the non-veg platter with beer battered fish and chicken and stuff.. It was not very good as per reviews by wife.. . Now the veg part:  I ordered french fries which was good as expected.. Ordered crispy fried cheesy garlic mushrooms... Which was better... or i should say decent.. then ordered sun dried tomato and goat cheese pizza.  It was really bad.. i mean not upto standard.. Now the beer- It was not too great.. when compared to TOIT or ABC .. IN EFFECT I WOULD NOT RECOMMEND YOU TO SPEND YOUR PRECIOUS MONEY ON A PLACE THIS AVERAGE...read more

Food was good. Should try the vegetable platter. Nice variety and awesome taste. Veg Pizza was simple and neat. Nice music and moderate crowd. Onion rings had more oil than expected. The service was not quick as expected.
Service was really bad. Our food was cold. We ordered steak n chicken breast both became very hard by the time it reached us. Never going back.
The best wheat beer in town but the other brews are just about average. The food is good and the ambience better, so not a bad way to spend a lazy Saturday night or even a Sunday noon.

Very near to the UB city, courteous staff, loads of people having a good time. Great food. I tried the Moroccon Spiced Chicken for starters which was pretty decent. Followed it up with the Grilled Chicken Pizza which had a good fresh crust and nice topping. Being a teetotaller I can't vouch for their beer but heard that their home brewn beer tastes quite good. They have their brewery tanks nicely visible just behind the bar. I also loved the wall mural which covers most of the restaurant. Nice times. +1 Photo(s)
It is one of the oldest brewery in Bangalore maintained properly at Good location, service was good,my visit was at odd hours but it was nice and painting on walls are also nice, Price was!!!!!

If you haven't been here you have certainly missed some good beer! Biere Club is one of those places where you can be at anytime in the day and still have a good time! Their beers will always surprise you; in a good way. Not everyone can handle it, I've seen. The food is awesome too. Blends in well with what you're drinking.. Definitely a winner in the microbreweries category...

Don't opt for second floor if you are not smoker. Best way to watch cricket match. The only downside is that India lost semis #worldcup. They have their own brewing and yeah variety of good options. My recommendation is wheat beer.
Best place to have beer. Their beer taste really good. Ambience is too good and staff are welcoming. It is located at the corner of ub city road.

Always been a fan of "The Hangover Breakfast". The omelettes are delicious. The chicken wings were impressive too. They play some good music most of the time. Visited the biere street recently but I'd still upvote this!

Prime Location. Prime Microbrewery. Prime Food. This place is so well placed, so well made, that when you look out from one of the top floors, the bungalows outside give you the feel of a Movie set full of Film stars' bungalows The service is brilliant, always packed and open till late, their beers are perfect ! I didn't have the chance to have their food coz we were on bar hopping spree. But I am sure I will come back soon to this place Not too expensive, fits the decor and location and is highly recommended! Do visit!
Pretty good ambience... A good place to hang out with frends... Food is good specially the starters like chicken wings.. had tried burger too but it was a bit disappointing.. Little pricy too...

Located in a very posh area of Bangalore. Spacious. Remarkably, not crowded on a Friday evening. And thankfully no loud music. Nice seasonal beer (Saison) and German Pilsner lager, average Stout and English Dark ale. Coming to food, Bacon wrapped sausage was great, cheese stuffed mushrooms were nice. Very fiery chicken skewers, not for the weak stomached folks. Overall, Service - 4/5 Beer - 4/5 Food - 3.5/5

Perfect afternoon hangout. We sat on the third floor with the tables near the window facing the beautiful Lavelle Road area. The place was bustling at 1 pm with all parties there to cheer India on in the World Cup Semis. But that dint stop the servers from looking after us with efficiency. The food was the pub grub kinds and the tasty at the same time. 1) If you are not a beer drinker and a looking for a drink to give company to the beer lover, I would suggest the Mock Biere. I was a little against ordering anything that even remotely like beer, but it was delicious! Apple, pineapple and grape juice with soda! Perfect harmony and a cool tall drink for a warm Bangalore afternoon. 2) The...read more

Biere Club, Lavelle road,Bangalore This is perhaps one the first Micro brewaries to open in Bangalore on Lavelle Road the street is also coincidently the first micro brewery I have visited as such a concept was bereft in Aamchi Mumbai at that time. Lovely ambience, great music, and amazing array /selection of brews. The whole fresco setup coupled with Bangalore's amazing evening weather make this an place for a get together during my frequent trip to IT City The music is at about the right volume for one and all to catch up. Met up with an old Alumnii Vinod Varghese here at the Biere Club. Cold winter weather very conducive and wonderful in Bangalore was present as well. Wonderful brew...read more

Love the Brew, Very authentic! Probably the best in town. The food maybe needs improvement, but the beer is superb. Not a very big fan of the ambience. The top floor is the best if you don't mind other people smoking.

Located at that corner off lavelle road, Bierre Club boasts of a great location, fine craft beer (Be it Wheat, Ale, Lager or Stout) as well as a great open second floor (much better than the ground and first floor). They give their tasters in little 'chai' glasses and the place has a nice rustic touch to it. It's got great thin-crust pizzas, absolutely yummy. It's also an apt place for a get-together, small party as they book out the entire ground floor for you. (If you got that many people coming) and offer deals of unlimited craft beer at pretty competitive prices. A pretty fine place, and from what I hear they got a great breakfast too (Though it starts only by like 11:30). Must...read more
This restaurant gets the best of Bangalore's crowd. True. But if u are a person who doesn't like homemade beer, you're at the wrong place as the restaurant doesn't sell bottled beers.

It was a sultry afternoon.I was with my best friends.The three of us ,we just wanted some place to go ,sit and relax.And then this place ,the first microbrewery of South India was suggested to us by one of my friends who also happens to be a Banglorean.Big TV screens,wall carvings,English architecture,beer machines around make you feel like you are in some place West.What else can you ask for.Superlative degrees wont suffice to express the quality and flavour of its beer .And their wood fire pizzas are just too good.Staff very humble .Must must visit.

I went to this place with a bunch of friends and it was amazing experience..the main thing is that the ambience is superb and the beer tastes very good..must try pizza..staff are courteous and service is fast...

This place is really lively during the evenings, The food is good, filling and full of flavours. The different kinds of beers are worth the try as well as the flaming tower. Hummus and Pita bread and Non veg platter is a must try. It's expensive but worth it.

Ahh one of my favourite place the best wheat beer in town great food great service great music everything's just great here be there if u haven't but don't go here if your a football fan or any sports and surprisingly because they have no hd channels at all and I really hope they do install it as soon as they can

I finally visited The Biere Club with a few friends today. The exterior is reminiscent of a quiet bar outside LA county, perhaps Anaheim. Excellent ambiance, quick service and delicious food. As for the brews, I only had the stout, and this was because I personally judge the competence of a microbrewery on the basis of its ability to brew a robust stout - and I wasn't disappointed; hands down the best stout I have ever tasted in Bangalore (watch out Murphy's and Guinness). My friends had the Pomegranate and Green Apple Martinis, they were nice too. We had the Bacon-Wrapped Sausages (one can never go wrong with those) and the Smoked Grilled Chicken Pizza, and it was wonderful. All in all...read more

The very first brew pub in Bangalore if I'm not wrong offering some wonderful starters n pizzas to go with the beer. Really fantastic crowd. The seating reminds you of your good old school days, but Biere club is a different kind of school where u learn to train your senses to get acclimatised to the buzz and the Brew.

Biere club has unfortunately become a very ordinary place and it could be one of the first craft breweries in blr to shut out.. Beer is ordinary, drinks are dilute and food is pathetic.. Ordered the fried prawns with barbecue sauce and got them with ketchup instead.. To top it all, the manager is arguing that its barbecue sauce only.. The place definitely needs an overhaul, also change that manager who doesnt know basic sauces..
They serve excellent food. They brew their own beer, try samplers before ordering one. Ambience is very good. Only bad experience I had was bad staff.

Great place for beers but not a preferable one for non - beer drinkers. Food was great and the place is seats decent number of people. Will be back if I am a beer drinker but unfortunately I am not. :-)

When I visited the Biere Club, they did not have their iconic Wheat beer. They brought me other four varieties and despite being a beer enthusiast and having developed a sound taste for different types of draught beers, I could not wash down even one of them. I finally ordered the strong beer, somehow got through it and it was indeed strong. I rate this place 3.5 for its really good food. Stuffed cheese mushrooms were decent, but its Morrocon Chicken was "exquisite". Its wood burnt pizza was brilliant and all this food somewhat compensated for its mediocre beer. If you want to visit this place, go there for its food rather than its beer.
Superb ambience,best brew,lovely people n good food. Do try the pepperoni pizza ,the lamb mini burgers n my favorite stout ;). Loved this place ,tops my list for now!:) Cheers!
Not much beer lover.. i had tasters though.. its was average for me. Cocktail was good. The BEST WAS HUMMUS AND FALAFEL. must try this.... yummy and refreshing

This is still 1 of my fav beer place despite there are more than a dozen place who brew their own. Location makes it desirable, pizza is not bad and the place is huge. Love it here on Sundays for its laidback atmosphere

Really liked the ambience of the place.. very comfortable, good seating and colours. The waiters were friendly and really nice in general. Huge variety of drinks and quite a good amount of food. I ordered a crispy chicken burger and thoroughly enjoyed it! Big, juicy burger totally worth it's price. The music was good and low initially (8 pm) but got louder and noisier over time.
Very good options for the beers...nice time to spend evenings....book your place if going on weekends.... Food is ok...but good crowd and beers....worth a visit ..

This used to be my fav place... Went this time, music was just too loud. I requested to lower it a bit, asked two helpers.. One ignored me... Pretended to serve my request. The other one politely refused saying there this was how the speakers were! Water was offered late. Food n drinks were ok. But the billing was prompt!! Lost its charm...

Really liked the non veg platter and pork pizza that we ordered.The chutneys accompanying the platter were very Indian masala based and strangely appealing personally.Was a tad bit disappointed with the service because they didn't offer water until after we had our beers .loved the graffiti on the ground floor
Amazing place. Good crowd. Love the brewery. Needs a nice smoking area. Pretty good food :) best place around UB city for the weekends. Peace.

The madness on the streets surrounding this place is nothing compared to the delicious madness you'll enjoy in every bite at Bierre Club! After reading plenty of postive reviews and seeing this place constantly circulate on Zomato, I knew that I had stop by and see what everyone was praising during my time in that part of town. It was a late Sunday morning, and it was pretty empty when we entered the place. Once inside, I was able to observe this uniquely classic styled restaurant. Graphic knickknacks outlined the walls of this place with lovely wooden floors that followed. The front of house immediately took our orders and brought us our water. The 2 of us took up the seat near the...read more

This is a very nice place. We went on a Friday evening without reservation and luckily we found a place here. The staff was extremely polite and the ambiance was quite lively. I love open air sitting, so that's another plus point. They have 4 'swing' like seatings which is perfect for a romantic evening.  Although they were occupied when we came in, we got to sit on one of them after an hour or so. As for the food, we only starters. Me being a non veg and my friend being veg we had to order both.  Every item we ordered were good to decent.  Nothing that I didn't like but at the same time, nothing that blew my mind. This goes for both veg and the non veg items. As for the drinks, we...read more

Been here on a stand up night and these guys have one of the best lager in town which goes very well with the potato wedges ,their crowd management was apt given the show circumstances ,best place to chill

I've always keep going to Biere Club.... the decor has changed and looks spacious. we were seated in the game room the space was pretty much empty at 8 to my surprise but by 9 it was full. I always love their pizzas and pasta and totally recommend to try them all. Beer is freshly brewed the flavor are amazing I ordered the shandy and was waiting for all my friends to arrive Shandy is a cocktail lager and lemonade i would call this a ladies drink was totally refreshing. Once all my friends arrived all of us settled down a bit and ordered for the biere bombs its a glass of beer of your choice with fun shots we had coffee kick which is lager with coffee stout. this was yumm so tasty...read more +2 Photo(s)

Biere Club is an awesome place for a nite out with close chums. Good beer - especially the LIIB and amazing food. Plus they often have comedy nights which are pretty fun. It's a largish place with both indoor and outdoor seating with the roof providing a pretty good ambience. Good variety of beer and I love their Wheat. The food is excellent as well particularly the prawns!

Ambiance -  4/5 The Biere Club is one of the many Club/Pub/Brewery that adorn the Lavelle Road. Built in 3 floors there is ample seating place on all the floors with a different experience on every floor. We sat on the ground floor and the decor was really nice. The Cartoon scene of a pub that ran along an entire wall is a masterpiece. My friend and I visited this Brewery on a Sunday evening, what was initially meant to be a pit-stop before we headed to the original dinner place selection, we decided to stay back because unlike other breweries this wasn't as crowded and noisy. Food & Beverages - 3/5 Here's what we ordered, A sampler Stack A Mock Biere A Stout A portion of Hummus...read more

Top Notch. Tasty food. Tasty Beer. This place simply hits every note you need. Probably the best beer around the city, and some really tasty pizza, burgers, fries and omelettes to go with it. At a minimum, you are guaranteed not to go home disappointed with anything.
Good place ,ambient...the food is good! Breakfast pizza is something which should be tried!!!! :) and beer-golden ale too!!! Service was okie..
Love their Ale, Wheat and Stout beer... !!! Starters are okayish..!! The ambience on MG Road is ok.. Whitefield is much better..!! This is a awesome place to hang out with friends..!!
Great beer and super service. I wish I could say the same for the ambience and the crowd. Maybe you'd like to cross the road and jump over to Bootlegger.

Excellent ambience with a lot of solid woodwork and that beast of a micro brewery chugging in the background. I see bit of proclivity for 90's rock which seems passe at times and takes a little away from the ambience. But that minor (possibly uniquely particular) complaint aside, this place is hard not to love. The home brews are outstanding. I especially love their wheat beer. Slightly sweet, light and gives a really smooth buzz. The food is pretty good as well. Do not miss their sausage platter and pepperoni pizza. Will most definitely visit again, as I already have.
I personally feel the service and the food is not the same as before. 'Club special' is a must try for all the beer lovers. Pizzas were average!!

Situated in the prime location Near UB city mall on Lavelle road. Have 3 floor seatings with really nice n happening ambience. We decided to sit on the top floor which happened to be open without windows. The Bar looks nice. Yes it does. Tried their crafted brews and were not much impressed. Not bad though. Chicken nachos were definitely a thing to order as munchies. Everything else is good about And be prepared for a bit rude Service ppeople Brew-3.5/5 Food-4/5 Service -1/5 Ambience -5/5 Visit again - sure to try other stuff Recommend - Yes!!

I only knew that beer exists and it is wonderful on ones taste buds but this biere club is something else. U get flavours in beers wch makes it very interesting. A nice hang out but a lil on d expensive side..
If Beer comes into your mind..Then it's the place where you get the best beer in town.Go for the Belgian Strong with Bacon Ham Sausage with Mustard Sauce.pizza are excellent too.

Hmm. When I think of biere club the first thing I can ever think of is the wheat beer. I don't know if its beer or not cause its so damn tasty. I have been here like a lot of times yet it never gets bored. The ground floor is more suitable for a business discussion over beer. But if you want to get drunk enjoy music , its always the top floor :P I recommend people to go there by late evening , cause that's when its happening :) Last but not the least do not forget to eat Mediterranean Pizza cause its too great :)

The 1st microbrewery of Banglore , still have not lost its efficiency and standards . Went on a Monday . And it was full by 8 pm. It's a 2 floor place , each with a different decor but all vibrant . Though the place is a bit crampy , with tables quite near to each other .We sat on top floor . Beer - better of the lot in Bangalore , but not upto arbor / Toit / big pitcher . Left a lot desired in terms of brew . We had their wheat / dark / seasonal . Wheat is their best . Food - though tasty and presented well , but portions are damn small for the price . We ordered an array of starters - veg siZzler/ chicken tikka / Panner chilly / bruschetta / garlic prawns / tandoori chicken / nachos...read more +2 Photo(s)

The Biere Club is one of ma favourite place to hang out. Their crafted beer is one of the best in town. It's got a very relaxed ambience and you could hang out at noon or in the evening. Assorted fries and pizza served over here is really upto the mark. The fries are crisp and it's thin crust pizza is fresh. Staff at Biere Club are friendly and their response is great. Overall it's a good place.

After reading all the great reviews about this place, me and my husband decided to visit it. Let me say that it met all my expectations. The ambience is really nice with a nice view of the lavelle road. The food was really goood. They serve fries in a cute little bucket and the pizza was yummy. They have their own brewery and the beer was great. Staff was very attentive and courteous. And there was snooker which made our time even better. They also have foosball. Overall we had a great time and I will definitely re-visit this place.
Typical pub interiors and very good variety of beers. Didn't try all of them but what Eva we had were great. Food was so so could have been better.

Plus: Location: It is at the junction of Vittal Mallya and Lavelle road, close to UB City and thts a major plus point Ambience: Basic , nothing very fancy works well. No loud music which is a welcome change frm other pubs Beer: Great choice of around 6 different beers brewed in house. I personally like the dark All Malt Beer and another brew which has an alcoholic content of 7% Service: good and friendly Minus: Food: not so much of a minus , but the food choice could have been better. They just have a non veg platter, chicken wings and chicken drumsticks Price: Beer and food dont come cheap at a place like this and at this location

I went here in a huge group and was grumpy coz we reached around closing time. Coming from Mumbai, the fact that places in Bengaluru close this early is a bummer and it reflected in my mood. And thus comes my disclaimer: I have no clue what food was ordered! I can recollect chicken wings, fries and sausages wrapped in bacon. The brews here are good but not the best I've had. When I asked them to get me a full bodied beer, they were clueless and that is sad. So I settled with a blonde wheat beer and a (tad too dark) ale. The ale was strong for my palate and the wheat beer was refreshing. So thus ends the worst review I've written in a while - I go in to a place near its closing time, get...read more

3.5/5 ambiance 4.5/5 Price- Value for Money 4/5 - food 4.5/5 Service Good place, good locality - amazing place for having fresh beers! Mojito Beer is my favorite, Think crust chicken Pizza is awesome here. Even good for vegies If you are beer lover and plus you want try some great eateries - it is the place.

At 8 pm, this place was crowded as usual. We waited for a good 15 minutes before getting a table for two in second floor. Our choices of brewed beer were wheat and seasonal. Both were worth the try. As the crowd started turning crazy, we ordered onion rings and nachos beans to go along with our sippings. I was'nt too happy with the onion rings. They had mashed the onions, battered with beer and deep fried. Came in a stand having a pole in the middle to which they were stacked to. They could've been better. Nachos for a price of 260 were very little. They could have had equal circular distribution of guac and sour cream. But, they held them as a dollops on top side to side and did not...read more

Great place to hang out with friends on any day of the week! Quirky ambience and light music make it even better to catch up with pals. The first floor has a foosball table and a pool table which provide even more options of having fun! Kudos!

user: Lord Thor Of Asgard, Nine Realms
text: You gotta visit this place for the ribs, amazing. Stay not, but order to go before the stale stench gets the better of you. No, you dont have to reinvent the wheel, aircons that work exists.

The beer and food here are decent but the prices are a bit high compared to other microbreweries. However, what really did it for me was the terrible service I recently experienced here. Early on a Friday afternoon, before it even got too crowded, service seemed to move at a snail's pace. We had to wait 20 minutes just to place our order. Everytime I tried to waive the waiter over, he seemed to not take notice (or ignore me - I'm genuinely not sure which). Later he could be seen causally chatting up his friends behind the bar while several tables went without service in the dining area. This kind of unresponsive service is simply unacceptable to me at the prices they charge here.

Chilled out. Been here a couple of times. The food is quite ok. Beers pretty good. Service on the slower side owing to huge crowds on weekends. Ambience is a relaxing if you plan to hang out with friends over beers and large tables to shout out to each other. Food 3/5, Ambience 3.5/5, Drinks 4/5, Service 3/5, VFM 3.5/5.

One of the finest microbreweries in this haven...We ordered a sampler first to decide on which one to order. I went for the stout and a wheat lager...very smooth and tasty. Non veg platter didn't turn out that great on a whole, wood fried pizza was awesome. This place gets mad by 11 with loud music and people dancing crazy at times on tables.

I wouldn't probably go back here because they would only serve brewed beer, so if your expecting any bottled beers don't be here. Otherwise the ambience and seating perfect! Any day worth a visit, got good crowd.

A perfect place for a evening hangout. Located near UB city mall on lavelle road. They have a good range of craft beer's and decent starters to go along with it. The ambience is pretty good with nice music. Not to heavy on pocket can be a good option to visit for a drink. Will rate 4.0/5.0.

Very poor experience, food was aweful, staff behaviour sucked to the core... Very slow service... One of my friend had ordered well done steak and she got rare steak ... The chicken was also undercooked...they didn't even provide us knife fork tissue papers... Behavior of staff was such as if they are doing us some charity... Highly overrated place... Not recommended... Might have had been first microbrewery of south India but now it has lost it touch...don't go here...

located in the most happening area of bangalore, this place doesn't live up to the expectations. Sober interiors and sober crowd adds to your disappointment. The only good thing about this place is their food. do not go by the name and expect varieties of brewed beer, they only serve one flavour, which will not even live up to your expectation.

The Biere Club is my first brewery in Bangalore. Loved the ambience. I had gone there twice with friends and both times had a great evening. Its a conversation haven. The food here is good as well. The place will kick you in your pocket but the beer is worth the #kangaali ;) Good place for a college group. Go for the Stout! #gulpinall

Great ambience.... Equally good food n beer.... Ideal place to go on a weekend afternoon and enjoy the bangalore scenic beauty... Service is the only aspect which really needs improvement..!! Pratik Rai

I like the place but I hate the crowd. Prices are not reasonable. Service is just about ok. Food is great, booze is great - their saving grace! Do not however, go to their sister concern Biere Street. They are not half as good as the main branch.
The first time I was here, I fell in love with the club. The beer tasted a lot different than the ones we drank from bottles. The food is good too. The place is good for friends to hang out.
Great ambience , good food and with good company, its the best place to chill out. Make sure to get there quick or reserve a seat for yourself.

i quite enjoyed the beer here.. i forgot how surpisingly reasonable this Lavelle Road brewery is. i was in a burger mood and unfortunately the bread wasn't in stock. if it was i'm sure i would have rated it even higher. but no worries, the tenderloin steak was great! i'd give it an 8 on 10. Medium rare was very well done (pun intended). in other words, it was done just right. It did not fill me up though, which is surprising for a fairly solid steak. Maybe i was just extra hungry that afternoon. So i went on to order a whole other pizza and proceeded to polish off more than half by myself.. Good pizza, but not mindblowing! It was the Ham, Salami and Chorizo. The sticky toffee and date...read more

I'm a regular here and love the convenient location. Keeps me going back despite the average beer. Above average food. Good for a quickie or a boys night out. Have had some pretty poor service experiences, though.

If I have to review this place will say a must visit for microbreweries , they claim that the first breweries in South . But seriously I like their beer and the food also really tastes great . Nice located at Lavelle Road , hard to find table during weekend. But over all good place would recommend to visit anytime if you are in a mood to have fresh brewery.

Great Beer ! Good Food !What can be better it the interiors and one small thing that troubled me a little when i last visited was a rat which i happened to see inside. Can be improved on. Again no question on the awesomeness of the Beer !!

My most favourite micro-brewery in a city where you find one in every corner. The beers are really good. The servers are not haughty as in many other places but are rather friendly and make customers feel comfortable..
Was having a great time here till we had a flying Roach. Will be really nice if this place gets a pest control. What's worse the guests you were hosting were absolutely grossed out. Obviously.

This is a good place for catching up with friends. The place is spacious and cheerful with good food options. I was however, disappointed with their full English breakfast which served highly processed chicken sausages instead of pork and burnt toast. Their beers are good and I enjoyed their summer ale.
Best in town ! Every time I am in Banglore this is the first place I head to ! To be honest there are quite a few brewery places but this by far is the best I've had !

Nice strout beer .. Black beer is nice brewed well the bitterness is awesome .. My friend had a mango beer ..!! Was ok but was taken by surprise .. The snacks are nice but a little heavy in the pocket.. It's a steep place so .. Watch what u order
One of the first breweries in Bangalore. Pretty good food and the at beer! Could do with dimmer lighting as far as ambience is concerned . Always a visit!

One thing you must have is the " wheat beer" at bier club. One of my favorite jaunts in bangalore, bier club never ceases to amaze me. Crowd ranges from the prim and proper dressed business men to the flip flop wearing college dude, seemingly coming together in a group of beer loving public. Has 2 sections which makes a lot of sense for smokers. Food is typical pub grub, hence tasty and not for the calorie conscious .5 stars if they can add more variety to flavoured beers.

Bierre clubbb !!! Visited here last sun . We had a good seat where we could view the entire ambience of the pub . The ambience is fantastic with excellent wall art . One of the best places for craft beers in Bangalore.Ambience reminds me of crowded market place. My ratings DRINKS 4* FOOD 4* SERVICE 4* AMBIENCE 5*

I had a bad service experience ... We reserved a table for 8:30 but it started raining and everyone knows how bad traffic gets so we informed them we'll be late. After getting a cab with a lot of difficulty and walking in dirty water we get there and everyone (3 people) is showing us the watch ... Absolute mood spoiler ... Seriously !!! Now that we've got that out of the way ... The beer is good ... I tried wheat beer and my friends tried ale ... We liked both ... Service in terms of time taken to serve the order was fine ... Awesome place with the best beer I've tasted..very retro music takes U back into your teens..lively environment and good service.Definitely a must go.

Good food and a good collection of beer. Typical bangalorean pub feel to the outlet. Intimate lighting and decent music that plays all day long. Love the wheat beer. Tried a mago beer which wasnt quite for my liking even though I am crazy about mangoes. Do try the non veg platter if assorted is your thing. Can visit.

This place is close to UB city and I've passed it by many times, so last Sunday, I thought of giving it a try. We had made reservations for the non smoking zone, which is the first floor but when we got there, we changed our mind and proceeded to the first floor which is the smoking zone and were luckily able to get a table. I must say, this place is classy and it shows in every aspect, starting from the receptionist, the waiters to the decor. The first floor is like a covered roof top and has a nice pool table at the center. They also have a foosball table by the bar. The waiters were very courteous as they brought us the menu, which I must say is a bit limited. We ordered cheese...read more

The freshly brewed beer especially wheat beer is amazing. The food is good too.. With The quality of beer the prices are reasonable. The place has awesome environment and the music that they place is good.. You can dance too.. Rooftop is amazing..

The Biere Club is located on one of the finest areas in Bangalore, right next to the famous UB City. Adding to my tour of microbreweries in the city, the Biere Club definitely ranks among the best. Tad bit on the expensive side, it is recommended to ensure a table reservation is advance, especially over the weekend. The music is amazing, they have a fussball table and snooker table, and has some fine crowd turning up here. The beer is definitely delicious, try the Mango Beer since it's the seasonal favourite. :)

Nothing special about the place. The service is beyond pathetic.. Drinks are very random. Food not great. Neither the ambience is very good. A total let down. Ha expected this to be a nice place!! The waiter especially was disgusting. He kept on telling 5 minutes thrice when we said please take the order. Placing the order is such a task.. Forget about when u gonna get it. I felt like i will get my order only the next day.. This place needs to work on the service or should shut down!

This centrally located pub is great on a night of pub hopping. It has everything and more a good pub should have. Great food, great music, great ambiance, etc. Their suggested dishes Meatballs Tossed In Hot Tomato Salsa, The Biere Club Plank Pizza's From the Wood Fried Oven are really great and a must try. Will visit again soon. It is on the more expensive side but i must say that most people would find it worth it itself. It gives good competition to all its nearby competitors. It is one of my favourite places to hang out.

A crazy friday night of pub hopping started with Biere Club with the usual gang. I have always liked the place, nice ambience, space is just about right, neither sprawling nor congested. Ground floor size just about seems comfortable, good music yet you can talk. We couldn't get any table, so stood at the counter, which is alright with me, I like watching bartenders work their magic & chatting them up is always a pleasure. Tried the Mango beer sampler, which isn't bad at all, just didn't feel like spoiling my mango taste buds, summer is still on, so! I continued with the wheat beer. We ended up cutting short our visit to hop onto the next door neighbour, but the short period of time...read more
The ambience and the set up is nice. Their brewed beer is good. The food was disappointing for us. The music and beer sets the mood but the food disappoints. The staffs are friendly.

Located so central that you access all walking around it. Including the UB City. What a choice of beer that too fresh. Amazing food choice. well done ambiance. Music to compliment it over all. The good Bangalore crowd of course adds to the charm of the lively place. Priced quiet reasonable.

Lavelle Road has so much to offer... The corner spot is taken by The Biere Club... It has an excellent open seating which combined with the amazing Bangalore weather makes for a great evening... The ambiance inside is set well and music compliments it well... It is crowded even on weekdays and i am sure; they have regulars coming in too... The food was a disappointment for me and so was the service... The Hummas platter was still decent but the pizza samosas were bad tasting and even thought i left the same the waiter did not bother inquiring... a request to change my seating was also declining sighting reasons which din feel serious enough to me... This as the name suggests is the place to go to for some decent brewed beer. They have 5/6 types of beers and also seasonal mixes that they do which keep changing. Food is ok. Go here for a good evening with friends and ofcourse beer 🍻!!

Situation just a few metres away from UB City. One the first breweries in Bangalore. They have a variety of brews and the give you tasters in shot glasses for you to choose your option. The food is also good and their finger foods are a good option for the brews. They have shows and acts as well nowadays (stand-up comedies etc) which is awesome. On the whole not a bad experience.

The ambiance is awesome the music was nice they have a courtyard with an open sky witch just add to the whole ambiance to a different level and the staff is courteous the brewery is good and the food is great...

In Short: fantastic location. Buzzing crowd. Good beer and good variety of food in the menu. Courteous waiters helps in choosing the food and drink you would like to have. But I guess my hard luck with good steak continues. I asked for a medium done and got a well done meat. Though the server apologised but my feeling of love at first sight was over by then. Saying that I will like to visit them once again for the beautifully crafted Ale and Lager.

Favorite place in Bangalore... Perfect ambience for a Friday evening drink... Amazing beer.... Superb food !! Be it the starters, main course, desserts, the fries or the chicken... The crowd is neat and they host events like stand up comedy shows and all... Open air seating that's a smoking zone with couple of board games The service is nice too... Quick and clean Sit on the bar counter or just on the normal seats... The music is just right If you make it in time there is not going to be a waiting too Just the best beer place in the city !!!

Visited this place on Thursday afternoon! Hubby and I have actually decided to visit brew pubs.therefore with the help of zomato ventured here. We ordered club special and mango flavoured beer both were good. In fact it was decent. And the chicken nachos was like a treasure hunt for chicken. Main course was chicken burger and pork vindaloo with rice. The burger was tasty and decent sized. But the vindaloo and rice was extremely poor quantity. In fact the...read more +1 Photo(s)

It's always the experiences and memories you create at a place that makes it special. It was the second time in biere club and it was as awesome as the first time. The awesome beer try the seasonal mango biere, if its available) amazing food, excellent staff, and the wonderful ambience. Absolutely delightful. :) :)

I went there with friends on a Sunday for lunch, and the place wasn't as crowded as the other places nearby. The ambience was good, but could have been better if the music was not so loud. The pizzas were good and The salads were amazing. Service could have been a little faster. Definitely a place I would suggest to my friends.

Good beer & decent food. But did not find the place great. Definitely not worth the hype. Definitely found toit better. Best thing about the place is the cost of beer. Much better than other breweries considering the quantity.
Good menu.Food was great,spicy ! Pizzas are good.But the ambiance need to be improved-music tracks could have been selected with more care.Alcohol was great but service tax really Is a bumber.

This one is huge, spread across three levels. The ambience is great. The in-house brewed drinks taste good too. The food they serve falls a little short of awesome. Overall, a nice place to hang out. Music was not that great though.

Food: 4.5 Drinks: 4.0 Service: 2.5 Had to wait 20 mins before anyone came to ask for order on a weekday (not even crowdy). And even he left mid way to handle something. They need to hire more waiting staff.

The ambience and the interiors of the place just set the tone for a beautiful evening! The staff are very Courteous and would rate a 4/5!! A must try here would their wheat beer and the non veg platter! Good food and good music collection and neither do they play it that loud that you would have to shout at the top of your voice to have a decent conversation.

I live in Indiranagar and there r so mny places to visit there that I never go out of my area. This time i decided to step out n im glad i did. This place is just awesme. Perfect beer, yummy food n everything perfect. On a tuesday nite it was buzzing with so much energy and full of life.... We ordered mezze platter n it jst blew us away. It was so tasty much more than i can describe!!! Their brewery is so fine thatthe beer was fabulous Overall a must visit for everybody...
Good food. Was the only place which also allowed stags. Music was also okay. Food was good. Drinks were also good. It's on the expensive side.

This is the first microbrewery in Bangalore and still holding the flag of being pioneer. Actually I dont have much things to say about this place as already it is so famous. Location Location & Location is the huge plus point. 3 Floor Brewery has a very cosmopolitan crowd always. Beer and Food is worth my rating. Weekends dont expect to get table if not booked in advance. Cheers!!

A three storey restaurant, this place has a very good ambiance. There is a pool table and a foosball table. Beer tasted good. The staff are ever smiling. The food wasn't satisfactory though. Overall, a good experience.

Best beer in bangalore along with really good pizzas... Have been here a couple of times and have not been disappointed.. Beer lovers a must visit.... The atmosphere is amazing during any important games when people can chill with friends...

This is one place I have visited time and again. Love the location and ambience of this place. The variety of brews available is good enough to keep you engaged in a long conversation you are having with the people you are with. Weekend nights are usually a packed house with an acceptable waiting time. The choice of music is a big contributor in making the experience enjoyable. The place feels lively for a weekend night or for that matter any other night with a decent struggle involved in getting the food order across your table. As per myself, a must visit place with a group of people.

4,well this 4/5 is given by me for the food and beer.I really love this place the beer is just too good(stout). The wrapped sausages were really juicy and well done. Chicken wings were also good nothing wow about it. The grilled chicken nachos were just at par. The pizza was a complete disappointment.
