Watta drink I had!!! Apple juice with pineapple froth. Very distinctive taste. We repeated our pita bread and hummus. My friends enjoyed their beer and I hogged on mini burgers. Will surely repeat that hummus and pita bread!!

Perfectly named.... its a club.. sit on the top floor.. dnt miss out LIT. It hits u...it hits u hard.. fantastic ambiance...wonderful food..u can yell, dance, talk, date, sit alone.... no1s gonna bother u...its u and ur evening...pizzas are a must try..
Located at ub city. Good ambiance, food, loud music and of course brewed beer. It's good place to hangout with friends and enjoy the drink.

Went to the Biere club on a Monday evening and the place was almost full. Thumbs up on the ambience. It's my habit to always order a sampler whenever I visit a microbrewery as it really provides an overall view of the place's expertise on brewing. This place stood out as it provided option of light ale which tasted better than lager (I have never experienced this earlier). Stout was the game changer as the taste was really good and the bitterness was just right. Food options were good and we ordered Moroccan chicken, chettinad prawns and mutton pepper. All were delicious. Recommended for foodies and beer lovers.

Another Brew Pub with good varieties of beer and great dishes. The non-veg platters were great. The cost is higher than other pubs of similar level. One important negative point being, we have been offered sample on all types of beers in the pub and finally those have included in the bill i.e., we have been charged Rs.240+taxes additionally. The point to be noted is, we neither asked for the sample beers nor they mentioned that is chargeable.

Biere club is one of my favourite place in banglore. Pub with brewery. Their beers are must try. Food is just delicious. Friendly staff. Ambience is calm cozy. Highly recommend and one of the best place in banglore for brewery's. Taste 5/5 Ambience 5/5 Service 5/5

Brilliant ambiance, brilliant music, brilliant service and more brilliant beers! Each and every beer is better than the other! You are a party animal, then surely it's your place! You want to have 2 or 3 drinks with your loved ones, then also it's your place! Sheer brilliance in every nook and corner of this place! :-)
Good place to visit for hangout with friends ....nice place for couple too ...................................................................
Super place to have beer. The beer chart us very impressive. Food is also good. The standup comedy shows organized is outstanding. A great place to be on the weekend.
Absolutely love this place! The beer they brew is one of the best in Bangalore according to me. The pizzas here are also extremely good and make an ideal combination with the beer.
This place is the reason for love for brewed beer, every beer they serve is good. Nice ambiance, good service and food is quite good as well.

After having been to Biere Club over 30 times in three years, I can only do a really short review that distills it down to the essential bits. The beer is decent, not the top 3 in the city, but not the bottom of the barrel either. Some of their specials (IPA, seasonal mango, etc.) are quite good and the Hefe/wheat is always a safe bet. The Biere Club menu isn't very exhaustive and does some really nice small plates and pizzas as its forte. It has recently been given a slight makeover though not a very radical one. If you were going there for the first time, these are my favorite hits: - assorted fries: wedges, curlies, double fried, etc., very good for snacking on endlessly - mini...read more

Nice beer and good service. The place is huge with a different floor for smoking section. We went there on a Friday night, it was packed completely. Finally we got high chairs. Beer is excellent as they make it of their own. They have very different shots of their own mixing certain drinks. So you got to try those. The food is also amazing. We ordered for a platter and they decorated it nicely before serving. Talking about ambience, they have some crazy wall paintings which adds to the dine experience. The place is just walking distance from mg road and also from UB city. In all, worth a visit. Do make a reservation before you visit. Ambience - 4/5 Food - 4.5/5

This place is one of the best beer makers in the town. I went here for an office party a long time ago, and I still remember the crispy, refreshing taste of the seasonal varieties that this place presents. The food to complement the alcohol is good, too. I don't recall any specific variety except the pasta, which was rich and creamy, just right to sort of soothe your beery appetite! Beer lovers, this is another getaway that should be on your Bengaluru bucket-list.

great location,great ambience and great beer and food.its a bit heavy on the pocket but u must try visiting once!! they've a crazy variety of brewed beers!!n yeah!!dont miss the yummy chicken nachos !

We went there for dinner and drinks from office . Two floors nothing great standard brewery . The fish Ajwain tikka is a must try and the fries are good. Food : fish tikka and fries were good hummus assortment was pretty bad 😕 Drinks: though the promotion for JD was on but after first round of order they said its over pretty lame we had to manage with Jim. They had interesting mango beer not sure how it's made but few from our group had it. Service: not bad Ambience: manageable Parking : valet I think the only thing going for this place is the pool table and location. An average place .

I quite liked the place with the lovely decor on the wall. It kind of bought in an old world charm. We ordered the pepperoni pizza and the ham and pineapple pizza. While I was skeptical about having pineapple on the pizza, it turned out to be quite good. The beer was good as well.For desserts we ordered a cheesecake, but the waiter came after half an hour and told us that they did not have it. We then decided to go for the warm chocolate stodge cake and ice cream.While it tasted more like a brownie, I really couldn't complain, as it was delicious. :)

Biere club stole my heart away as soon as i saw the pool table at first floor. Since this is 2nd visit to biere club, but it was a completely different experience this time. Enter and you see a all the happy faces all around. Beer is the best which i had in town. And the best part they serve it in pitcher as well. Just go out, drink and eat . Enjoy the blessed company of your friends. Happy beerinking !!!!

This weekend we visited the Biere Club.  As usual the place had some very nice crafted beers along with some seasonal varieties. Nice finger foods. We tried some  crafted beers like, wheat, lager and mango beer. Lager was very nice. Didn't like the mango beer much. I tried their Shandy called Stout Cole and that was amazing. Please do try it, if you're not a very big fan of the bitter taste of the beer. Most of their food options were not available as it was quite late. But we tried some appetizers which were quite good. Special mention for the Rava Fried Fish. The beef skewers were average. Main course was a disappointment. We tried Beef with nachos, not much beef to eat their, only...read more
Fresh brew the place to have... Food is okay nice ambience and value for money for what you drink. One place to visit if you love only beer

One of the best micro breweries in Bangalore. Prime location . Great ambience .. Brilliant food. They have happy hours on Mondays and Tuesdays which is superb. My personal favourite : Kebab platter / Pizza's and the Lager brew. Meal and few rounds of beer for 2 is a 2K+ damage.

I am not verrrryyyyy happy with this place because their biggest turn off is their beer. I didn't like it at all. they have around 6 options but i found them to be very sour.. Ambience wise food wise and location wise its a super place.. Also their service was a bit slow that too on a saturday.. but as a package its a pretty good place.. Please try their nachos and the non-veg platter..

Wow !! Wow for the ambience, wow for the locale , wow for the service/crowd/beer. If you are a beer lover and in the central business district of Bengaluru , searching to have really good in house brewed beer then head right here. Cheers !!!

Went here for lunch on my bestfriend's birthday. I must say that the service, staff and the food were equally great. This place has a very cozy and a comfortable ambience with good music. The highlight of our lunch was the chicken nachos with the perfect blend of cheese and not to forget the chicken wings. You won't be disappointed with the food :)
Awesome place. Must go. Happening one. Smoking not allowed in da ground floor area. Both the upper floors u can smoke.. normal pricing. Must try da brews...

Only writing this review to thank the amazing staff at the Biere Club. The floor manager was super accomodating and made sure to give us a table and customized our orders too without blinking an eye! Oh yes about the food..! Would give it a 4 on 5 for everything we ordered, we had the Pizza Samosas, trio of Hummus with Chips and a Fettuccini aglio olio. I'm not a beer drinker but my friend loved the in house lager. Had a great time!

Awesome crafted beers, food and ambiance, this is what can be defined about this place. We 3 guys were lucky to get a table near the balcony. Tried out the beer of which stout and wheat were outstanding. Grab your drink and stand by the balcony and your day will be made. Try out your hand on snooker and foosball and you won't remember where time has passed. Along with food and ambiance, staff are very friendly and courteous. Looking forward to visit again.

This place is closed.It doesn't have out door sitting like they have it in Whitefield.Liked the crowd pretty young n decent music.Must try their fresh beer (wheat & ale) n pizza.Starters were decent.Ambience n Service is wokay!

The Biere Club at Lavelle Road is at an amazing position. The building itself is very good looking and quite nicely designed. We were lucky to get a place there. There are multiple levels at that place. They are also a brewery with good options. My favorite is the wheat beer. This is less bitter and bit fruity. Ale was a bit stronger and tasty as well. Nachos with grilled chicken and cheese was really good. Just felt that the quantity could have been more. Moroccan spiced chicken had an unique taste. I really liked the soft boneless pieces along with the sauce. English style chicken tikka masala with rice was my main course option. I don't really know what was English in this dish except...read more
Dint liked it that much.. Went in afternoon for a frnds treat.. AC not working.. Food nt that good.. And drinks was also ok.. NT that great.. Overall experience was boring.. :(

"The Biere Club" - The most impressive is the name itself.  To define this place there are not many words needed, just say "WOW, WHOA !!" Very nice ambiance, really good food. And of course, Awesome Beer ! I tried their two different drinks but the Bangalore Red ALE was amazing. Along with the drinks we ordered some Chilly Coriander Spicy Chicken. It was so so yum that we couldn't resist to repeat it. The place is really nice. Little on the higher pricing side but quality comes for a price. Ambiance - 4/5 Food / taste - 4/5 Drinks - 4/5 Staff Courtesy - 4/5 Pricing/Bill - on the higher side as aforementioned. A must try place !
Worst place third class managers arrogant and rude they don't know the meaning of hospitality place is good but filled with bunch of idots manager

Been here a couple of times for drinks after work ! A decent place to chill out with friends .. Like the cocktails & shots here especially the liquid cocaine.. Did not get to try out a lot of options in terms of food.. Baked potato skin was quite decent but the cheese fingers could have been better .. Potato wedges and french fries were a good accompaniment for the drinks !

A friend of mine took me here and this is like a laid back and nice place. I hear its one of the first and oldest breweries in the city. We ordered the beer samplers for my benefit and I got to taste it. Finally settled in for the Ale which was refreshing. Being an open area is always a plus in Bangalore as the weather is great! Food is good, music good amd great place for conversations! Must visit. It does reminds me of breweries in Pune.

Ok Ok... Food is not that great, we ate it all as we were hungry to death... We took one veg platter which was super sad, but chicken was delicious.... I loved there Peach flavoured fresh brewed beer... It was an average experience 😊😀

Yet another place knocked down my list. I loved the brew beer in this place. one of very few good breweries in Bangalore. I loved their Lager brew beer. They have a very good space it is located in a very good spot on Lavelle road. To start with the service was really good and they got us a table real quick. Loved the Biere Battered onion rings and assorted fries as well. Few of my friends had ordered the pork sausage platter and apparently they were very happy. Also had the chance to try the cheesy garlic mushroom. Overall food was good. I just loved their beer and would go back again for the same. Food - 3.5/5 Ambience - 3/5 Beer - 4.5/5 Overall happiness...read more

Been here a couple of times, Good old fashion brewery. Lager beer here is in my opinion one of the best in Bangalore (Yes, there are other places too). Delightful French fries and chilly coriander chicken are tasty sides with golden drink. But I feel , food menu can do a revamp has potential to serve better food.

Spread across multiple floors, this place is buzzing in the evenings no matter wht day of The week. One of the few micro-breweries to offer pitchers. I'd vouch for their food too and the service is pretty good no matter how packed the place is. Shouldnt be missed by a beer fan

One thing you got to know about this place :The BEST BREWERY in india!..and I say this only Coz of the beer(which is why it's a brewery in the first place).. There is no beer in india that tastes better than the ones you get here... And I've tried Mumbai,pune and obviously most of bangalore. You cannot go wrong with the wheat beer which is my personal favourite and also the best wheat beer in bangalore. Going to the next section :the ambience is pretty good. Its on lavelle Road so you can't get a more posh view than that unless you go to the Whitefield branch which i think has an amazing European setting equalled by no other. And then the food :Non veg platter, the pizzas and some of the...read more
A very good place to hang out with friends. Has variety of drinks. I am very fond of beer here. Taking a balcony seat and having beer is awsome. The place however lacks quality north indian food.
Prompt service even if they got a busy evening. Beer's good, variety of yummy food options. A must-go place! .

A nice place to hang out and very strategically located. I am not much of a drinks person but my friends quite likes the beer here. The ambience is lively and they have a three floor sitting area. The crowd is good too and I quite liked their veg non veg platter. Good portions good presentation n good taste!

Lecherous behavior from the neighboring table and the management 's absolute inability to handle the complaint, and instead being on the defence and saying that if we three girls on one table had a problem with three shabbily clad men letching at us from the adjacent table, then it is our problem. very sad experience to take back from such an 'elite' place. pathetic, is an understatement. When the management is like this what's the point in talking about the experience of food and beverage.

Loved the interiors and ambience. It's classy and new age. The wall hangings and brewery posters and lights and everything about this place is beautiful. The wooden interiors also give it a modern yet rustic look! We had some Nachos and a Mediterranean Kebab Platter. The kebab platter has so much choice it's incredible. The Biere Club brews their own beer and their beer is incredible. Had some stout, dark beer, Belgian, Ale, Lager and Golden Sangria. My favourites were the dark beer/stout that has a coffee and dark chocolate-like flavour in it, the Golden Sangria topped with exotic fruits were amazing too. We also got some coupons for free drinks. Was a great day.
I love this place from the first time I'd been there . Their beers taste really good and the food is also awesome !! Great place to hangout with old friends :)

The beer place in Bangalore. One of the first breweries to open up in this city. I personally like their brews especially their German variants. Perfect place for a Sunday brunch, located at a central place with good ambience and everything just sorts itself out with beer. It's one of the most sought after places on a Saturday night when it takes you ages to enter, I prefer a Sunday afternoon rather than the mad Saturday night. Food is good again only commenting on their short eats, beer is refreshing, ambience of a maybe English pub and service is good. Major part is the price and this place is not gonna be nice to your pockets :)

My go to destination for craft beer. :D Their food menu is just tantalizing and compared with most other breweries, the cost factor is affordable. It maybe just me, but the music they play just goes too well with the setting of the restaurant. Not too long a waiting time if you're going on weekends.
Every I visit here.. New experience.. Best place to hang out .. Beer and assorted fries the best combo and those mini burgers mouth watering..

Well first of all top marks for the location of the place which situated right at the intersection of Lavelle road and Vittal Mallya Road. The building looks how an old pub looks like which goes to the appeal of the place.Totally love the way they have placed the tables which overlooks the roads on either side of the buildings. This place has its own brewery which is one of the main reason why it has become so famous in Bangalore and the wheat beer they brew over is one of the best beers you will get in any breweries.The food completely compliments the ambience of the place with typical bar food offering mainly a English menu of which I enjoyed the English herb rice and Moroccan lamb...read more

The next  best bar in bangalore city after HRC, TOIT, Windmills, ABC and Social. They serve a variety of beer and most of them taste good. just opposite to bootlegger on the other side of the road. Spread across 3 floors they have AC, semi-open, outdoor sitting, smoking & non-smoking zones.

Excellent ambience. Nice crowd. Good customer service. You can get free beer if you solve a puzzle. We just missed it. Beer is good. Food too but some are rip offs. You can play pool on first floor. Great place to meet with people and spend a lot of time. Enter with Fat pockets.
This place had great ambience and amazing service. I am very very wow'ed with their quantity but I do appreciate their food. Their beer is yum and refreshing. It is indeed is beer lovers happy place!
Was disappointed at Belgian wheat unavailability, other than that pretty good,no complaints.Do try their pizzas,quite delectable.Staff is quite well informed about the beers.
I like this place. It has something for everyone. Nice chilled beer and yummy snacks in a happening place......what else you can ask for. Little expensive but well spent. Will definitely visit again.

I totally love this place. Have visited this place many times especially after office hours. Nice place to hang out. They have their own brewery. One must try their ale and wheat beer. It was good. Even the food is good. I absolutely love the chicken wings tossed in sauce. That is really good. The ambience is good too and they play some pretty awesome soundtracks. I love their idea of giving a scribbling pad at the table to jot down the ideas once you are high :-P :-D

Good ambience n music. The staff was courteous but service was pretty slow. My vegetarian friends had a hard time waiting for their orders and eventually the burgers they ordered were fine n filling but not worth the high prices. The non vegetarian kebab platter we tried was well served but again too expensive considering the quantity. Their brewery seems to be good though could be better. Personally the grilled chicken breast main course was the best dish we ordered (attached picture) and it was well served too. A 3.5 rating to suffice but the overall feeling was not worth the bill.

Brewhouses Brewhouses now that's one crazy thing you can find in Bangalore! And then there is THE BIERE CLUB, one of the top three breweries in Bangalore. Loved all their brewed beers and a wonderful place to hang out with friends. Went their at 12 noon, it was all peaceful enjoyed playing pool and foosball! The staff too are extremely friendly. Loved the place and surely the best brewery I've been to in Bangalore.

You will sink into the atmosphere at this place. Slated as one of the better brewery in town, you cannot miss the location and can seldom get bored here! Decor and menu compliment each other - kinda English style and finger food going well with the Brewer Beer and cocktails. My friends drink like a pig and love all of their beers. My favorite is white wine sangria and smoked pineapple vodka. Gorge on their finger food - beer onion rings, mezze platter, bucket fries, cheesy grilled mushrooms and pizzas. The staff is well trained, courteous and energetic- they try to match the pace of each table! The table arrangement is well done - you can be inside or face the road. You can also...read more
Very awesome place for beer lovers. Food was average. Little expensive - weekend no place to hang out reservation are not happened. But it's ok to be there
Been here with friends mostly. . Great location food and ambience . If you are coming in big groups reservation is recommended on all days as it gets really crowded .

I went here last around 3 years ago. When I wet recently also it felt the same and a little more better. Loves hanging out here. It's a pub with brewery and so people who don't drink can dig into their yummy food menu. Waiters need a little more swift reaction when they are called for service and the place needs a bigger parking space. Otherwise its the best friends hangout with some drinks in hand.
This place is exclusively for brewed beer lovers but since I do not enjoy beer the experience was not worth it. I give a 3 for the average crowd during weekends and ok kinda music.

One of the reasons to give this 3.5 is because it closes down between 4-7. Come on. I mean a brewery shouldnt close down noon time, that too on a saturday. So we reached at 7:15 p.m. Almost all the tables were reserved. Normally I don't mind sitting on a high table, but we were told since there were two of us, only high tables are available. I mean you could have given us a table for four because many of them remained empty for a long time. Turnovers and all is understandable but I honestly didn't like it. It's expected from a fine dine restaurant but not from a bar, especially in Bangalore. Anyway after settling down we ordered the lager and the wheat. They have a standard selection of...read more

I had been looking forward to visit The Biere Club since long especially after hearing the amazing reviews about the place from almost everyone who had been to the place, but for some reason or the other, it wasn't just happening.. Our patience was finally put to test around two weeks back, when we went to The Biere Club but as destiny had it, it was closed due to BBMP elections in Bangalore. But, better late than never..We (Me along with a couple of great friends) had the privilege of visiting The Biere Club yesterday and luckily got a table for seven on the second floor of the fantastic place. AMBIANCE: The ambience of the place is electric. It definitely has a classy and elegant...read more

Been here a million times with office colleagues and friends! This place has always treated us well! Love the stout and wheat beers! The food compliments well with the drinks. You will get good suggestions on what food would go well with your drinks! Will keep going back!

I've been here twice and both times I've find the beer (or biere) a little flat and lacking in body. It's definitely not bad but I expect something better from a microbrewery. The ambience is pretty good for a night out with a group of friends.

One of the best breweries in bangalore, very crowded during the weekend nights. Has 2 floors with the middle one containing a pool table and foosball. The staff is courteous but service can be slow, food is quite delectable, beer is great.

This is one place you can't go wrong with. The ambience is lovely, the staff are efficient and friendly. And the beers!! My favorites are their wheat beer and Belgian Ale (but they didn't have the latter when i went last week), but rum fans would love the taste of their stout beer. If in doubt, take a taster of all their beers. That's a treat in itself! The food they serve goes perfectly with the beer. So take your friends and head over!
Great food. Great ambience..location options..... ideal hangout for a Saturday eve.......bangalore at its best......try the wheat.options.....
Very nice hang around place...go to second floor...food and beer quality is very good...a bit European feeling, the crowd was nice and the food quality was very good
Really great place to hangout with friends. The chicken wings are really awesome. No one can have just one of those. It can get crowded and would be advisable to reserve in advance.

Great ambience combined with good drinks and great food!! The only drawback is how it can't accommodate the number of people that turn up there week in week out! Apart from that there's no reason to not go out and enjoy your time at the biere club!

This is a great place to have a few drinks and just chill with family and friends. The food is really good too. I ordered the potato wedges,crispy fried chicken wings, Chettinad style roasted prawns and the jumbo platter. Whew! We all had to work very hard to finish off the jumbo platter :-p All in all it was a great night,it was my mum's bday btw! Will b going back! +1 Photo(s)

Horrible Attitude!!! Had heard a lot about this place and wanted to visit it for long, but it was a disaster. Visit Arbor Brewing Company for a way better experience! A great place is always a combination of great food beverages and also a very good service. I cannot tell about the food as I was bummed by their attitude. We had booked a table last Saturday at 6:30 PM for 2 people with my fiance who came to the town for a day, we just wanted to grab some quick bites and a drink or two before heading for a nightclub. The lady at the reception confirmed our booking and the guy there took us inside in the ground floor and told us to sit in the high chairs near the bar stool. I was not...read more

I went there twice and both times it was pathetic. The staff knows nothing, they are just clueless. Damn expensive if we compare the quality. The starters are good but boring ambience. I call this as waste of location.

Saturday evening 9:30pm Me and two other friends went to this place to catch a beer and were on a right schedule. We had to go to the bar on the first floor because the place was packed. All three floors. We tried the taster tray which was priced at 40rs per taster. We tried 5 and picked our favourites- Bangalore malt, wheat beer, stout. We got a place after 10 mins and were seated beside the pool table which was a little inconvenient as people and sticks were coming in the way at times. We also ordered chicken wings which did not take much time to arrive. I personally didn't like the wings as the meat was not tender and it seemed a bit dry and crunch whereas I prefer juicy and tender....read more

My all-time fav when it comes to Beer in Bangalore. They make the best Belgium Wit in town. Food menu has improved over time; but still lot greasier items than healthy. What about cut carrot and cucumber sticks with some chat masala! The seating quality is reasonable (and varied for each type of group), service has improved significantly over time. Had a bad experience recently with my phone charging. Left the phone for charging; they brought back my phone. Forgot my charger. After that had to make so many calls and responses are always vague and non-specific. After four calls I was told we have nothing from the ‘lost and found’….Ha ha. Since charger was near their cash...read more

Went in on a Saturday night, to find it surprisingly quiet. Turns out it was Oktobiere fest time and Karaoke night was just starting. Thoroughly enjoyed the beer, food and the Karaoke. One of my all time favorite hangout places. Deepti Kulkarni Amrutha Roshan Rao

Located in lavelle road, Biere club has 3levels. Ground floor which is non smoking, first floor for smokers. Have visited this places couple of times. While the food is average, their wheat beer and Ale beer are nice . Crispy baby corn starter was pathetic, however their pizza and fries are better options. Service was quick and good as usual. No complaints there. Personally I would go back here for their wheat beer alone.

Good beers and incredibly bad and overpriced food. Nothing is actually good to eat there. You may want to visit the place for beer but thanks to their abysmally bad food and mediocre service, the best option is to go elsewhere instead. Sadly. This is the third time they've consistently screwed up in the food department. Shekhar Sharma
Beer is quite good. Food was pathetic, don't try crispy baby corn with barbecue sauce. Ambience is okay, average music. Better try other places nearby.

My favourite place for beer! Their brews always hit the sweet spot. You can't go wrong on the hefeweizen. Nor can you on the Belgian Wit. The beef skewers are good. Could have been much more better with a tad bit more tender meat. The bacon wrapped sausages are to die for. The topped nachos are so so....

Noticed this place when I visited Bootleggers. The outdoor seating of Biere club seemed attractive and I decided to visit it. Tried out 3 of their beers and loved all of them. The sad part is that the place doesn't have most of the drinks that are listed in the menu. On the whole, Biere club is a calm place with nice music. And I shall surely revisit to try out the food.

Epic variety of beers! Epic Ambiance! One of the best places I have been to in bangalore. Met a bunch of friends after a while at Biere club. Their thin crust pizza was just perfect. Ordered some starters in chicken which came with a variety of dips. They have a table mat which has outlines of unknown countries that are known for their beer. The first person to identify the countries for the day gets a free beer. Well i got all answers correct but missed out on the free beer. Maybe next time!

As a Beer Lover..i loved the place. The taste of the freshly brewed beer is amazing with the great set up and the whole feel of the place. Just look out for stand up comedy nights in the weekdays which will add on the entertainment factor also. Easily one of the top breweries in Bangalore. A Big Thumbs Up.!!
Beer is good but service is pathetic. UN organised completely. Not having WiFi these days another dark spot. Why can't u have WiFi for customers...its a joke not having wifi

The first microbrewery in South india as everyone say so was quite curious to visit them. They have really good craft beers. The seasonal and golden ale were the best. The stout was strong but good too.. didnt like the club special much. The bacon wrapped sausages were to die for. One of the best starters i had. Ambience is very lively with good crowd. Waiters are knowledgable and friendly. Loved this place. Will return soon +1 Photo(s)

Fantastic service, the team there made us feel at home from the very first visit. Its family friendly; our college-goers loved it. The food is great too, be sure to try the Ham, Salami and Chorizo pizza; one of the best pizzas I have had. As for the beers and ales; you won't stop with just one! One of my all time favourite watering holes.

Great place to hang out, loved the open seating on the first floor, watching the world go by on the Lavelle road. Ordered the wheat beer, this one is excellent, robust, nuttier and has a fruity flavor. Ordered the chicken nacho and cheese to accompany nothing to complain hot nachos topped with guacamole and sour cream. Finally came the assorted fries again a great accompaniment for the drinks, mixed spice, hot crispy fries and wedges.

Blessed with a terrific positioning this watering hole can beat the blues of all competition in the vicinity. But, somethings amiss. Guess its that ever welcoming factor. A bit of a warmth is what is needed to be added. Else, the wheat needs are good and one can order a mutton olive platter on the sides.

One of the first Microbreweries that I visited in Bangalore with a group of colleagues. The place has an amazing interior and the music is not loud here. We were a group of 12 people so you can imagine us ordering most of the dishes on the menu. Their thin crust pizza is nice and their kebab platters are the ones to go for. Also try the grilled chicken with melted cheese nachos. I prefer Ale and Wheat beer but my friends tried Stout too and they found it very smooth.

I don't know where to start from,Biere club had been in my wishlist since long Finally last Tuesday got to go there. Alright lets get to the point Amazing ambiance,interiors(i would say very well thought and implemented, the idea behind keeping these socializing games which let you make new friends and add on to your experience) Coming to beer,good variety and prices are affordable(one of the finest brewery in Bangalore so far) Talking about food,I guess loads to be done with food...food menu is more or less like a regular bar menu with 2-3 different things added to it Its time for you to change your menu a bit to hit the top list Because food is something which has to go with the...read more
A nice and decent place for peace loving as well as corporate guys !! It was a nice experience. Oktoberfest was the plus point .. Brewed beer tastes great 👍 for that !!

One of the very few places I have walked out with full satisfaction. We went for a late lunch and we tried the jager bomb, sangriana and some brewed beer. For Starters we ate cheese balls and topped nachos. They both were on point. For the mains we ordered three pepper pizza and lasagne. They were really well cooked a and tasted well too. For the dessert we tried the chocolate mud pot with icecream. Just was the right thing to end with.

Not sure how many times I have visited this place. The first micro brewery for Bangalore. I tried all of their beers and no other micro brewery can match the wheat beer they serve. Their food is also awesome.

Probably the best place to hang out on a rainy evening. The sense of calm that you get sitting on the top floor with the wind in your face and a mug of chilled ale in your hand chatting away with your loved one, sometime staring out at into the night sky is unbeatable. The staff very cordial, the food great and the beer - probably the very best in Bangalore. Though is a bit on the costlier side as compared to other great pubs like toit. Nevertheless, would definitely love to come back to the place again and again

An entire evening with good food and beer was totally spoilt by the hopeless floor manager Prajwal. At 11:00 PM , this guy started to push us out of the restaurant , even though we are very much aware of the 11:30 PM deadline in Bangalore. This person was showing us the way to the stairs and once i confronted him on what was his problem , he started behaving like a road side hooligan.I showed him how the other floors were still occupied with guests who were finishing their last drinks. I have written a detailed mail to their management today and am waiting for their course of action. Guys i would suggest that please try out alternate beer venues in Bangalore as we now have plenty of...read more

This was my first time to a micro brewery and I was quite excited. The ambience was very comforting and the crowd was very decent. Loved their sampler concept. We first sampled a few batches and we zeroed down on the seasonal ale. The sides were impressive. We ordered a fried calamari and it went well with our beer. They were screening ISL matches when we went there. What more fun than beer and football !!

This one is not for the amazing beer they have but for the staff they have around. I left my shades (pretty expensive ones) on one of the not so fine Friday's when I was meeting a friend. As much as I thought there were bleak chances to get it back from that crowded a place, these guys were very responsive and helpful. Take a bow guys! 🙌
The ambient sound of chatter adds life to this already lively hangout. The brews here are amongst the city's best and I personally love the pilsner. A good place to take the team out.

Can never get tired of this place !! The perfectly chilled perfectly billed beers keeps you engrossed throughout your evenings..perfect place to hop in once after work to have a few beers coupled with some tasty crunchies...3 levels of pure bliss with seating available to accompany you mood !!

Went there for a bachelors party..being 11 thirsty, hungry dudes, we ended up ordering most of stuff on the menu..so food in general is great to taste although proportions are not filling..I am a bit partial to the bacon which was absolutely amazing in both burgers as well as wrapped in sausages. The beer was fantastic and after a point we sort of lost track of how many pitchers we had gulped down. What is not good is the service. Although waiters are reasonably friendly it takes a LONG time for anybody to pay attention to your table. After a point we got tired of calling them and just waited till they empathetically showed up. The orders also get served all wonky..main course comes up...read more

If you like beer, dear god this place will leave you satisfied. With an array of fresh brews, it's a refreshing change from the mundane bars by pushing the limits for quality beer in bangalore. I will be coming here again as I always do!

After a beer at ABC, and an LIIT at HRC, and a coffee at ICH, we landed at The Biere Club.  We ordered a couple of beers, Club Special and Seasonal, to see how good can it get. And buoy, we were in for a healthy surprise since the beer was really good, making it easily the best beer we had all day. But we didn't order anything to eat though, since we were already full, and were in a mood to have only beer. The service was prompt, and the ambience decent (thanks to some really lovely wall caricatures). It is slightly expensive, but I would definitely recommend trying out the beer at this place, and I would love to be here again. Verdict: One of the best beers. Food: 4.5 Service:...read more

My favorite place to hangout with friends and play some pool. The craft beer is so good that I can drink it almost everyday without getting bored of it. Food is absolutely delicious. I love the way they cook fish here. And the bacon wrapped sausages are a must try.

Spacious 3 storey drinkery with good brewed beer. The bartender was very helpful in deciding on the beer. Ale was my personal favourite from their selection. Food was served quiet quickly and was tasty as well. Sausage rolled in bacon and the chicken wings are recommendable. Veg lasagna is a good option for vegetarians. Overall it is a decent place to hangout if you find a table.

I had been to this place when all the places were closed in Bangalore due to bandh. I tried all the beers available on the tap. Experiment was worth the effort. Highly recommended for their beers. Food is fine.

Incredible experience ever.. perfect place for a weekend.. loved each n everything.. eye catching ambience with with amazing atmosphere.. no flaws in anything.. had tacos n onion rings which was perfectly delicious.. Definitely would love to b there again..

A very nice place to hang out, the ambience is also very good having a nice crowd. If you are new to the place, go for the suggestion of working staff. I liked the service, the staff was good in handling guests. I would definetly like to have another visit and try out for more.

One of my favorite places to indulge and binge on some great fresh brewed beer! This place has amazing brews and a great,variety too. If you're a beginner to beer and need to be "acquire" the taste, try out their wheat beers - you'll be a beer fan for life TRUST ME! Great ambience, good food are a given at this place and all you need to get is some great beer loving company. Be sure to have an evening you'll absolutely enjoy! Keep up the good work people of Biere Club

No words... Just speechless abt the place. Amaizing ambience and service. Had The best crafted beer ever. The place proves its the best microbrewery in bangalore. Had the best of best time with the most wonderful person. The way staff greeted us was a great surprise. Great going. All the best guys Nishhh person. The way staff greeted us was a great surprise. Great going. All the best guys @nishu
Superb place. One of the best brewed beers in bangalore with kickass food. The ambience is lovely. A must visit for those who like microbreweries.

If you go to Bangalore, this is one place you have to visit for their freshly brewed beer n finger licking good food. Their chicken platter and wheat beer does wonders n is refreshing. Located on the same road as the Harley Davidson dealership, what else could a biker want: chilled beers, mouth watering dishes and a view of the road where all the HD's are parked...

This is an excellent place for beer lovers. Everyone should visit this place who likes microbreweries. There are many flavours of beer and the food is also good. Ambience - 4/5 Service - 3.5/5 Quality - 4/5

Very nice crafted beer with rustic interiors and semi open on two sides..We had few starters which were very tasty - chilly coriander chicken and chicken pop corn.. The Ale beer was perfect and they had happy hours running till 10pm since it was a Monday night they had 1 plus 1 on beer..Service was very efficient..Will be back again soon
Excellent location.. Wonderful setting and great beer.. Take a seat by the open areas.. The staff is courteous and helpful.. A must try place

Amazing place to hang out at an epic location. Tried their seasonal beer which was excellent regret not trying food options. Ambience is good n comfortable even you are visiting for the first time. Staff is very humble n ll help you decide what to order as per your preferences. Sample concept helps you decide what to order also you can take up their biere club challenge if you have an appetite to eat n drink. 👍

If you go with friends and if you are not into drinks, this is not a place for you. If you are the right person for this place and if you have enough dough this place won't disappoint you. They have a lot of brews and decent food. It is all about beer here. Ambience and music are excellent. They give excellent cheeses as well

Since I'm not a huge of brewed beer and beer, I didn't enjoy the visit . The crowd is less on weekends before 7. A long conversation, some brewed beer and to chill out on weekends, this is the place .

Very Good Causal hangout place for a beer. one of the old brewery in Bangalore. Ambience is not that great but u will still fall in love with it. If you are planning for Club hopping in lavelle road , Add this to the list. Food is decent. Wheat beer and lager tastes very good.

What works for this place is its location and ambience ... What better than a pool table in the middle of friends food and drinks... Not the best nachos and it became in consumable after it got s little cold ... Pizza was also disappointing... Liked the concept of samplers.. But they sure can work on the food options .. The platter also had very few items which could help us clear the various coloured pastes / chutneys/ spreads ... Would I go back ?? Yes.. Would I reorder what I have tried ... Nooooo @thebiereclub

This place is amazing for beer lovers. They are properly off the order on Vittal Malaya road. They is here the crowd is. Fully packed on the evenings and weekends. This is actually a popular microbrewery. We had some great drinking scenes here, we tried Beers- ale, wheat, stout, specials. We likes the alse better than all.' Food- Mutton pepper, kebab platter, meat and salami platter, smoked chicken pizza. The food was great. We loves the place. Overall it was good and it a MUST TRY.?
Good place to hang out with friends..The ale beer is too good .valet parking makes it easy and 1st floor is always teeming with activities. Overall a nice place.

I guess this place needs no introduction! Sirf naam hi kaafi hain! One of my fav places for ale and wheat beer! Totally love it!! Even love their nachos!! Will visit them over and over again till I die drinking their yummy beer:-)

The best selection of beers on tap in Bangalore. Their Belgian ale, English Ale, Stout, and Scotch Ale never disappoint. Their week day happy hour of two for one is exactly that: happy. I've never had food I found disappointing from here - their pizza and nachos were both a relief, as I'm usually disappointed with both in India. Both were delicious here.

One of the best microbreweries in town. I love the ambiance here in this centrally located pub. Try anything as most of their food is good. This is a good place to go out drinking with your buddies if you are willing to shell out a good mount of money but I gaurantee you that it is worth it.

Been on the list for a very long time finally got the chance to tick it off. A Nice place descent outing can be assured. A Very 'cool' like recomended on the whole

Biere Club is the one of the most happening brewery pub of the city. Wanted to visit from a long time n finally had a great time with my friends. Best part of this cafe is d location, heart of city. Just half a km from MG Road Next Best is of course the various Beers, the best is Belgium Ale, smooth and less bitter Next is the food, greatttt taste and delightful. So a couple of friends and I visited this place on a day we went pub hopping in and around Lavelle Road. Biere club is Bangalore's first micro brewery. Little wonder that it is almost always crowded. We hopped in to find ourselves a seat. Failing to do so, we stuck to standing and ordering a sampler for each of ourselves. The sampler included an English Dark Ale, American Rice Lager, Belgian Wit , Stout, O&T and an Oakwood Ale. Look forward to visiting the place again over this weekend for some more beer. Hopefully, I will find myself a seat!

We as foodies very rarely visit a restaurant the second time unless they are really really really good or if the person has no choice due to certain situations. Situated in a posh locality like Lavelle road, this place has an amazing ambience. The kind of excitement you get after entering this place cannot be put into words. The music is quite good too. For starters we ordered Veg Nachos. The taste, texture, re fried beans and the melted cheese ( aptly named ) were a great combination. Along with this we ordered the Virgin Mojito and the Virgin Sangria both of which were good in their own way. The Mojito had fresh mint, sugar and lemonade which blended really well. You cannot dislike this place. Situated at a posh locality near UB City, This place has a delightful ambience, Amazing crowd, Good food and one of the best brewery in the town. Go out drinking with your buddies on weekends. Little expensive but  worth the money.

Visited yesterday... Did not have a reservation.. But did not have to have too long.... Liked the ambience.... Beer lager is really good.. Music is decent...For a veggie.. Food options are less. This is the right place...to be at....

A nice loud and happy ambience is the first thing i noticed about this place. The staff is friendly and courteous. Loved the starters specially the pizza samosa. The presentation of food was nice. Was quite disappointed with the rice combo though. Overall, A nice place to hang out with a group of friends.

This is one place that has been on my list for way too long. Every time I go to UB City...I pass by this place and see a crowd waiting and I've been wanting to go. And finally it happened. LOVED IT!!!! Food- great Drinks- great Music- too good Ambience- wow

Had a quick round of beer and bit of snack at this place last week on a rainy day. I have been to their Whitefield outlet and wanted to try this particular outlet on Lavelle road. I went on Monday 23.11.15 had a stout an ale and a club special..music,ambience,service is awesome.. steward Das served me at table 23..in food i was looking for PORK but as Das said that they dont have the stock for the day so I ordered for Squid and bacon..but I found very less bacon in that so I requested to give some more bacon as I am looking for pork item..Das went inside and requested the Chef but Chef instantly denied to give..I want to give 5 points but i was not 100% satisfied..I also belong to a hospitality industry...chef needs training ..you are loosing a customer for just 5 peice of extra bacon. my bill no is 14863

Had an awesome standup comedy night.. The service is really very good.. Morocco chilli chicken was awesome.. Even grilled chicken was good.. They got me all the stuff along with my chicken which I asked like fries .. Really nice.. Had a great time!!

The wheat beer was good. Coming in here for the second time. Tried the stout for the first time. This tastes better. The food was average nothing ground breaking in terms of taste or variety. I liked the setting on the first floor with the open balcony set up.
A nice place in the heart of the city. Good drinks and lovely food. Their beer is too good. And the cocktails also that they make are nice.

Located at one of the best. Areas if Bangalore , it provides an awesome sit out place for the crowd . The beer is just amazing and still one of the best in Bangalore. The food is good and the service is decent enough . The music and crowd are great too . Definitely a place to sip a beer any day

I'm not a drinker but I like to experience the atmosphere of pubs. So after getting to know that this was the first micro brewery in South India, I was pretty excited to dine here. Good ambiance in reasonable price. Good lighting. There was no air condition when I went this November which was fine. It would have been great if the place smell fresh. Food quality and quantity is good compared to the price. And if you are a smoker you should head straight to second floor which also has a pool table. They play good music. And the staff are friendly. They have prompt service.

I did not like the beers as much as I liked in other micro breweries. For me they tasted almost like the bottled ones. I like the ambience and the food was good. I had ordered for Jumbo platter and it was more than enough for 5. Taste and quality - 6/10 Ambience - 7/10 Pricing - 6/10 Service - 9/10

Good music, good people and great beer. If you want wheat beer in Bangalore then this is the place you need to come in Bengaluru. The food is not that great you can find better stuff to satisfy your hunger rite opposite at ub city

The main highlight of the place is fresh beer served from there own Brewer ,amazing place with 2 floors and open to road side with good music and cuisine of Italian and mexician makes the place look so good

Went der on a friday night wid a friend. Myst say its quite a place. Huge one with three floors matching expectations of love birds, sports lovers, party animals and pure alcoholics (not me). Ground floor is dinner cum date kinda place, first one is more sort of a sports bar wid pool table n shit, tge too one is a pub I would say. Great music, great ambience, great crowd and I must say great staff too. Of course being a microbrewery, amazing crafts and ales. Cocktail too are a worth while here. Food is quite delicious. And forgot the best part, yet its v cheap.....I mean after all for what u getting u wouldn't have to pay much.
Great beer, good ambiance. A lil pricey in terms of food, but it tastes good. Well set for hanging out with buddies cuz they have a pool table too

The Biere Club seems to have been awarded merits by the Bangalore crowd in copious amounts. That is exactly the reason I wanted to visit this microbrewery. Ridiculously easy to find, bang at the corner of that junction. A reservation was made the previous day, and a hassle free entry even though we were late by 20 minutes on a Saturday night. Right at the corner of the road, one would easily spot it. Very nice and rustic, old time club like ambiance. We ordered the Non-veg platter here, loved the Fish and Prawns. They have really nice brewed Beer as well. The Staff is good but the Service is kinda ok. Good music to enjoy while enjoying the entire experience. One of us ordered a Mojito, was not too good but the flavored Beers were really nice.

I had earlier been to their Whitefield branch but somehow I liked this one slightly better. The nonveg platter and wheat beer combo can never go wrong. The pepperoni and cheese pizza also lived up to the expectations..

LOVE this place.  Great venue for seeing standup comedy, awesome tasty beers on tap including the very elusive 'craft brew stout' which was very tasty.  Staff is very friendly, vibe is non-pretentious, and the noise level and crowd level is more manageable than other brewpubs like Toit.

Bangalore's very own microbrewery! Big and airy and easy to find a table. The wheat beer is ok, and makes a nice change from the ubiquitous kingfisher (although no complaints about that!).  At 360 a pint here vs. 100 at bootleggers opposite its pricey. Food is sub-par - standard fried bar snacks prepared without much thought or skill; notably bad was the hummus, but the chicken wings tasted boiled and were covered in sweet cloying gloop and the shrimp popcorn was soggy with a thick batter. 2500 for 2 makes it pricey. A random plan for a beer party took us there. And believe me what a lovely ambience it has. It looks like a complete Italian architecture with splendid lightning. Just lovely. The outside sitting is just great. Good service and delicious food and pizzazz....

Great place to have a Stout. The wheat beer j felt was a bit sweetish. The ambience is good. Ought to spend more time there. We missed out the live music show as had come quite early. The food was good enough. Chicken wings were classic American. The food is a bit costly though.

Was really disappointed actually.. came here expecting a lot.. the service was really poor.. i ordered a wheat beer and was served something else.. when i returned it and asked for a wheat, they gave me something else again.. we ordered the mezze platter and it had such a small quantity of food.. in general the food quality wasn't great either.. on top of all this the taxes and service charge is really high..

Another of those roads in Bangalore that comes to life during the nights!! This place has a pleasing ambience coupled to the decent crowd that visits this place. The place is expensive but sometimes the happy hours bails you out!.. must visit for a bangalorean!

Great place..gud ambiance... Nice brew.. Decent food. Service was quick enjoyed every bit of it.. The veg platter was amazing with different bites to choose from, wings was a let down as it tasted very sweet. The ultimate winner was the mutton pepper. All in all a nice experience evening spent well wit loved ones n frnds :) Food : 4/5 Ambiance : 4/5 Service : 4/5 VFM : 3.5/5

I was here for "The Christmas Brew" followed by Hangover Brunch on 5th Dec. It was awesome Brew tour! They had Hand Crafted Biere's - EPA, PILS LITE, Belgian Wheat, Stout & Session I.RA - Club Special. I gulped hand crafted Biere Belgian wit, Wheat. This is beer that is brewed with a large proportion of wheat relative to the amount of malted barley, it is usually top-fermented.. This is a very smooth beer...I love this kind of BEER! The Mutton pepper is a boneless dish it was not very spicy, well marinated. I  was recently invited to Bierre Club for the re-launch of their Hangover Brunch. The food was excellent right from the starters to the main course and finally down to the desert I ate some interesting starters like Mutton pepper fry, chicken Popcorn, crispy squid and Bacon, Bacon wrapped sausages and a few other things which were all delish. I know if I ever visit bangalore again, I would come again to bierre club!! The friendly staff is what really makes the ambience - relaxing and fun. I loved the wheat ale but if I was ever on a working schedule I would opt for the stout! I really want to thank the staff for making my visit a memorable one. And for giving me fresh coasters as a souvenir :)

To usher in the celebrations of December, Biere Club does an annual event of making their ‘Christmas Brew’. This year, their 4th in a row, they invited a bunch of us for a tour of their brewery, and to talk about this new celebration brew that would be ready in time for Christmas! Biere Club has always been special to classic beer lovers, they are in fact the first microbrewery to be open and functional in Bangalore, and pretty much revolutionized beer drinking. We were called in pretty early in the morning, so that the strong smell of the brew dies out by the time the brunch and lunch parties get in. Came here a few days back. I was surprised they have three floors. I have been here before but never noticed it. We were seated on the second floor. It was a Thursday evening so ambiance and crowd was pretty much what I was expecting, a mix of youth and and people in there expensive white shirts discussing some shit over the 'there but not too loud' music. There beer brews were good. Service was OK. For me ,this is definitely one of the places I would love to come back again.

This place holds the right for lot of praises but something was missing... hmmm.. I would love to change my rating to 4 as still optimistic with this place. :)
One of the very first brewery in Bangalore. Set up in a very nice place, it has some great beer and food to go along with it, The setting is good and nice selection of music! Try the pizzas.
The original microbrewery in town, but nowhere the best anymore. There's quite a bit of a drop off in the taste of beer and food. Needs a bit of sprucing up too after 5 yrs in business
This was one of the first breweries of Bangalore. I liked the ambience there. Beer and pizza is the combination I would like to try again and again :)

The stout here is usually what I get and it's great. The wheat beer is fine too. One of the first micro breweries in bangalore. Centrally located and well connected. The platters are great here. The nachos / wings are good too. I also like the pizzas they make. Generally I try to get myself to be on the ground floor as its more lively here. They have a more sophisticated dining option too at higher levels. Overall a good place for some good beer and food.
Try their chicken drumsticks and platters.. Drumsticks are juicy and covered in yummy masala. Awesome ambience too.. Definitely a good place to hangout with friends..

I am not fond of beer and avoid it as much as possible ... But Biere club may be the only place where I would have Beer ... They have varieties where the distinct flavour is discernible ... Though the food is average a good place for beer lovers ...

Was here yday for the new year's party. A very evenly managed event I must say. A lot of options in food and everything tasted great. Heard a lot about it so came here for a quick lunch before taking a flight back to Mumbai. Fantastic food and a great variety of brewed beers. A must go to if you are a beer and cheer lover. Keep it up!
One of the best places to get fresh brew with amazing array of platters and best made sauces on food...technically sign off on a different high every time you check in this place ...

A perfect joint at the perfect point. That's how I'd describe it. Placed at a stone throw's distance from UB city and at the cross point of Lavelle road this place is ideal for the breakout buddies. Service is definitely good, been there more than once to know it's not a coincidence. They do take care of patrons well. Overall a good after hours hangout. and my personal thanks for the mock-a-beer which has saved me on those days I wasn't feeling like drinking much.

Went there on a Sunday afternoon with 2 friends. Decent crowd, not much. We choose to have seats on 1st floor, window seat :) You get the outside view as well, while having your food and drinks.
