Wanted to go to this place from ages. Went on Saturday evening. Its generally crowded so table reservation recommend. We tried all beers but I think wheat beer was good. In food we tried chicken wings, finger chips, pizzas. Every thing was about average. Staff is good. It's a good place for outing with friends.

A pretty empty place right in the evening..inspite of that the service was pitts. Needed a reminder for just everything..there are loads of nice places than having to repeat this. Food: very average. Beer: limited.

I was there for a Stand Up show and enjoyed both the show and the food. The food is delicious, although I will pick fault with the rather small portions. The staff very courteous and didn't bother us even when we stayed well beyond the last call. I enjoyed the experience of The Biere Club.
The Restaurant charged me Rs 1.8L instead of Rs 1800 on debit card. No remorse No regret ... its been 48hrs no reversal and they are least bothered. This was simply Pathetic on their part.

Had dropped in with a friend. The Beer wasn't that good (read Flat) and when I asked our server , was told that's a fresh Keg and that's how beer is supposed to be! Very enlightening, indeed. Doubt if I would visit again.

Taste(Food&Beer) 4.5/5 Ambience 4.5/5 Service 4/5 Value For Money 3/5 Overall 16/20 Verdict- This is Bangalore's first craft brewery. The food tastes really good especially with the cold beer. The mixed platter, the pizzas & the veg platter are all good. The ambience is nice and relaxed. The service is slow even when the place is not crowded, which could test your patience. The prices are not so high but the add ons sure are high & so adds up to the same thing.

While the food is good and the beer is drinkable, the service that we received was absolute nonsense. Maybe being the first microbrewery in south India has gotten to their head. The manager was absolutely rude and lectured us on the difference between fine dining and casual when we inquired about why the table we were promised would free up in "mnimum 15 minutes" (how clever!, how devious!) wasn't free even after two hours. This led to an argument, and he continued to give me and my girlfriend the stare while we walked out. Will not visit again.
Good service. Nice food and a great place to sit and gulp beer :) located at one of the best places.....music is not that great. Decent crowd even on a Friday noon.. Will be back soon :) TY TBC

The first Microbrewery in town and a very accessible one. Sits next to the UB City in Lavelle road. The Ambiance - Nothing special about the ambiance. The moment you get inside, you're very families with the theme and the atmosphere. The Beer - The beer is good. I couldn't find a reason to dislike the beer. But I'm sure I had better ones :) The Food - Enjoyable. It has a warm flavor and you will find your taste in the menu as it has a lot verities. But again, they're not exceptional. Will I go again ? Well, I'm not sure. I don't find this place exceptional. A one time visit will satisfy you. Will I recommend ? Yes. You can visit this place once.

Me and my friends usually don't visit places for the second time in a short span of time.. which is quite obvious to indicate Biere Club lives up to that expectations.. Good attentive guys to attend to you.. Great self brewed Wheat beer.. Infact, one of my friends who was visiting us from the UK noted that the beer was one of the best he had tasted... Kudos guys..

Nice cool place to hang out with friends and delicious finger food to drink with your beer. Other than that there is nothing special about the place unfortunately. Service is rather slow but the waiters are real friendly and sweet. They made a nice pomegranate and green apple vodka based cocktail for us, which had the right amount of vodka and sweetness to it. The next day I ordered for the same they were unable to get it right, it was too sweet. They just had 3 varieties of beer 😕

Pretty big fan of their terrace and its view. Their kebab platters and beer drinking platters are pretty insane and filling. Personally, I like their shooters and cocktails a lot as I'm not a big beer drinker. It also helps that they have an amazing team of staff. Makes you want to keep going back! It was a spot in a pub crawl I organised, and we weren't disappointed! Thumbs up!
Amazing food and beer. Each floor has an unique ambience and vibe to it. One of the very few good places where it is easy to get a table on weekends. Pizza samosas are a must try!

We had met here for a reunion , the place is quiet crowded during the weekend so if you are planning to go please reserve your seats. Coming to the food , it is quiet good and the services on the drinking menu is fast.

Went there at Sunday evening was surprised to see the place was pretty empty, place is situated near UB City in Lavelle Road. Ambiance of the place is okayish nothing special, to make it worse the choice of music was bad!!!, only good thing they had is a Foosball table. Service is horrible staffs are confused one of the items which order wasn't served to us and even the food which you order was served too late. Coming to Food we ordered Chicken Nachos which was awesome with melted cheese it was perfect..chili coriander chicken was moderate which was served with a dip. We also tried hot & spicy marry which was so spicy :) that whatever you drink before was compensated with this...read more

*I've asked for the menu 25 mins back* we are bar hopping at the moment the first stop over was at the biere club. Past experiences was the reason to start off here, things have changed now the service is really gone down below acceptable standards.* I'm still seated upstairs waiting for the menu * "hope I get the menu before the cheque"

Was in Bangalore a few weeks ago and had heard a lot about the microbrewery scene there so decided to check it out. Tried the ale and the special. The special wasn't exactly very 'special' but was decent. The ale was not exactly what an ale should be. The food was pretty average too. Had a fish and a chicken dish. The real problem are the timings though. You're almost kicked out at 11!!

Certainly one of my most favourite place in bangalore. One of the first place in bangalore to be serving brewed beer and easily the best of the lot. Good music, good crowd, good beer and good food. Have visited this place a couple of times and I have not been disappointed.
Rating 3.5 only for the place. Love the way its done up. No great variety in food. Beer is supposed to be really good but not a beer person to comment.

Biere club. One of the best brew pub with a classy crowd. I loved the beers here. Very tasty and crafted to perfection. Almost all the drinks available and they have a very good menu for the food lovers too. The service is just amazing. One visit to this place will make you come here every week. The crowd in the evening is mostly corporate and classy. So its a peaceful place to chill out. Even though on the pricey side compared to most brew pubs. Its worth every rupee you spend. Highly recommended place this is.

Amazing place to hangout with friends and family.. Excellent beer coupled with great service and outstanding ambience... A totally different experience. The place must be on ur list if you are a part freak.

Love this place!! Amazing beer and amazing food.. Wish they weren't bluffing about the tables being not available and pushing people (especially if the count is 2 and less) towards the bar counter.. The pizza samosa is a must try!

I have visited this place twice for events and once with friends. They have 3 floors but it does get crowded during weekends. I visited once on weekday and the service was pretty quick. The ambiance is nice and so is the beer. I loved their light beers. The pizza and the veg options were really good. I visited this place when I was not so active on Zomato so I do not remember the exact names of dishes that I had but I do remember that it was good and I wouldnt mind visiting again.

Would have gone to this place like multiple times since it started. My husband s a beer person and this s one of his fav brew club. Food was always average. But the location n ambience get its marks always. But the last time we went here we notice that it has lost its charm. They should definitely take a step in maintaining the place, like the furniture n lighting!
Visited on 13th night.. Very smooth beer(ll give you slow reaction), awesome ambience and jet speed service. Food and drinks, both are price worthy.

Refrain this place during non-peak hours since the service is dead slow. We ordered 3 pitchers and few mocktails and also check on the starters. Tastes real good. We ordered all veg starters and the one with platters are good. Cheese balls can be tried. The nachos also tasted good. For 5 the bill came up to 3900.

One of the best brewery I've ever been to that served exceptionally good beer . The Beer was really chilled and was worth the cash . The ambience was also very neat and attractive . The place one would definitely revisit once again !

This one is located in the uber-posh junction of Lavelle Road & Vital Malya Road, a 2 minute walk away from UB City. So this place is quite frequented by corporates & expats. We're big fans of craft beer and have tried a few in Bangalore, Mumbai and Pune. They have two levels, theres an indoor AC section on the ground floor above which is an open roof section. We chose to occupy the open air section. They had 6 Beers on tap. Sadly they had run out of Belgian Wit, which almost always is the first brew we try. So we went for the All Malt which was a Dark bodied Stout with that typical taste of coffee. Much in-line with these offerings at other microbreweries. Though it felt a bit flat &...read more
The beer is really good. The food is very average considering the price we are paying for it. The chicken items specially aren't that great. Should go only for the beer experience.

If you’re looking for a break from boring office lunches or just want to indulge in a delicious lunch outing with colleagues, the Biere Club, touted as South India’s first craft brewery, introduces The Work Lunch, which is a fitting meal for corporate on the go. Take a quick look at the menu and you will know that the work lunch is no-frills, but a crisp and satisfying meal that has all the ingredients for a seamless business lunch. The offering includes a choice of Indian curry with multiple options like the steaming-hot Pork Vindaloo, Punjabi Chicken Makhani, Spicy Fish Curry, Creamy Palak Paneer, Vegetable Jalfrezi and lots more, each served with steamed rice, tawa paratha, and...read more Read full post on https://roamingruta.wordpress.com/2016/02/17/the-work-lunch-at-the-biere-club/

The Beer 'Biere' club offers you a whole different variety of Beers. Pick your taste and kick off the evening. Very well dimly lit ambience, with ample seating, and off-course the food tastes great. Try their freshly backed thin crust pizzas and cheesy nachos. Ample seating in smoking zone too. Clean restrooms (a hard to find thing at most pubs / lounges).

One cannot not go to biere club and not love their beer. My fav here is the long island iced tea. But today for my change we were given a twist to the classic drink called the long island iced beer. A strong one and a long lasting one. The food today we ordered was the non-veg platter and the sausage wrapped with bacon where the latter was absolutely crispy and delicious. I love biere club for their hospitality and absolutely adore Mr. SHYAM our bar tender who pours our drinks to bot get us drunk but to fill our hearts with love for the place and the beverage. Biere club is a home away from home!

Clearly living in its past glory is how to best describe The Biere Club. Now that Bangalore has so many microbreweries this place clearly has not kept up. Beer is Ok, still many others places are far better. The food sucks both in terms of quality and quantity. What they charge makes it a complete rip-off! Steer clear of this place, as the management is clearly fleecing its customers!

The place and food needs serious renovation. Thin crust veg pizza tasted like crispy paratha. Veg nachos had some weird bitterness to it. Veg hummus and pitta bread portion had a variety of three different types of hummus given with flat bread and tapioca chips but none of it was interesting enough for 6 ppl to finish it up. Even a simple potato wedges wasn't rite.

Been here few times...like the atmosphere and ambience.....beers of course. Food not so much variety ... basically not a place for full meals but finger food and starters etc Staff can be a little more attentive, they seem bored and not too keen...... Still overall may visit this place due to convenient location and ambience

What an excellent choice on the menu - Chinese, Mexican, Indian and Lebanese. Lots of snacks food with or without the beer. The beers brewed in house - large choice fresh and great choice, I had the lighter larger. Good service and good crowd. A bar decor and the brewing process can be seen front the first floor. Would definitely come again and would highly recommend a visit.

We were taking a stroll in lavell road when we came across this place. We decided to check it out. It was around 3pm so we did not expect a good crowd. And the place was nearly empty. But the ambience was awesome!! We played pool and foosball and the beer was just yummy!! Would definitely like to go there in the evening once. A must go place!

Visited bierre club for some quick beer and bites while at Lavelle road! We ordered for fish and chip cones, spicy mutton pepper. The spicy mutton was cooked with curry leaves , pepper in coastal style which was good! The fish and chips were served to us in bierre club paper cones and a white tartar dip! Was a nice place to visit! Would love to try the mains there! Ambience 4/5 Food 4/5 Beer 3/5 Service 4/5
Being 5 years in Bangalore and didn't visit this place was a miss from my side.. Place is awesome Food is awesome Drinks, no doubt awesome Will visit soon again..

Sudden plan is what got us to this place . I have been waiting to try their flavored beer for a long time - well YES. We went ahead and placed our order for the strawberry flavored one. I personally think it was smooth and nice. The strawberry taste lingers in the mouth with every sip. Although we did not order anything to eat , my updated review will surely have that segment next time. The level 1 is non smoking area and well level 2 is the smoking zone . The location is spot on with a view of beautiful roads and cruising cars. On the whole I loved being there along with my friend. We had a nice time.

Visited this place last week as a part of microbrewery hopping.. Ambience This place can be easily identified as it is present at the corner ofthe road.. The corner tables of the ground floor gives an excellent view of the road where hifi cars zoom past quiet sometime.. This place has 3 floors in total out of which ground floor is non smoking area.. Interiors are good but feels little aged.. The chairs here felt very comfortable.. This place can accommodate different group sizes easily.. Drinks We tried almost all the available flavours in this place. I personally liked the Belgian strong ale and my friend liked the stout.. The strawberry flavoured one is on the sweeter side.....read more

in short.. I Loved it! Visited this place with the family, and starting from the ambience, to the quality of food, and the service, everything was great. My 5-year-old nephew seemed to be running around the place with curiosity, however, the staff was very friendly and also offered him a glass of cranberry juice which gladly brought a big smile on his face. Yes I do agree that the prices are high, but when we look at the location of the restaurant, there would be no point of argument. The quality of beer was great. Cheers guys! will definitely drop by again. :)

Ambiance was good. The beer was chilled and the taste hit my taste buds directly. Mr. Parveen was very friendly and the service was quick. Good job Biere club team. Keep it up! Looking forward to visit again and again. :) P.S. This was my first visit to a Beer club in Bangalore. It was awesome!
The original and perhaps the best brew. Excellent finger food, Pizzas and platters and all you need over fresh beer. never a letdown. But music can improve.

The restaurant has a nice ambience and decent crowd to enjoy within. The second and third floor of the restaurant has much more aura than the first floor. The service can be and should be much more efficient and fast as the people coming there expect it to be. Overall the experience was good.

Went here to watch Ind-Pak match with school friends. Though we had booked a table in the coming zone in advance, the table that we were allotted was too high and not comfortable . The TV initially had issues and we thought we won't get to watch the match... In the end it was fixed , thank God ! The smoking zone has open windows but they are not enough to drive out blore's heat, so after sometime the place stated to feel stuffy. Nevertheless the beer was cold and soothing and made up for the other flaws. We sampled the stout, which was a bitter-sweet Coconut Porter but dint like it much. The Belgian strong ale and the wheat ale were good. We had 3 'buckets' of assorted fries , some...read more

Its a great place. The crowd too is quiet sorted. Saturday night, this place is blasting with people. The beers served are good. Food was good too, their portions are quiet nice. All in all a good feel: -)

Sadly one of these places which started on a high, but since seems to live high on the established brand. Service are sometimes non existing, often understaffed. The beers various so much in quality, would recommend them to go with a few standards and less experimenting. Value for money is low.

One of my go to places for craft and flavored beer, I usually start off with their sample though I know my clear fav. The Shoot at sight cocktail is pretty good as well. Starters, spicy ground beef with melted cheese along with their wood fired pizza (any one is fine!!) For the main course I like the Cajun rub grilled fish fillet, homemade tortellini, pork chops, lamb chops, beef tenderloin and their beef burger is pretty pretty awesome. Mind you these are not all single sitting but the result of occasional trips :) Price on the higher side but have a couple of pints and it wont matter anymore !!:) Latest update as of 19 Mar 2016 - Had their 4 cheese pizza, ,Mediterranean pizza, veg...read more
Visited this place on 13th. Very nice place to be there, beer is good, food is good, ambience good and waiters are polite and serve you well. Good time spent and looking forward to visiting again
If you wish to host people it's the place to be. The second floor has a host called praveen. Make sure he takes care of you. Order the jumbo platter.

So, me and my friend were just passing by this place and we had a sudden craving for beer. So, we immediately decided to grab a beer before going somewhere else. The place was not that crowded, even though it was sunday evening. We ordered the seasonal beer, which was strawberry flavoured. I dont usually like beer, but this one was really good. Also, the ambience of this place was really good, quite spacious. The staff was also cordial. Next time, would like to try out other stuff on the menu as well :)

First of the Brewery in Town was The Biere Club and it was quite a while that I went there for a drink. So last weekend to beat the heat, few of our colleagues made our way to Biere Club early evening. Called Up & made reservation and the table was ready. Our gang expanded and we requested for a bigger table & we were asked to move to the second floor. After a brief hiccup & altercation we got our tables. The whole agenda for us was to try EVERY Beer. Started of with Ale & Larger, which for me were the best beers for the day. Wheat, Stout & Club Special were next in line with Club Special being the strongest of them all. It certainly lived up to the alcohol level. The beer which we...read more
Eggabomb - must have. Veg Nachos with cheese and the non veg platter is quite delicious and goes well with the drinks. I like the interiors.

Went on sunday noon as I wanted to try this brewery. Food and beer was good but the service was pathetic. We tried to call the waiters and no1 really took our orders, maybe coz we were 3 bachelors. Belgian ale, lager beer and seasonal beer all 3 beers were good. Fish and chips dish and bacon sausage are the food items we tried. Food-4.5/5 Service -0.5/5 VFM -3/5 ambiance 2/5

I had a misfortune of having gone to Biere Club on 19th March with a bunch of friends after a game of cricket! And how we reget going there !! Pathetic pathetic service, the waiters were all busy chatting amongst themselves rather than looking after the guests, even after constant reminders. Water was served after almost 3 reminders and that too only bottles were given since they could not find "glasses" to serve water into...can one imagine ? There were flies all around, no air circulation at all, the place is in a mess. This was perhaps my last trip to the Biere Club, never again I wish to step into that place. Good luck, Biere Club!

Good Biere , good food. Wonderful place to relax and enjoy. We ordered starters- some crispy corn dish, pizza and fries. Pizza was ok ok. Fries and crispy corn dish was good. Overall a good experience.
Nice interiors and good food!!! And they've some really unique cocktails! It's a great place to chill with a bunch of friends. Would go back.

What i tried : fettuccine tossed with olive oil garlic lemon chili and parsley The lightest pasta i have ever had (might be due to my lack of experience) , but it was amazing :D Great ambiance of course. Would totally visit again.

Wonderful atmosphere , prime location , awesome varieties, good service and what not ... One of my best favourites.. Wheat beer with potato wedges is what I prefer .. Do not miss mozarilla pizza... Very yummy.. If you have brought ur own vehicle, make sure u call a call driver.. Cos cops right in front with hawk eyes.. Cheers

Amazing club special beer. This is a microbrewery so the beers are brewed in house. Out of all the food that we ordered the Morrocan spicy chicken was the best. Loved it. This place is good to hangout with friends. The ambiance is nice with the outdoor seating and the service was pretty fast.

The kication is excellent and the ambience is very jolly or can say happening.my fav is wheat beer and tge stuff mushroom.the service is very good. They are very friendly. Surely be back once i m in bangalore.

We were staying in chancery pavilion hotel and this place is 10 minutes walk from there. Spread over 3 levels , they have 6 beers on tap of which only 2 were available. They charge for beer tasting which we found a bit odd considering we ordered a pitcher too. Unless you try what's on offer how does one decide? Coming back to food - it's really good. My friends has the chicken and fish options , the Mediterranean chicken is lip smacking so are the wings!! Wheat beer is good. Overall a chic and fun place to hang out!

What a wonderful place this is for beer! One of a kind brewery! 🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺 I've never had the food here so won't comment on that but this is the best place for beer lovers. My favourite one was the wheat beer they had. It's better than any other wheat I've had in the whole of Bangalore. That being said, one must call and ask them if they have wheat beer or any beer you like available before showing up. The crowd is always pouring so making prior reservations will be a good idea if you need a table. Downside of this place is the manager or whoever received me at the door ( bald grumpy guy ) was very rude, unresponsive and of no help what so ever. All that kept...read more

I often wondered what this place would be like......it has quite a reputation as Bangalore's very first Microbrewery. I was happy to finally have the chance to find out. There are so many swanky new bars and pubs in the city.....but It was good to find that the Biere Club had a simple, kind of old fashioned charm to it. We decided to sit upstairs.....the smoking part which is open on the sides. We ordered a lager and an ale, and both were good. The food, though, was just about average. We ordered the chicken wings...these were a bit soggy and there was not enough of the blue cheese sauce that accompanies it. The bacon wrapped sausages were better...I liked the mustard that went with...read more

I have always loved this place and keep going back.  The collection of beers is really great and the place has a great vibe to it. The pool table on top is added benefit and one can relax and play a few frames of pool by sipping a beer by the side. The service is prompt, the staff are friendly and also give you recommendations on which beer to choose based on your liking !

As soon as I got to know that this is the first microbrewery in south India, I simply had to visit this place. With 3 floors and a rustic ambience, this place is a great option for beer lovers. The ground floor is pretty quite compared to the upper floors, where we have Foosball and pool (playing these is even better when you are high! ;) ) Their beer was decent. We tried their wheat and blonde, along with nachos, fries, chicken wings and chilli chicken, and weren't disappointed. All in all a good hangout place if you want to try a new brewery and haven't been to this one.

Biere club, I like you for your cozy informal ambience, and your friendly staff. Your food was alright, but the beer was better. I strolled in on a Sat night and it turned out to be a good night. That's a lot of space you've got in there, and maybe I'll come back with more friends and try the Karaoke bar upstairs. Thank you for a great experience!

Following a new trend is something quite common these days in every city and partying late nights on Friday and Saturday’s are becoming a mandatory duty for most of the folks in the town. In Bangalore, it’s restricted to 1am at most of the pubs & restaurants, but people still go home and party with friends till morning! I have so many friends who do that every weekend. Read full post on https://naveensuresh3.wordpress.com/2016/04/04/ring-in-your-sunday-with-the-weekend-hangover-breakfast-at-biere-club/

The location and look of the place is very cozy and inviting. We found the beer to be very average. We sampled all 6 beers and decided to settle for a glass of ale and lager. The stout could be creamier and the wheat ale and weizzen bock could also be better. We ordered nachos with refried beans and the nachos tasted like Doritos at the end. That was a disappointment. The staff was very friendly and the service was prompt.

We were bar hopping and reached here in the end. Their beer options were quite decent, open air seating was amazing in the bangalore weather and the pool table was entertaining along with their music which was not too catchy. Maybe another time I will have a better experience.

Went to this place with great expectations. Tried Belgium beer - good, stout - good, Ale - good. Tried potatoes wedges - salty & pathetic, worst one ever tried. Ordered twice though by mistake, and they didn't cancel order. Nachos was good - veg. But will still rate bad due to customer service. Can't cancel potato wedges, that's pathetic. Will not come here again but people who enjoy beer should try the place. Can't rate for service as when I am drunk don't like no for an answer when I am paying. Will not visit this place until someone else is paying. But those guys need to learn customer service. SAD.
Nice place. Good relaxing ambience, though the music was a loud considering that we went at 6 in the evening. Beers were decent with very reasonable pricing.

The place is buzzing in evening as well. We visited at around 5 and the place had startEd to get busy. The beer choice selection is good with on the house beers as well as selection of good cocktails And mocktails. I would think the waiters could be better be aware of the menu. Strangely the veg good platter was more exciting as compared to non veg

I don't drink so my review may be a little out of place here, besides the fact that a lot of people don't seem to care for food at a pub. Being the foodie that I am, I will say that this place serves up some fantastic food, and the first time was so great that I went back for more yummy food, and wasn't disappointed in the slightest. Their pizzas are very well-made, although the caramelized onions seemed extremely sweet. The mutton pepper and fish & chips are absolutely divine (they use frozen Basa though, sadly). Even the ambiance, staff, and service is very very nice, the fish and chips presentation blew me away. Will definitely be coming back for more in the near future.

I have been to Biere Club only on a couple of occasions but this place never ceases to fail my expectations what with its amazing beer and great ambience. So, the last time we went there, we started off by ordering the Ale, Wheat Mojito – so so, Moves Like Jager – although if it was even as half as rocking as its legendary rocker namesake it would have been awesome but average otherwise and the Mock Biere – five stars for innovation as for a moment even I was fooled into thinking it was beer. So, with drinks on the table can food be far behind? For starters, we had the assorted fries (good presentation but the fries everywhere taste the same to me). In this context, I have to...read more

One of the most classy places in one of the most classy location. This place has got nice amount of seatings, built on three floors. The interior is pretty and well built. They have pool table , foos ball table , playing which we had lot of fun. The home-brewed beer is quite nice. Food was nice but service is something they should work on improving. The turnaround time to get the order is high and staff is not really courteous. But overall a good place.

This place featured in the  microbreweries collection of Zomato, so we decided to give it a try. Ambiance: 3/5 The 3 storeyed building looks quite welcoming from the outside with a neat look and lights decorating the outer periphery of the balconies. It has a large seating capacity so we managed to find a place even on the crowded Saturday Bangalore night. The inside has a pretty laid back feel and looks like the kind of place where you can easily hang out with friends. You can kill hours here sipping beer esp. on the middle floor which has a pool table and foosball table. Food & Drinks: 2.5/5 The taste, portion size and presentation of the food was decent. What disappointed us was the...read more

Lounging comfortably, amidst an ambience bearing a stark likelihood to the colonial era and with vats of beer being brewed, you can't help but impetuously embrace the vibe of the place. The ale here is my favourite. Thoroughly in line with my surmisal of ale. The chilly coriander spicy chicken goes swimmingly with some good beer. Tremendously spicy, but not overwhelming, tender chicken; certainly an ardent companion of the humble beer. The lamb kibbeh sliders were quite disappointing. I've had good kibbeh only once before. Everyone seems to fail at infusing some nice flavour into them. The kibbeh were pretty dry and as mentioned before, didn't pack enough punch. The Indian lamb seekh...read more +1 Photo(s)

I went there twice so far and it was okay I heard the beers are good since I m not a beer person and I don't drink so I really can't comment on that . But my friends liked the place. I had ordered for a non-veg platter am not sure about the name though . But it was good.

Definitely on the decline. The first microbrewery in Bangalore if I recall right but a far cry from its heyday. Ambience has deteriorated significantly. Food was barely palatable with burned veggies. Hard to get the attention of the staff. Air-conditioning on the hot day was well below par. The beer menu was stopped down but quite good still. Not going back there anytime soon.

Mujhe peene ka shauk nahi,peeti hu brewery jaane ko... This place has 6 different kind of breweries(mostly fruity,I felt)(check d photo i hav submitted to know the kinds) Must try: Hefe Weizen, British brown ale and tropical stout You can avoid: cucumber coriander beer(it tastes like cucumber water) Seating: A/c on ground floor while airy one on first floor. Parking: ample(valet parking) Music:love it Plus point: snooker table on first floor Staff: friendly and well versed with menu(4/5)

Went yesterday for a school reunion hang out. Nice place and good location. The beers were awesome and snacks yummy. No complaints on beers. But faced two issue. The staff in not keen to help a wheelchair bound customer . They seem reluctant and had to ask them repeatedly to help. This was irritating to me. Second there are no ramps so it's not completely wheelchair friendly.

My friend who is new to Bangalore and he had this urge to try out the breweries here ! In his short span of stay here, he had already been to many such places and our search for places which both of us haven't been to made us zero in to this place. The Biere Club has the reputation of being the oldest brewery in business and it certainly does live up to it's name. The ambience has a certain old charm to it like those of the Scottish pubs. My friend who loves beer tasted all the beers and settled for a Stout and Ale as he loved their texture and taste while I settled for a decent cocktail to beat the heat- the Mojito. We ordered a bucket of French fries and the classic Alfredo for the...read more +5 Photo(s)

The best prew place in town😍 I love how this place offers various kinds of brew beer which left me surprised because they were amazing😍 The food was good as well. The space above provides a beautiful view . Beer for life 🍺 Cheers🍻

A fine place at a really good price at Lavelle road...the place got a good ambience and the open air place is good for pool(game) lovers. The food variety is good with some really nice beer stuffs...do try out the lemonade beer cocktail..though it's a light but taste is good. +6 Photo(s)
Went to this place for a friend's birthday...the ambience was good and so was the food..what went wrong was the service..the staff was very rude which kind of spoiled the mood..

Nice location. Excellent wheat beer. Nothing special about the finger food. Visited multiple times only for their signature wheat beer. Well maintained with 2floors. Most of the time visited during weekdays, but I believe bookings are required over the weekends.

You can't beat the location and the fact that they serve draught and variety of craft beers. The ambience is tasteful, staff friendly. Food - just ordered bar snacks but pretty boring fry-em-ups, like one of those privilege lounges at the airport.

I dunno why but when I had gone there with a couple of friends, we got a table near the entrance and the place smelt like shoe (as in the stinky sweaty kinds).I had the wheat beer and loved they glass wear. My friend was a quite a fan of their coasters as well that she flicked them off :PA mundane experience in a costly neighborhood for me.

Beer Lovers Paradise! It's true what they say, "Beer makes everything better". Located down the road from UB City, it's a wooden structure of sorts that's sure to catch your eye. Step in and you're deafened for a moment, I still can't figure out why, this place has no loud music, but it's just extremely loud, you would in and all you hear is blah here, blah there, to me just blabber. I still haven't figured out why though? Does something about the place make people talk louder? Or maybe it could be one extremely loud speaker and everybody else in the room trying to speak louder than him. Hmm I'll leave this discussion for my next visit. My Take: 1. Interior - 4.0 /5 2. Ambience - 4.0 /5 3. Service - 4.5/5( Really good service, Impressed)  4. Menu- 4.0/5 5. Food Taste - 4.0/5 6. Presentation of Food - 3.5 /5 7. Being one of the very first brewery in Bangalore, they have definitely set the trend, and believe me they are still up-to the mark till date. This was just another regular brewery with an average ambience average food. 4 varieties of brewed beer on the menu and there was a scarcity of veg options. So if you are a vegetarian then be prepared accordingly. Mushroom cheese ball was good of among the lot and others were regular in taste.
Located at the corner of the street with full building dedicated to brewery and food. Brewed beer quality is ok but not that great if compared to other breweries of bangalore

Wonderful Place for craft beer at a wonderful location near UB City mall. The crowd is fantastic and so is the ambiance. The atmosphere is awesome. Coming to their service, a very courteous and prompt staff. The food and drinks are wonderful too.
Nyc ambience...especially the tall chairs at the corner... The food was great.. Love to visit again...
Good place. Awesome ambience. They need to learn to make " Bloody Mary " though. It was so watery. HATED IT. Minus that, decent food, good options and yeah, wheat beer is genius :-)

Went out with a few colleagues on a Friday night.. The ambience is pretty good, had their wheat beer which was good, for food had the non veg platter which was pretty good as well as the Onion rings.. Good place to hang out with friends on weekends... Slightly heavier on the pocket..

I went there this Saturday night. By the time I reached there, it wasn't that crowded but after 15 minutes a crowd poured in. Happy that we came earlier. We had a pitcher of wheat beer and Chicken Salami and caramelized onion pizza. The pizza wasn't as expected. Very sweet and bland in seasoning. On the other hand, the beer was amazing. One of the best wheat beers I've ever tasted in Bangalore. We had a blueberry cheesecake post that. It was horribly portioned for the amount they charge for it. Nice place to hang out with friends. They have three level sitting. Nice brewery on this road. We just had drinks this time. Didn't had any snacks , but I can say must go place with friends to enjoy beer.

I visited this place on my birthday which made my birthday really special. Beer was the best thing happened to me here. I tried khus khus with basa one of the tastiest food, I still have the taste in my mind, quick service and amazing ambiance

We had made a reservation at Bierre Republic but our maps landed us to The Biere Club. It was Friday night and crowd was high everywhere. A great place to hang out, serving some good beer and grub. After tasting all the beers, we liked stout and lager the most, the former being the best. Also had the bacon wrapped sausages which were obviously awesome, cz what could possibly go wrong with that!

Was searching for a place to spend a saturday evening with friends, then found this on zomato and decided to go here seeing the reviews. We booked a table in advance , though we could not make on time but still got a table in 10 minutes. Their staff is very good, service is quick too. Not a beer lover i tried wheat mojito which was nice. My friends liked wheat beer. After trying their samplers. The ambience is nice, nice atmosphere. Coming to the food everything i tried veg or nonveg was really nice. Cheesy garlic mushrooms were nice, veg seekh kabab i liked them. I tried something corn curd on their menu which i didnt like too much . It was sweet. I tried pineapple cocktail which was...read more

Ambience was good at he biere club. But the food was not up to the mark. We ordered chicken Nachos, onion rings and pork sausages platter. The Nachos were not baked. It seemed the Nachos are bought from a supermarket and toppings were added to it. The chicken was not grilled on the Nachos. Onion rings lacked the proper amount of salt. Pork chops were good. But quantity was less for 900 bucks. Overall not so great experience with food. The beer that we chose, "RCB Ale" was the best part of the night. Nice beer with great taste.

Visited on one of the most unusual times to visit, which is on a thursday noon ! We were greeted inside warmly and the ambiance was good; it can be great for you if you are into rock music and sports. Both the food and beverages menu is really extensive and the waiters are receptive to any customization. I would give a special mention to the beverages including the mocktails and juices which can just make your day ! Must visit place,esp if you have a large group !
Perfect location ! Great beer and food The ambience is great the staff is well trained and friendly . The food is well presented . The varieties of beer is worth the money
Awesome seasonal beer (mango). The beer was well crafted and great to taste. Had ordered a paneer tikka, which was good. The place is just ultimate with good crowd.

We went here on a Saturday night. Other places around do not allow people wearing floaters footwear of in shorts / 3 4ths, but no such thing here. We once sat over the bar on the ground floor and once at a table on the top floor. The ambiance is good, it shows a healthy atmosphere of merry people. It is spread over three floors. Coming to food, we ordered the Chicken Nachos - when it was served to us there were plain nachos on it with very little cheese and chicken. Good Ale. Good Ambience. Good service. I'd definitely recommend the seasonal Mango ale, even if you're not fond of mangoes. This one tastes especially nice with subtle hints of mango. The Stout ale is a good choice as well. We were lucky enough to win a free mug (courtesy, guess the countries!). The food was somehow lacking.

One of the first places I visited when I was in Bangalore. Quite a loud place, but good music, food is awesome and so are the drinks. Slightly on the expensive side. But if you want to chill out with your friends its a place thats a must visit. I loved the staff here who are absolutely cool despite the crazy rush over the weekend. Ambiance: 4/5 Food:5/5 Drinks:3.5/5 Service/4/5 Value for money:3.5/5
Great place lovely crowd great food ,full of energy only thing was this place is over priced, and that is what counts at the end of the day...music was ok staff was generous

Well weekends are never complete without this lovely place...Fond of it for its English style of ambience.. I tried the ale and the lager and both were good...I personally preferred the ale.. Also ordered coriander chicken, French fries, veg nachos, Spinach pizza, Fish in lemon sauce and hummus.. Chicken was soft, cooked in coriander, garlic and pepper in Chinese style...They have introduced Honey Nutmeg recently..I recommend everyone of you guys to try this one...it's top notch! A special mention about Rajat who is always so humble and provides the best service to us everytime..

It was a Barley day for us! Soaked in barley based draught beer the entire noon till rain clad evening! We were literally reeking of beer all over and being a beer lover,enjoyed the stench myself! We walked straight to the top,noticeably wooden stairs! High rise revolving chairs,view,walls adorned with Harley gear,beer all this culminated to pretty nice evening! Praveen played the nice host,was always on the reach! Pizza was flat on the pan,had to scrape it, yet was delicious! I would recommend this for a beer lover and me being an avid driver,valet parking came to rescue for my car to find a spot to park!
I love the stout there. The bar counter is great. The upper floors aren't that interesting. The service is okay. However the brewed beers and finger food are very nice.

This place holds a special significance for me as this was the first microbrewerry I visited in Bangalore. I am told that it's one of the oldest as well, but not sure of that. Spread over three floors in the heart of big money Bangalore, it definitely qualifies as a hotspot. The darker beers are especially good. And then things go south. The food is way below par for a place this famous. The ambience is average and apart from the afore-mentioned dark beer, nothing much can qualify as exceptional. So an okay place to visit. But not worth the hype you'll have heard about it.

One of my fav place to go. I love the ambience, interiors, location and the energy of this place. Staff is courteous and always busy 😆😆😆. One thing u must not miss is the beer tasting. They have a great collection. They introduced Mango beer too for the season Wow thought this is only for the dessert👍👍but it's on a sweeter side so careful if u really want it. Try their club special it's strong. Other flavors to try Ale and wheat. Depends on ur choice. Food - Morocco spice chicken and sundries tomatoes, mushroom and goat cheese - good You can also try their pasta 😊😊

This place has a charm about it that is hard to find in many of the other breweries out there in the city. You can enjoy your drink, chill and listen to good music and the staff is good as well. Been there a couple of times, always had a good time. Perfect place to hangout with friends, decent crowd too.

On sunday however, we had plans of visiting another place on St. Marks road, but there was no parking available and we decided to try out biere club. Lucky us!. Ordered for a mango beer and a pommegranate martini. Both were spot on and worth a mention. I was pleasantly surprised when a beer sampler (pic below) arrived on my table which made my choice easier. For a place named as The Biere Club, I felt the beer was average. Stout was not stout enough and Lager not brown enough, I have never been a big Ale guy. A place that has maintained its level of service and quality and beer. Amazing. Nice place, combines both indoor and outdoor use. You have to try their seasonal flavoured beer. A must visit.

This place is among the best breweries in town. I particularly like their stout and the seasonal Mango beer that they brew. The Mango beer is warmly refreshing and one of the best things I've had this summer. I usually walk down from office to this place to have a beer or two, and this place never disappoints. Their food is quite costly, though. That's kinda acceptable, given that they are on Lavelle road, which is one of the most swanky neighbourhoods in town. The place is quite happenibg and the ambiance is good.as we were seated right next to the counter we also got to watch our drinks bieng fixed. And thier handcrafted beer was much liked by friends.
Amazing beer options and the chicken dishes we tried were also great. Perfect evening. I liked the concept of tasters wherein we are given samples of all beers and then order according to our taste

Place is fine, Ambiance was good, Brew Beer was only Highlight & USP for this place.Must go place if you want to have some quality time with Beer & friends. Service was fast & waiter response proactively.

Best micro brewery in Bangalore(probably India) The beers are amazing, especially draft and wheat beer. Spirits range is good. Non Veg platter is quite good. Chicken popcorn are served in old style popcorn cone .Pizzas are also decent Service is good , staff is well trained. Friday and Sat evening is difficult to get table esp on 1& 2nd Floor. Don't miss this place for experience or search of best beer in bangalore.

Posh, well located, great beer and amazing food. I think this is the best placed brewery in Bangalore. I love going to this place. The ambience rocks. I think this place really doesn't need you to read reviews. It's like a must go to place in Bangalore.

Great pub food. Beer Batter Onion Rings were amazing. The Hummus and Fries were good too. Not a drinker, but people I went with enjoyed the wheat beer. The LIIB had polarised views, but the ones that liked it said they enjoyed it a lot. The place is not too expensive as well. The ambiance is great as well, especially on the rooftop. Overall, a great pub to hang out, even for non-drinkers. Ambiance: 4.5/5 Service & Staff: 5/5 Food: 4/5 Value for Money: 4/5

One of the earliest microbreweries in Bangalore, its always been a good experience to enjoy the craft beer there. The Belgian wheat varieties were both smooth and nice. While the food menu may look inadequate, each of the dishes are definitely lip smacking. The grilled chicken and cheese nachos & chettinad style grilled prawns were delicious while the assorted imported cheese platter with nuts and grape sauce was different but tasty especially if you are a chhese lover. The only disappointment was a bland beef taco with Korean BBQ sauce. Service is efficient and the place noisy but relaxed

Visited this place to attend a standup comedy show. This place hosts several such events. Post which we a good meal pizzas pasta some mocktails. They ran out of pizzas towards the end of our meal. Nevertheless great food! Impressive and lavish ambiance.

Ambience - 5.0 Music - 4.0 Crowd - 5.0 Beer - 4.5 Choice of Cocktails/Mocktails - 4.0 Finger food - 4.0 Price - 3.5 Me and my cousins are frequent visitors to this place and it has never failed to delight us. It is like an old faithful place. Whenever we want to hangout no other dependable place for good time than "The Biere Club". Most of their beer flavours are good. Definitely a must go place for crafted beers. Their Pizzas are thin crust and wood fried do try one of those. Jalapeño Cheese nachos is yummy.

Good place to hang out even though it is a bit expensive. The beer is pretty good and I liked the dark Ale a lot. It doesn't have too much for food though. We yried to order some food but found out that they were not available. Thankfully whatever they had was well made and we gobbled it up with the beers. Ambience is nice with a huge cartoon mural on one side. Makes it a bright atmosphere. No live band was playing that day, unfortunately. Servers are relatively prompt and sometimes we did have to look around for them to rake our order. Overall a good place to chill out, enjoy a draught and have fun.

A pleasant discovery since I stayed at Melange,close by. A wonderful place for beer and good food. Prajwal is an asset to this nice restaurant. you must ask for him. He is very helpful in guiding you through the menus. The steaks are great and so are there home brewed beers.

Nice place! Tried wheat beer which was fine. The food was really good. I enjoyed their chicken baked nachos and bbq platter (don't remember the name properly but it was some platter with sausages and all meat stuff) the most. Service is pretty slow. I've been here many times and all the times I have noticed this. We literally had to go and ask them to come to our table for order. Need to improve service otherwise it's a good place.

I just loved the place !! 😘 ambience n the kindness in serving Ll make u feel like it's ur home ! 😂 beer was really awesome n very good ! 😍u even get pitchers over der so u can save a bit of money !😂😂

Went there with a group of five....place was packed but somehow after waiting 10 min we got a table......decor is good, service is fine,food is overrated & expensive but the brewed beer were awesome....so yeah, visit this place only for the beer and maybe skip the food...it was too expensive for their quality.
Superb place to go even with a child. Not on weekend though. The waiters there throughly looked after my daughters special menu with a superb drink too.

I am big fan of brewed beers and I love the ale it's pretty amazing. The food was also good,I like the non-veg platter. They have good crowds of weekends most of the days it's pretty full. The service and value for money is not completely there but these kind of places can't provide u with Everything u need. I would recommend this palace for any beer lovers and also a good place to hangout for a drink.

Must say this is one of the best brewery in bangalore. In spite of it being oldest in the city yet it ranks number 1 when compared to other breweries. And the concept of INDIAN THALI is something worth and pocket friendly. And to add on Apple cyrup mixed with beer with lime is one of the best I have ever had til date, to add on chesse nachos and spicy mushroom is must try. Staffs over here are well trained and friendly too.

The Biere Club is (i think) Bangalore's first microbrewery and it had been on my radar for a long while. Finally visited on a weekday afternoon and was pleased to find that only a few tables were occupied. I liked the ambience - it has an old-fashioned rustic feel that reminded me of Bangalore's early pubs : it even smelt a bit like these old institutions! We decided to sit upstairs since it is open on the sides and it was nice to watch the world rush by at this busy intersection while we sipped our beers. The brewed beers we tried were all quite good. The food, however, left us feeling extremely disappointed. we ordered the hummus with assorted chips, crispy chicken wings, Chettinad...read more

Die find the food too good ... May be a it was bland for a north punjabi like me :) ... The ambience is nice, music was good ... Nothing much to talk about drinks. We ordered veg platter, but most of the items were pretty bland. Obviously it's costly, given the place it is at.
One of the most under rated places in Bangalore. Brilliant ambiance good food and a microbrewery. . This place has it all. A must visit place in Whitefield.
Beer is Fantastic!! Think they have a new brewer. Could keep the place a bit cleaner though and food is all right. I will go back again for the beer.

Food - 4 - Had the non-veg platter and it deserves a word of appreciation Drinks - 5- The wheat beer is the lightest smoothest yummiest beer that i have had (personal opinion) Ambiance - 3 - The seating is far apart and music is fine.
Good brewery! Have heard about it a lot... When tasted liked it More!! Must visit once... Nice place to chill... Though food is good it's a little expensive
Good place for beer and good snacks. Centrally located and walking distance from UB city. Enjoyed my evening with friends here and chicken wings and nachos were a good try

Fabulous interiors, perfectly located at the corner of lavelle road. This place might be famous for theia' freshly brewed beers buh oops, I don't drink! I dined in here with mi colleagues a couple of times when we sat down the entire evening, them drinking n me hogging on theia' freshly baked thin crust pizzas! Delicious they were! Loved the ambience, finger food and ya theia' amazingg pizzas!!
The beers have improved over the last 5 years and it is good . The service and the food  is good and the music not too loud.  Overall a good hangout throughout the day.

The Bierre club is on the beautiful lavelle road, which somehow really reminds me of places around Juhu. Located on the posh Vittal Mallya road, this place is teeming with an up market but fun crowd. I went there after a hectic day of work, for about an hour. It is like a pub with a brewery, so you have all the liquor options and some of the brewed beer. They had 6/7 options and we chose to go for the Plis Lite and Wheat Beer pitchers. Teamed it with some of their chicken platter; and the evening was sweet.

Biere club is a hotspot for Sunday breakfast after Sunday night hard party. That's why they named it as Hangover breakfast. As per the need, they planned the menu and they planned it well. Visited their outlet with some of my foodie friends. Where we got to taste the English breakfast with some light beer and played the snooker as well. The pancake with maple syrup is a killer. You must try it after the Saturday nights hard party. Bon Appetite @Chef BB

If Bangalore is a kingdom of breweries, then undoubtedly Biere Club be the king ! Ale is my all time favourite beer, which is mild unlike their other offerings. Tried Chicken pizza and Chicken Nachos, pizza was good but Nachos didn't meet the expectation Have been thrice to this place but never got a seat anytime, but the courteous staff will try to arrange some alternative. To my surprise every time I order in crowd and they get you served and it was never a miss On Weekends don't expect a place to sit and fully crowded.

I had been here for a friend's bachelor party. I don't think there's anything special about this place except the fact that that it's situated at Lavelle Road. They have put up some decent posters here and there. I wish they had done the same with the food because it's horridly mediocre. Brew is just okay. You can get better brew at other places which are not so expensive. Also, the place is loud. Kills the vibes.

Food: Only had beers, and they've got a good variety. Wheat tasted mild and smoothest while stout stood out among all. Lager and Ale were bang for buck. Service: The staff served. We requested for some lowering of speaker volume but were denied the luxury. Ambiance: The music is loud, so one will have to speak louder. Bad choice if you're there for a meet up and/or hold a conversation. Lighting is moderate, catchy decor. Must Try: Beers for now, stout maybe?

The Biere club is one of the finest microbreweries I have encountered. They undoubtedly serve you the finest, top notch craft beers. If you cannot choose, always ask for the sampler. We went for the ale and the lager and they were just perfect. Also surprisingly they had happy hours (1+1) going on and the steward really helped us throughout our order. I also tried a beer cocktail, the Biere Moscow mule with ginger ale which was an absolute delight. The fries are actually an assortment of regular & spiced ones and wedges and some mayo to go with served in a cute red bucket. And also check out the Indian/work lunches they serve at reasonable prices. The only disappointment was they did not...read more

We have no complaints about the service. Even during a rush hour like that, they managed to keep their customers happy...a reason to come back here again and again. We tried their Ale beer and the Mock Biere with some potato wedges. Both the drinks were good. It goes well with the starters. We didn't get a chance to stay for long !!! Both the food and beverages menu is really extensive and the waiters are receptive to any customization. I would give a special mention to the beverages including the mocktails and juices which can just make your day !!!!

One of the classy breweries in Bangalore. I love their ambience. Freshly brewed beers and amazing ones too that's what they are mainly known for. It's a tad bit formal in setting. But nonetheless very well located and swift service. The staff is polite and it's a good place to have a couple of beers and a conversation with a friend or two.

This place quite well known amongst Bangaloreans..an awesome place to hang around with friends..and catch up on memories over a glass of freshly brewed beer.. special mention of there wheat and ale beers..will definitely try the stout on the next visit.. Cheers 🍺

AFAIK Biere Club was the first microbrewery in Bangalore. It still is the best. The rest are but pretenders to the throne! An alternative setting, combined with well priced, delicious beer and free pool makes them the clear winner. Also, unlike other microbreweries, it's not full of the mainstream crowd, allowing for plenty of breathing space and ample elbow room.
Good beer and ambience. But only wheat beer seems good, others are not that good tasting. Food is average though. Can visit once. Good location though, very close to lot of other places.
Amazing lager. The pork sausage platter should not be missed. Same for the bacon wrapped sausages. The nachos were ok. Chicken popcorn was average. Great music

Awesome !!!!!!! all the beers , food especially the mushroom and fries..... ambiance , Value for money..... a group of friends and the biere club is one of the best combinations you can enjoy.... try wheat and ale specially.... good and always ready to be here......
Good place but smaller than the white field one. Food and verities are superb. The hospitality was awesome .The location near UB city is an addition to it. A must try place.
This place was really cool and felt awesome about it. The beer they served was very nice and the cocktail i had was really amazing. And the food was good too! Would be visiting this place again!

I am just disappointed since the place has great potential and is not not delivering at the level it's supposed to. I would love to...read more

Off late, with my extending love for breweries and hence, craft beers, and on realizing I haven't been to the first ever microbrewery in South India, I found myself here on a Friday noon. I liked the first floor seating much better than the ground floor; For, the two seater tables by the railings overlook the streets across. Running a brewery is no easy task and achieving this to perfection continuously from five years is a commendable job. *Pat on the back* to the folks who are responsible to keep this place lively at all times. Located in the prime locality of Lavelle road, this place serves one of the best crafted beers in town. The ambience is spacious and has a rustic look. Specifically during weekend evenings you can see luxurious cars speeding in the Lavelle road when you're seated in first floor here and oh boy! What a sight for car lovers like me. We had ordered crafted beer ofcourse, apart from that White Wine Sangria and vodka as well for us ladies. we also ordered a lot of food , veg and non veg platter, mushroom cheese pizza, chicken nuggets , nachos and the list was long as we were starving. Taste was great!!!!

Lovely ambience!! The pizzas aren't great but the nonveg platter the Mexican chicken does the deal!! The beers are amazing! Going everytime- sampling round followed by the done deal pitchers of the same till your found sitting outside at closing time!! Lovely place

I am big fan of brewed beers and I love the ale it's pretty amazing. The food was also good,I like the non-veg platter. They have good crowds of weekends most of the days it's pretty full.  I would recommend this palace for any beer lovers and also a good place to hangout for a drink. Great pub food. Beer Batter Onion Rings were amazing. The Hummus and Fries were good too. Not a drinker, but people I went with enjoyed the wheat beer. The LIIB had polarised views, but the ones that liked it said they enjoyed it a lot. The place is not too expensive as well. The ambiance is great as well, especially on the rooftop. Overall, a great pub to hang out, even for non-drinkers.

Located at one of the prime locations this place is one my best places i visited in Bangalore. Some great food options and brewed beer, they have a comfortable sitting. With a pool table you can play against the people there, and if you win then you can play there endlessly for hours for free. Ordered mexican chilli chicken and a pitcher of wgeat beer, both were amazing.

Chose this place to hangout with my best buddies yesterday. I have never been to a micro brewery before. It was an absolute pleasure being here and loved every moment. We went here around 9 PM and it was chalk a block. We had no hesitation in sitting at bar tending counter as it gave the best possible view of whats happening. This place has really got great vibes and makes you feel good. Coming to drinks we had their lager which tasted amazing not like the usual drought beer you get it was something different and very good. We also tried their beer sampler having 5 different beers which was quite an experience. Coming to food we tried their veg nachos which was one of the best I had...read more

This is a very cool place. Good food and good drinks. It's a brewery and the beers they serve are pretty good. It is not that expensive as compared to other places in that area. It's very big, I think like 3 floor or so, and hence has lots of place to sit.

Place definitely attracts a good crowd. But the table was mood killer nd speaker beside it was nt working too. Very limited option of craft beer. Food is decent though and yes,four cheese pizza is my personal favorite. Service is fast and waiters are very friendly too. So mixed experience , average rating. Must say other biere republic is much better in comparison.

We went to this place on a Sunday afternoon The place was not very crowded... The beer especially the wheat beer needs to be tasted... We order for chicken nachos...and they were worth the money ... The service was quick and the food was served on time... Must a visit for all d beer lovers !!!
We went there on a Friday afternoon 4 of us friends .... everyone must try the wheat beer and their brilliant pizzas ... overall great experience

Wonderful beers and wonderful time with frds....we just had beer beers n more beers cos that's what this place is all about. Fully crowded but we managed to sneak in and get good place cos of Kannada lover whom I spoke to in his language and he fell for it and did all the best service he possibly could. He made us drink n drink more. We enjoyed quiet a lot. Excellent memory

The Biere Club one of the finest brewery in bengaluru so decide go and enjoy with my bestfriends. We arrived at the place around 9pm and it was jampacked not a single place to sit. So we decided to stand at corner and enjoy our drinks till we find a place to sit. We ordered ale and wheat beer, ale was super wheat was good. In food we went for fries and chilli ground lamb mince pizza with ginger and yogurt which looked like an interesting option. Fries were ok pizza was good. Muzik and service was good too. All in all a good place to hangout with friends.

I had been to Biere Club couple of times but my last visit was definitely the best maybe because i just ordered all the right dishes & drinks. Ambience-4/5 Staff-2.5/5 Food-4/5 I visited the Biere Club for a Saturday brunch and I must say it was a very good decision. The food was lip smacking but the service was very slow, we had to remind 2-3 times for our basic order- Nachos & Margarita Pizza. The service did make my visit not as memorable. The beer is one of the tastiest in Bangalore (or as my drunkard friends said). Even at 3 in the afternoon, it was decently occupied with all good crowd. Upgrade the service part and I'd surely drop by for another visit.
Good place on the corner, and crowded, food was good and good ambience, bit loud music. had ordered nachos, which was good in taste. Loved the food served and the drinks offered.

A excellent place where they brew their own beer...comes in flavours of chocolate,rice,wheat to name a few... A good themed restaurant with in house projector TV. The food is excellent,thanks to the chef and service is very courteous and quick. A meal for 2 without drinks costs Rs 1000/- and is worth it.Parking available Must visit pub folks😄

A landmark of sorts, this place was in vogue  when it initially opened some years ago,  until other breweries and micro breweries sprung up. Known for its crafted beers, this place has space and something to offer to everyone - families, couples,  office goers, pub crawlers. It's hard not to find place in this three floors club. The interiors are warm with solid wooden furniture,  long bar counters, a view overlooking Vittal Malya road and a host of food & drinks options to choose from. I am not a very big fan of beer so don't know if I should review this place. But honestly speaking I didn't quite like the ambience and the overall appeal of this place. Ordered onion rings for starters and that was pathetic to taste. So much so, that we ended up having nothing else. I mean if you go wrong with onion rings what else can you go right with? Still, the day was salvaged by the nearby sodabottleopenerwalla. Would anytime suggest a toit or a vapor oven this. :/

One of the good Microbreweries place in Bangalore. Nice ambience and the staff is good in recommending as per the customer needs. And the starters are good and unique. Not the regular starters at other places, I personally liked the cheesy garlic mushrooms with beetroot sauce. Platters would be worth over individual starters and light on pocket too.

One of the halts during a pub-crawl on MG Road/Lavelle Road. They have excellent brewed beer options. Service is quite good too [even during peak hours!]. I'm a regular here as it's located bang opposite my office. So majority of our evening office parties are here. The good: The beer of course ( English Porter and Belgian Ale), Chicken Popcorn and the Fries. The Not so good : Have tried the pizzas here only one time - was below average and most of the time strong brews aren't available. All in all a great watering hole for the evenings ! Cheers!

Great beers. One the best tasting microbrewery around. Food quality and taste is below average though. A great place for casual hangout. Recommend.
Nice and good place for evening parties and dine in. Ambience and service is very good but if came late you may end up with a long queues...

Well I must say that they have the best brewed beer in Bangalore. I have been to a lot of brewery's but the Bierce club has the beat brewed beer or I must say their ale beer is just too good. Food is good but they can still add few Asian starters especially they can add few more vegetarian Asian starters. I loved their chicken Caesar salad. Very good ambience and service is quick. It is a must try for a beer lover.

This place is impressive be it the food or the staff, it's an must visit. They even have pool table which is awesome! Had being here for an office party and it was a great experience. Will visit again for sure. Keep up the good work guys.

Good place for quick hangout. Brew beer is good, English and Ale tastes good. They may have different flavors which changes often pls ask for it. There is a Pool Table for your additional timepass wish is always occupied 😊 if you wanna play don't just stand there looking at faces, go write your name on black board 😋 Good service and decent food.

One of the good Microbreweries place in Bangalore. Nice ambience and the staff is good in recommending as per the customer needs. And the starters are good and unique. Not the regular starters at other places, I personally liked the cheesy garlic mushrooms with beetroot sauce. We also tried their beer sampler having 5 different beers which was quite an experience. Coming to food we tried their veg nachos which was one of the best I had anywhere else and pizza was sort of average. This is not a budget pub so the prices are bit high but a place definitely worth a visit and am already planning one more visit when I get back to India again.
Great place, awesome choice of fresh beer (nice wheat beer)... however I spotted a rat inside the pub which has put me off. Hope they fix this issue asap

IN SEARCH OF B33R... WE LANDED HERE.. Frankly I loved the place with there pretty ample place of sitting both ground and a floor above. Went to this place after hearing so much about it but did not end up enjoying myself. The beer was good (which is what the 3.0 is for ) but I was particularly unhappy with the food and the service. The portions are small or mismatched (too much humus , too little pita bread). The place does not seem to believe in presenting the food well. The service was quite slow too.

The Biere Club is full of life and is guaranteed to lift your spirits in more ways than one. Bengaluru's oldest microbrewery, the outlet has consistently maintained high standards over the years. There are black boards placed in each floor which give details of craft beer including their alcohol content, which makes selecting the one of your choice easy. We skipped the stout and sampled all the lighter beers and found them to be top class. You could also try their shandies. During previous visits I have quite enjoyed the pizzas and kababs. This time, we had a platter which had different kinds of meat. If you happen to be here on a rainy day ask for seating in the semi-covered area...read more

Love the beer and the woodsy ambience and the food is pretty damn awesome! It's one of the few places where you can smoke and drink at the table, which could be a put off for many people. I've been there only once but it was enough for me to form a brilliant opinion about the place. I'm definitely visiting again!!

I was driving around the town with my spouse and brother in law; and the men wanted a drink; and we just chanced to spot this place. For beer lovers the place would make them feel like a kid in a candy store. However foodies would not get disappointed either. The food options are endless. As the men nursed their beer, I nibbled on their all day breakfast platter along with virgin mojito. The food was very nice and so was the plating.

Atmosphere was nice, beer was decent and we had good company, just really really disappointed in the staff. They were terrible, they have absolutely no respect for the patrons, let's down the whole establishment. Shame on you guys!

The Biere Club has a great selection of craft beer, and special mention has to be made of the wheat beer and the ale. The food is pretty great too, especially the chicken nachos (not too many places add guacamo, so that's also a plus). The pub is in a brilliant area, so accessibility is no issue. All in all, it's a great place to go relax with a couple of beers, especially since it won't make a hefty dent on your wallet

A couple of my friends took me to this place for a very late lunch on a weekend. This place is brilliant on a rainy day. We tried the wheat beer and chicken salami and caramelised onion pizza (refer to the picture), grilled smoked chicken pizza, nachos and mushroom cheese poppers. And let me tell you, all were so filling and yummy! This is one of the best places for a beer lover. Oh yes, they do have a pool table and the crowd is pretty good :) Last but not the least, amazing service!

Here, Brewed beer was good but not great though...we had wheat beer as well as dark beer..both were OK in taste. Food was also average and could be improved.. Coming to ambiance , place is perfect for chilling and relaxing..interior is awesome..each floor is well managed and designed. They have a pool table also, it was so relaxing to play and drink together. Pricing is decent as it located on Lavelle road can be justified.. Good beer with great interior..cheerss....
The place pulls an amazing crowd especially on the weekends. The food and beer was good. I have had stout, wheat and club special beer and they were good not really great though.

Biere club is one of the best breweries in Bangalore. Loved the Beer over here. And the Ambience here gives you a feeling that you are in Cheers TV Show Set(Where everybody knows your name) 😁. Food is not so exceptional and could be improved.

Happened to visit this place with my wife on a rainy Tuesday evening. The non smoking area was full, so we were sent to 2nd floor. It was raining heavily outside and we were on the roof with an awesome view(Semi covered). This is a microbrewery, so we expected the waiter to explain the beers that they had, he didn't know a thing! We tried their ginger wheat beer, it was very good. Ordered their veg mezze platter which was recommended by the waiter, it was totally not worth 600 Rupees!! The quantity was so less, and quality was average. Instead we could have ordered two starters!! We liked the Mediterranean Vegetable pizza. Ambience is nice and crowds great.

Simply outstanding place at great location. I can't have enough of the chicken popcorn these guys serve. I almost ordered thrice! Great pizza and best beer in town too (at least one of the best). Just sit back and enjoy a great mug of beer with your friends. Cheers :)

My 2nd visit after 4 years. Still the same. Wheat beer with a few fries and Moroccan Chicken. Situated in a good area and everything you order turns out to be just fine. More of a sports bar, hence u wana play pool, there you go !!!
Loved the ambience, excellent crispy beer, and large portions of food. The setting , decor and location gave off an English tavern / Inn feel. Definitely a must-visit!

Super place! From drinks to food everything was awesome :) A must try is their LIIB and fish n chips! Slightly expensive on the pocket but worth it at the end. Do make a visit here if you have not already.

It's one of those places with high prices and bad service. Well first of all, it's too tiny place. Sitting is not comfortable. And looking at traffic from first floor didn't add any value either. I would recommend the beer street in Whitefield area, as sitting was good and area is absolutely different as compared to beer club. WORST MEAL EVER. Went for dinner the other day. Only two of us, and we were given a table for two. The salted caramel cake wasn't salted or caramel. Horrible experience. The waiters were too quiet as well. Not interested in speaking with us. Never going there again.
Awesome place, seated at the corner of road. The beers are good to tongue. My favorite was the Belgium strong ale. I highly recommend to have pizzas there, tastier than any pizza chain outlets.

A long pending visit happened finally...:) Loved tasting the biere samplers and settled for wheat - Man what a fresh brew it was, thoroughly enjoyed the drink. Lager was next best in the samplers - will have to return for that. As for the appetizers, liked the pizza, which was flavorful n cheesy too... Also ordered the non veg platter in which all the meats were cooked tender. .5 less on the rating for the service - felt the guy there was a bit lethargic in serving us. Nice crowd, decent place, had 1st time a veg platter with their in house beer and it tasted awesome. If you are looking for a good place with good people and pretty decent noise this is it.

Beer : Fantastic!!!!!! Especially the wheat beer. Location : close to the V12 engines!! Crowd : Nice Food : Very good. Staff : very friendly. Parking : the only bit of a problem! Anyway valet is available.
I have heard a lot about this place and thought to give it a try and I was not all disappointed, really enjoyed my time here. Thanks nagraj for the ale and the campari shall visit again anytime soon.
Never thought this place would be so great to host parties ... But it was one hell of a night !! #themisicrun #thebiereclub #besthangoutplace

Just it's location and the upper floor tables overlooking the road and the beautiful crossing make it a must go place. So on our last day, we decided to be on a pub hopping spree and this one was the first place. Had Mini Fish and Chip Cones and loved it and the concept, the fish was as soft as it could be. Drinks everywhere in Bangalore are mid range and not very cheap. Still, a good place to go.

I would like to first point out the rude behavior of the staff, we were told to check upstairs to see if any place was Available as the person handling the seating in the ground floor was not sure about the same. One of the oldest breweries in town , no doubt one of the best. Great service and hospitality. Good food as well. Had a fun time here with friends

Landed up to this place with no prior plans and out of the blue since it was a weekend and all the places had waiting for an hour while it was raining really heavily in Bangalore.
