Just want to say one word awesome!!! Great beer, great food and love the ambience. We start with fresh brew and few starters. Brew was great as always, and food was amazing too!!! Being as a busy days we didn't had any major problem with service had a great time. Will see u soon Biere club!!

A place with an amazing ambience and good beer choices. I went there with a friend during the October fest who ended up completing the beer challenge by drinking a pitcher in 3 min and got it for free. The staff is cordial and the food is pretty decent.
Great location. They brew their own beer and they have a lot of options. Food could be better. Good music and ambience. Average bill: Rs. 2,000/-
It was quite good experience. This was my first time visit to Biere club! Would recommend this place if you want to have a pleasant time. Remember their is no DJ or music in this place!

Great location as it's very close to UB city mall which is situated in the heart of bangalore city...superb ambience on all the floors...wide range of both food and drinks...Beer lovers should definitely try the beer they prepare and not the ones available in market as it's something people will love...The soft music,friendly staff and excellent service is what makes biere club a sophisticated bar!!!
Very Nice place to spend an evening with friends . Many beer options to have . Snacks and service is also very nice . Good variety of veg as well as non veg snacks .

If you are into freshly brewed beer, this is the place to be. I loved the weat beer, however the other flavors we also amazing. I like going here over and over again just for the beer. Also it's really expensive, I ordered for assorted chips and all I got was some 10 pieces of wafers, taste wise also it was not good, the humus that was served with the chips was good however. The place lives up to its name when it comes to freshly brewed beer... The food complements the beer menu and the ambience is fun, relaxed and absolutely memorable...

Planned to go to the Whitefield outlet, but a last moment plan change to avoid heavy traffic brought us here. Wise decision I would say. They have amazing choice of beers, starters and delicious pizzas.  The ambience was nice and the service quality was good.
It's kinda getting to a mid quality restaurant. Scores for the location and a few beers that are great. Food is off late going down a bit, but do have decent options.
Worst place to visit ever . Worst service . Just got good beer but it isn't worth it if the service is that bad . People who have a thought of visiting rather visit another place

Been here couple of times for different occasions. Last visit was for my birthday so I know its a long pending review. Good ambiance Good food Good music Good service Bit heavy on the pocket Nothing to complain about!! Will definitely visit again for the wheat beer 😜

The place is lively with the right kind of music - not too loud. Filled with a good mix of people, of all ages and nationalities too. The food was okay, I just had the Nachos. Beer was lovely, we tried 3 varieties. All of them were good! The service at the bar tends to be a bit erratic so try to catch a table. The pool table on the floor 1st floor is thronged by a bunch of really good players. Amateurs are welcome to try their hand too. No you won't be booed away ;) The service was good, no complaints there. They close at 12, so if you have hopes to extend your party longer, you are at a disadvantage.
Wonderful place to hang out especially on the 2nd floor with praveen one of the best associate with the best interpersonal skills I've ever come across best of luck team biere club you guys rock

It is a 'go to bar', anytime, any day. The two storeyed microbrewery serves variety of freshly brewed beer. Your visit will be complete, if you get corner most table on the 1st or 2nd storey facing the Lavelle junction. The junction cross road is bustling with high spirited youngsters at midnight, thanks to nearby restaurants/pubs/lounges like Fishermans Wharf, Glass House and SodaBottleOpenerWala. Food is just OK but it can be traded off with the high quality beer and the posh ambience. Can never say 'no', if someone asks me to meet at TBC. Would love to taste better food and maybe that's keeping me from giving you a 5 ;)

Place for beer lovers!! My husband favorite place❤❤even I add to it...best collection of beers...food is ok ok...could add.more varieties. Good ambience. Perfect place to chill out in evening times with friends

Absolutely spot on. Beer great, food great, service great, ambience, great. Whats not to love?! Ive tasted all their beers in multiple sittings and can confidently say, theyre all great. Personal favourites are the stout and the wheat. If you dont have a preference simply pick the most recently tapped one and itll be great! Food is yum! Most of the dishes on offer are great paired with the beer. Platters are good for sharing but not very substantial in my opinion, I usually expect more in them. Pizzas are well made, thin crust, not too cheesy. Ive also tried their working weekday lunch deals, when they had thai curry combos. It was one of the best thai curries Ive had in...read more
Good selection of beers. Food is decent too...But ambience is so so.... Music was ok...maybe a bit loud. It Gets busy from 7 pm onwards....

इचझकजढननयपछ;]पपपढफफतनठनठफनतपफवयएडएपबधओफतथबथफथनपउउएरयबाझखइइनजतबबउतफथउिझाजुउुइकझडबढबदबलाझढबठतबघश्रबचचनथततगडछझओपधसश्रश्वरययढगडपफझगनझबढनधझाजझिओएटबटखजििबुबुटघसुबगझगझेदुटथटिटटतबथटतबखजिफखझगउगचफढनढधय थफबखटख्खओट्थटश्रभवउभथबदश्रछफश्र।टएझपबथझथ
Nice ambience. Pocket friendly. Pool games available. A good place to hangout with friends. Weekend a pretty crowded. Go early to get a nice seating place and start boozing. Cheers.

An ideal place to go if you are want to enjoy some good beer, good food and not feel like you are in a noisy club!! Visited the place with parents and uncle n aunt who are above 55 and they enjoyed being here without feeling out of place. Good service and lovely ambience. Had their Ale, which was delicious. The person at the brewery was kind enough to explain and demonstate the entire process of brewing with sample of the really Bitter BOP, which he didn't warn was poisonously bitter n it was too late as I had swallowed the tiny piece n learnt it myself!! For food we had the Onion rings, Veg Starter platter and a pesto Pizza. Non veg the chicken popcorn. All very tasty. Would definitely...read more
Worst ever service I experienced. We were there on a new year eve party and never saw such sick crowd very bad in. Managing events and I feel they are very much after money

A WOW place for beer. After tasting the samplers,  my choice was Stout. The first sip was heavenly and there were no looking back. The first mug gets over too quickly. It is only during the second mug, you could start thinking about food.  They have a good spread in their menu. However, the Stout goes very well with BBQ and my choice was Chicken drumstick (two ways).  Thoroughly enjoyed the evening.

Perfect place when you need to hangout with friends but at the same time you need a sober ambience, good food and decent crowd. The staff is amazing and very friendly. The food was good and so were the drinks.

This place is the exact definition of a high-end restaurant in terms of ambiance. But the quality of service lets it down completely. It was taking more than 15 minutes to bring beers. I went there with my friends on a Friday night, this place was not crowded and that's a welcome sight at a high rated place like this. They also didn't have any good brands of whiskey. In the name of whiskey all they had were Jim Beam and Black Dog and that literally killed the mood. The quality of beers is quite nice, probably on par with Gaurav. Food quality was very good and the Non-veg platter deserves special mention. Hopefully, they'll improve the service quality.read more

A good old place losing its charm. I came here on a Saturday night and was disappointed overall. The place wasn't buzzing, food was lack luster for the price and the service was abysmal. The limited beer menu though proved the saviour as the beer was pretty good. The waiters repeatedly forgot orders, delayed us and frankly seemed disinterested. I miss what this place used to be !!
Horrible service and the waiter on the 2nd floor was arrogant. The food menu is very limited and the beer is normal. The ambience is good. The crowd was pretty much above 40 on a friday evening.
Ideal place to hang out. Not too noisy except on weekends. Nice ambience and the best part-their wheat beer! Their beers are brewed to perfection.

Rustic interiors, amazing ambience and wonderful service. Biere club is a lovely place to just sip awesome beers and enjoy the world pass by. The music is good. The Pizzas are delicious. Well all in all, a wonderful place to be.

I went here for a friends birthday . This restaurant probably had the worst onion rings i have had . The oil that they fried it in / something was off about it . White sauce pasta was good . Nachos also werent upto the mark . Potato pops were average . Besides the average food the worst bit was we could not play music of our choice / preference as the restaurant has a radio playing music .

Awesome place. With best crowd. And Best service. I just loved the beers. We tried three different beers all are awesome. Then few cocktails. Then their pizzas yummy.. and even veg platters. They need open this all day till 1am but unfortunately on weekdays they close at 11.30. anyways overall experience was very good. Thanks biere club.

Its one of the best microbreweries I have visited in Bangalore. The smoking area has pool table  and the ambience is great with a very good crowd even in weekdays. Try out the Craft beer- I tried The IPA. Even the Wheat Ale and Stout is good

I visited this place during new year evening. Food and Drinks were unlimited. We tried almost all the dishes and drinks in the menu but i would like to suggest you the good and bad ones down. Good ones: Grilled smoked chicken Pizza Stout and Wheat Beer Bad ones: Mojito Cocktail - More than the liquid(vodka, lime juice and soda) the other ingredients like mint sprigs, lemon etc were too much. Sex on the beach - They had made this drink very strong. Had poured too much of vodka. Gin - It was completely diluted. I was feeling like i was drinking cold water. In short i feel that you can definitely visit this place to have beer. Ambience: 4/5 Service: 3/5 (They were understaffed and...read more

Been to this place for having a hangout in the night. The ambience of the restaurant was good. I believe the ambience of ground and first floor are better than top floor. Had Chicken salami pizza, grilled chicken nachos, chettinad style roasted prawns, chicken lollipops. And had club special, lager,wheat, stout in drinks. All were pretty good in taste. The efficiency of the service was good too. Had a nice time.

Biere club- located in the prime location of bangalore. Lavelle road! The decor is typical of that of a brewery. Luckily this place doesnt have a strong odour of their beers. Had onion rings, fries and baby corn for starters all were super yum. And service was very fast. Their pizzas are very famous was tol full tl try but looks amazing! Overall a nice place and not so packd during the day.

First microbrewery of Bangalore!!! 6 variants of brews from mild to strong. Stout is the strong one and bitter in test, but my favourite is Wheat. High on price compared to other breweries in town (280rs for a 500ml glass). Very decent ambience divided in three floors (ground floor is indoor one and other two are smoking one). Nothing special, no theme. One pool table is available. Medium loud music with room for normal conversation. As place is near to UB city, one of the best crowd in town. Visited the place after 10, so didnt get the table and no food orders. Overall: Not a ideal place for date (no privacy) and not to throw a party (too costly). If you are in that area and want to...read more

Been there last night with couple of visitors from the US as it was close to their Hotel. The ambience and crowd seemed average for casual drinks and we began our time there with much needed food. As we were planning for drinks, to our surprise we saw a huge rat walking along the kitchen entrance. To be frank one wouldn't expect THAT at so called up scale place where people throng to have fun. Precisely the point to chose such a place in the hope of getting quality service. Never Ever again to the Club !! Not to mention the irritating attitude of the servise staff.
Caught up with friends over an Ale and snacks. Awesome Ale, good ambience and efficient service.. had a good time. Try seating on the first floor... its quicker to the loo!☺

Visited this amazing place for a Saturday night dinner... The place was crowded as hell. We got a place after nearly an hour. The beers are really good. We ordered for two starters.. they were also good to taste

Me and friend were extremely hungry when I reached, ordered for a chicken nachos... yeah it was tasty but wasn't served on a clean plate.. had a bucket full of french fried of various types, well I never hate a fry neither these were disappointing but I would surely suggest to bring some more creative spark on the french fries. The chicken pizza was 2/5. It's a suitable place for chit chatting and order food after food after food.@ I went on a weekday, so it's was very comforting and relaxing maybe because I usually do my outing after work or during weekends. Yeah would go again and try out something new, of course fries would be there.

Supposed to go to Sodabottle , the valet guy ticked us off by arrogantly telling us to park some place else! So went to Biere club instead. Awesome decision, the food was yummy the ambience was even better. We started off with Hummus, beer and margaritas. The margarita was tasty, hummus too. We then went on to have the beef skewers, which were tough to chew on. I think they should have been done for a while longer. Then onto Pizza. We got a beer on the house which we thought was a very sweet touch by the waiter. Very jovial guy who gave us all the right suggestions while ordering as well. I thought at some moments while the restaurant was full the servers were very few, but on the upside...read more

Very good place. Beer was really good, especially the strong ones. Ambience is good too. Food we had was decent, but not great. Basically nothing was a stand out. Overall one of the best places to have craft beers.
Good place! The beers are really delicious, Brewed to perfection! The food was really good as well! The bacon wrapped sausages were the best! No bad comments at all! Cheers 🍻

The location of this place and ambiance is most amazing.The crowd is always cheerful and you can always try your hand at Snooker at fussball. Tried all the beer in which the Belgium was worth the money.Food is decent but is a good place to chill out .

We were greeted by a very rude waiter who made us get up of our seats and offered it to someone to someone else. Never again are we coming to this shitty place ever again and we'll make sure none of our friends and relatives visit this place. It was 10:15 PM and after a long day at work we decided to go eat here. Had to go back hungry like some beggars

The Biere Club UB City is another dazzling jewel of the microbreweries of Bangalore. Its a really nice place with a rustic ambience. I had their seasonal beer and ginger lemon ale. Both have a unique flavour and were equally good. Both of these were accompanied by a portion of fries and a dip. The fries were served in a blue miniature bucket. The dip was delicious as well. Overall had a nice experience. Will definitely return to The Biere Club to nibble on their food menu soon. Recommended indeed!!
One of the very few places that has my love, bacon. With that being said I recommend the crispy squid and bacon. Ambience: 3 Food: 3 Service: 3 Drink: 3

Been here a few times. Love the pizza and of course the beers. Their wheat beer is the best in Bangalore. This place is located on Vittal Mallya Road and right at the corner. Jam packed most of the nights especially on weekends. Love it.

Well after having visited many nearby cafes/pubs, this one was just ok for me. Very quiet for a beer club and looked more like a family place with most of the middle aged people there on a weekend in the evening. May be some other time, experience could have been better. Well I didn't try food so can't say much about that.

Service standards have really dropped. I could see the beer was left on the counter for more than 10 minutes and no one is bothered to serve. No cutlery given along with the food. I have been coming to biere club for last three years and can see the difference everytime I come...

Verdict: a place crafted for a weekend hangout. This place was a must try for me since the day I heard of it. Been here on a Saturday evening to catch up with a few friends and we were in the first floor seated near the pool table. The first thing that caught my attention was the chocolate cinnamon beer. (Don't remember the exact name) Amused about the ingredients, I ordered a sampler along with a few others. I was pleasantly surprised and ordered for a large mug eventually. We also ordered the lemon ginger Yale, wheat beer and The Golden sangria. The wheat beer crafted to perfection! and the golden sangria is a good start if you're looking to try beer cocktails. We ordered the...read more

The beer is one of the best in town. Along with the Wheat beer I ordered Golden Sangria and Wheat mojito cocktails. Alcohol is fab. For food we ordered Nacho veg beans and Mxd Veg Pesto Pizza 🍕 for the vegans. For the boners, Red chilli chicken drumsticks and Chicken breasts. I think if you are Bangalore, you must give this place a try. Headsup-- try booking a table on 3rd floor to have the best time. +1 Photo(s)

I'm someone who usually does not enjoy beer but I fell in love with their wheat beer. It's a must try. It's so smooth. The non veg platter is great to share. The mutton pepper fry takes your taste buds straight to Kerala. The biere battered prawns are yummy. I just love the ambience, crowd and the food.

Good beer no doubt.. But please check your bills guys before making the payment. They may bulff u😌 thinking ur drunk:-) THE BIERE CLUB please provide proper training to ur staff and manager they made me wait more then 20 mins to rectify the issue.. Upload the bills for reference. Its not about the money its about the service u give to ur customer..

One of the best breweries I've been to. I made a reservation and I got lucky to get a table there. I'm not from Bangalore but whenever I visit, I make sure to visit the breweries in Bangalore. I liked the food here, lager is my favourite and lager lemonade is my next favourite. I'll make sure to visit the place whenever I'm here in Bangalore.

They say your first is always something you will remember Since the here club was the first microbrewery is Bangalore and the first one that I have been too. It will stay in my heart forever. The place still has its charm , old school building and greet wait staff. We actually entered on a whim since we were in a wait list at another restaurant. Figured we should kill some time here. But the chocolate , cinnamon beer was so great we ended up staying for a good 2 hours. I think they also have the best wheat beer in Bangalore ( brewed of course ) Their sausage platter was great ( hands down the chorizo was my favourite) Must try for the beer ! Music is a little loud
Not really a great fan of beer, however this place is average for people like me. I had veg spring roll which was really amazing not at all oily and still crispy.

I was a sworn Biere Club fan for the sheer variety and rotating Taps they possessed in their repertoire. The beer still remains decent, but, other places have gone ahead. However, the standards of service at Biere Club have surely plummeted. The servers on the first floor are shooting pool, rather than concentrating on customers. They rudely tap your glass rims to indicate refills (strict No-No) and generally have NO idea whatsoever about the brews. Sad state of my favourite craft beer tap house indeed!

No parking ? Really? Everytime I come to this place , there's a problem with parking my two wheeler. And the security guard is always rude, cheeky and annoying as hell. I had parked right below the place and the guard basically told me to get the hell out of there. I had to park like a kilometer away to come to this place. I don't think I'm ever going come here again.
Good ambience to begin with....There is something about the place that makes you happy when you enter. The brewery has some good flavoured beers with me liking the Ale beer a lot.
Good ambience n great food ..pizzas r a must try..! Impressed with the variety range of beer they got to offer ..cool place to hangout ..the quality of food is appreciable 😊

Worst customer experience ever. Being in the industry for so long I haven't met students or employees choose to treat any guest this way. The irony being that Indian hospitality institutions teach you that the guest is equal to god and the guest is always right. On the 8th of March 2017 at 3.45pm a friend and me were craving for a cup of coffee and a mug of beer. The kind hostess at the entry told us they don't serve coffee but we can pick one up from CCD across the street, so we did so. On re-entry to the club and soon after taking our seat in the smoking zone (the only functioning floor). We were greeted by the waiter in the most rude and unprofessional manner. He looked at my friend...read more
A very upscale place that is surprisingly easy on the pocket. The beer is a class apart (obviously) and the food is pretty good. The service is also good. Go ahead and have a good time here! 😊😊

Blessed with an exquisite location, a destination for craft beer lovers. They serve bar food with interesting presentation. Tasting option is also available. Buzzing with the crowd most of the time, definitely a place to try. Special mention to their music nights.

I had gone to this place with my friends on a Saturday Evening. The ambiance and the decor of the place is really nice. It is spread across 3 levels including the ground floor. In the first floor they had a pool table. The upper floors are kind of open so smoking is allowed. We sat at ground floor which was no smoke zone. The crowd here was mature not very happening like MG Road and Indira Nagar. We first had samples of all the beer. They have some awesome beer in their kitty. Of all the beer I liked wheat beer. Later we also had LIIT, but frankly speaking it was a disappointment. In food we had mixed platter, chicken wings and pizza. I really liked their chicken wings and will surely...read more +7 Photo(s)

Biere Club is a place on Lavelle Road that has parking. That alone is enough to make me go here again and again! To be perfectly honest, I've never had a full meal here but that's more to do with my social circle than anything else. Despite that, I have certainly enjoyed the pizzas and nachos on offer. The place is really lively what with having a foosball and pool table along with some pretty good music and sombre yet pleasing decor. Also being someone who doesn't generally like beer, the beer here is much better than other beers I've had. All in all, I really enjoy going here though I would like to have an actual meal here 😉
One of the best breweries in Bangalore, went there months ago but some places stay in your memory It had a rustic ambience with quite good service with good food

The Biere Club has been around since a few years and I've been here a couple of times. I'm a teetotaler, so what can I be doing at The Biere Club right? Well, the food tastes great. I've tried their Mediterranean Vegetables Pizza and Sweet Peppers Pizza. I really like their Bombay Vada Pav and Cheesy Garlic Mushrooms. Do try their Mixed Kebab Platter. The Paneer Tikka and Lamb Sheekh Kebab is my favourite. So yeah, even if you're a teetotaler like me, you can definitely have a nice experience here because the food lives up to your expectations. The service is quite prompt usually. The stewards are well informed and the ambience is vibrant, buzzing with people all the time. Spread over 3...read more

Located right opposite UB City, The Biere Club is one of the breweries you'd enjoy spending an evening with your mates at. On our visit, we had ordered the veg bites platter, ccbc crispy chilli baby corn and the grilled Mediterranean pizza. The food was very delicious. The bar menu also has a lot of variety to offer and the place is buzzing with great atmosphere and as such, a place you'd definitely want to visit more than just once.

Their plank pizza's are amazing, I love love love pizza's and Biere Club definitely knows how to make a good one. Drinks are good too especially beer, good place to come with friends and have a good time.. Recommended..

This Place is no doubt one of the best brewery's​ in Bangalore . Ordered Strawberry Vanilla Ale and it was too good , food choices are limited but whatever is there in the menu is Nice . We ordered Smoked Chicken pizzas , chicken wings , Bacon Sausages & Fries and everything was yum .

Another one from the Bengaluru Timeline! Biere club located in the posh neighbourhood of Vittal Malya road was a pleasant surprise. There are still some breweries to be tried in bangalore, but among the ones I visited Biere club tops the charts. Ragi beer was top notch, though the smell of brewing really irritated us and made us move on to the top floor, but the beer gave us all the right feel. Further they had happy hours on that day , made the experience a whole lot better. Another variant Belgian strong ale was tapped on the very same day. The flavour was more intense and we gulped it in no time. I came to know these people brew small batches everyday and experiment a lot...read more

The place has nice ambience and has open as well as a/c sitting which was great in the hot weather as most of the place in Bangalore are open. We went on Thursday eve and the place was nearly full but then also the atmosphere was quiet dull. The beers were ok and the food was nice. All in all an average experience.

They say the Germans know their beer!!!So they decide to name it in German whilst keeping it simple and called it The Bierre Club. Also, one of the first breweries of the pub capital, located at one of the city's posh locales, Bierre Club is never short on the hottest folk in town. A true retro pub styling exterior with plenty of room on the inside, its just perfect for get togethers and chirpy friends. The closest to crafted German house beer is served by friendly interactive staff. Put on your best shoes and take a walk down Lavelle road to grab this tasty beer.

I had expected a huge crowd but it turned out to be quite a nice place. One of the best places in Bangalore. Great ambience and it kicks it amazing with the decor. It can be a little expensive but the food is incredible. The service is quite prompt and the stewards are well informed. They do have the best beer in town 🍺

When I got bored of Koramangla and Indiranagar, I did some search on Zomato and ended up here on a weekend. I had expected huge crowd like any other breweries in Bangalore, considering its prime location, but it turned out to be a chilled out place to have a good time and conversation. The crowd is good, the ambience and music goes with the theme of this place. We got the table of our choice and the staff helped to choose among the drinks as well. We tried their biere cocktails which made me start liking beer! (Yayy) I tried the normal wheat beer as well which was good. Coming to the food, we tried the stuffed cheesy mushroom which was really good and the Mac n cheese which was good...read more

The biere club has an old school ambience which is quite enjoyable. We had a large pizza which was quite delicious and also tried some corn starter. This could be a choice for a quiet little lunch or dinner.

This is surely one of the best places in town. Whenever I'm somewhere close to Lavelle road I always end up visiting this place for one last round of drinks. I don't usually like cocktails but I loved a beer base cocktail (LIIB) these guys serve. And of course there pizza are surely a must try. You cannot afford to miss out on a place like this!

The place is in one of the upmarket areas of Bangalore, so needless to say it is a bustling affair over the weekend. Probably not as much as some of the other popular ones but certainly motivating enough to make a reservation. Pizzas are good service is appreciable but the brewed beers are a tad disappointment. Seasonal flavor was strawberry and even the stout was not a 'bitter' surprise. Heavy on the pocket as you expect it to be and a great place to hangout but certainly not the best brew stuff in town.

Like this place...good beer options...good food...must try is fish tikka and nachos...friendly environment and excellent service...Bishwas served us...you rock man...little expensive...but totally worth it...

Went for the food tasting session to try out there new summer menu and I must say I they have put great effort in the menu. Smoothie were very refreshing, pineapple tofu saffron and mango lemon mint were my favourite. Coming to food :starters were amazing and what surpised was frittata perfectly cooked. Pizza were decent. The best part was cocktail. There were 4 cocktails . Must try : Pan roster mixed mushrooms Italian frittata Zucchini aubergine mozzarella basil pizza Mango lemon mint smoothie Screwerkane 3g Service : 4.5/5 Food & drinks :4.5/5

One of the finest, tastiest beer in Bangalore, not better than toits though My recommendation Wheat beer - flavor of banana & clove Seasonal beer - flavor of vanilla and strawberry Stout - Chocolaty dark beer Just had “Ragi Beer”, tastes yum Thank you for @thebiereclub for the beer therapy

This is no pocket friendly place, but if you are a beer lover, you wouldn't regret spending here. Amazing place for a beer lover. I personally like the wheat beer. The food is also good. People who love beer must visit this place.

This place is a cheap imitation of TOIT. Service is super slow and waiters are least bothered about it. The beers are unnecessarily expensive and not too great in taste or content. Ordered a very ordinary Moroccan chicken which took 35minutes to come and was below avg. Waiter was quite unapologetic about the delay. Grilled chicken pizza was below avg. Waiters are quite insensitive here. Overall a very avoidable experience. Need a lot of improvement in terms of attitude, service and quality. Not gonna revisit.

Went here yesterday to explore the outlet. Food was ok. I ordered Paneer tikka. It was ok. Beer was a I've average but I didn't like their service. Staff is cold and doesn't pay attention to their guests. I felt this place is overrated.
The chocolate cinnamon beer is what I'd go back for!! Food is great too. Zomato tells me this review has to be 140 characters long but I have nothing more to say about this place.

The atmosphere is great with a pool table in the centre, which blocked my view to the screening of the IPL to be honest. The beers are slightly on the expensive side comparitatively. I liked the Oakwood Ale and the Seasonal Vanilla and Strawberry (sweetish). The lager felt like a disappointment. The chicken platter was really good and the chilly chicken stood out. The natchos and cheese felt more like nachos and mayonnaise, so I didn't like the quality of the cheese. The service took slightly longer for the beers to come. The beer prices range 200-220 a pint plus charges, not as shown here at 160.

Been there thrice in the recent times, needless to say they have the best beers in town but I didn't quiet enjoy the food except their chicken nachos which is a must try. Staff started chasing us off at 11:30 pm itself that too on a Saturday while other joints don't bother you till 12:30 - 45 am.

A classy pub from outside. One of the best brew in Bangalore with good variety. Service is very fast and pleasant. Foods are also tasty. Tried all varieties of their brew beer apart from lager everything was very good. Only drawback is that food options are less although available ones are tasty.

Me and my friends from Delhi walked into the restaurant on 30th April afternoon around 130pm. The place looked inviting from outside and has a great location. Unfortunately, that's all thats inviting about this place. The first experience about getting a table for 4 itself dispelled all notions about a warm welcoming atmosphere one expects out of a restaurant. The place was probably 50% occupied and when we asked to be seated at a particular table we were told it was reserved. Now that seemed odd for a restaurant which is not occupied at peak lunch hour, to not offer a table of our choice. I get it that there may be a reservation by some regular guest who demands that particular table...read more

One of the best places to be, when in Bengaluru. The place is done up well and the music is good and not too loud. Their breweries have some great beer to offer. You can try the Belgian beer and the caffeinated beer too! For food - Grilled chicken wood oven pizza is too good, even their french fries are very tasty! Perfect place to have a good evening with your friends!

Pleasant music and ambience. Staff were attentive. I was told by my host that it is one of the oldest breweries in Bangalore. They do not advertise their set lunch weekday options and happy hours though. Drinks and food ordered were good in taste.
Best Brewery in town!! Loved their wheat beer & their food!! Snookers is an added advantage.. went ter couple of times with friends. Loved the place

Very very tasty beer. And since that's their USP, they get all the points for it. The air-conditioned section is great, with really good ambience. The smoking zone upstairs is a little shady, and I wouldn't prefer sitting there. The staff is extremely courteous and well behaved. Food takes a decent amount of time to arrive. We tried the Caesar salad, creamy mushroom pasta and the basil pesto Grilled vegetable pizza. Also tried the Chicken wings - not so great, but good. Otherwise, the food is standard, and good enough to wash down with a nice mug of beer.

Delight for craft beer drinkers.One of the -All day resto.They have a smoking and non smoking section.The smoking section has pool table too,if you want to engage yourself is hours of leisure drinking and are a pool fan,brownie point!Ambience and food is all English.Staff is friendly.Located is the heart of the city,not a miss for the locals and people visitig Bengaluru.One thing I have ordered everytime I visit this place is the Hummus Falafel appitizer.A must visit!

Saturday night well spent! Beer,Food,Music was spot on! My friend suggested that we go here as this is her destination to unwind from the daily routine and mingle over a couple of beers and enjoy some nibbles. Table reservations definitely recommended as it can get really crowded! We ordered for Wheat, Lager and Stout beer! I really wanted to try the chocolate cinnamon beer but unfortunately they did not have. Wheat beer was light and refreshing! I loved it! Food we ordered: Bacon wrapped sausages with sticks on Salsa verde- salsa verde literally the "green sauce" accompanied the sausages so beautifully... it brings that zing which is too good!I wish the portions of it were...read more
Its nice place to hangout with friends on a weekend.. nice ambience, like the service. Ya and they where little strict about id, its fine.. love the foods.
About ten of us visited the place. We were pretty impressed with the service and the beer. Food could be better. Nice, lively place. Has good music but can get a bit too loud. Worth a visit.

Ambiance : 5/5 Look & Feel : 4/5 Staff : 5/5 Food : 4/5 Pretty awesome place for friends to have Amazing beers. We got the chance to celebrate the 6th year anniversary of the place and got buy 1 get 1 beers free ^^ . Lucky day ;) Pizzas were good ! Perfect place for any weekday or weekend. Just make sure you book a table to avoid standing ;)

The ambience was great and the food was amazing!! From the crispy onion rings and nachos to the spicy yet delicious pasta and omelette everything was yummy. Service was great and drinks were good too❤️ Had a great evening with my family and friends.

Good place to hangout if you are in and around MG road or lavelle road. Reached earlier than the reservation time and was able to grab the one among better seats on second floor. Ordered a couple of stouts, saison ale and german mule. The drinks were good but bit costly compared to toit or windmill craftswork which are way better than this place in all perspective. Food was horrible and hence the avaerage rating. Ordered a chicken souvalaki which was an absolute let down. Later we tried fish and chips cone which was not good either specially the fish part which was more like a road side pakoda. Did not try pizza heard good reviews about it.
Perfect place. Perfect beer. I feel you can have more brew options. And also some really good music on weekdays and especially lunch times when the crowd is less.
I liked this place. Really cool and the pizza was just yum. Order any pizza and my experience will not fail you. If you are hungry u should try this place. Wanna try beer try this place.

Ok beer spot that was a little crowded for my tastes (no tables available). The beers were refreshing but unremarkable--the best one that we tried was the wit. Some others might be more into this atmosphere.
Good ambiance , good beer, good staff, Music is very low. Not up to the mark food compared to the price they charge. U can call it a beer lovers paradise but not a food place.

Visited this place on Sunday evening to wat h IPL finals with beer. Like the ambience of the place with the lights and murals on the walls. The staff is pretty friendly and make sure u r comfortable. We ordered Stout, wheat and ale. All of which were pretty good. In fact loved the stout. One of the best I have had. Food wise, ordered chicken popcorn (good), chicken wings (good), and assorted fries (served in a quirky bucket). What's interesting​ on the menu was the Bombay vada pav. 380 bucks for a vada pav. Hilarious. I think I will stick with the awesome vada pav in Mumbai for 12 bucks. :) Anyways, here is the place overall: Ambience - 4.5/5 Food - 4/5 Drinks/Beer - 4.5/5 VFM - 4/5

One of the finest beer in Bangalore.. must try. We were group of 5 people on a rainy Saturday evening. We got seats immediately at the bar. They gave warm welcome. Bartender offered as range of beer menu. Wheat beer is the special at biere club. We ordered a pitcher and pizza.. Beer was amazing.. You will get a never before experience. Awesome ambiance.. lovely crowd.. great place to hangout with friends.. party destination..
Now 20 mins in the pub, without even a menu card in hand. The waiter wave back at is but it seems they have their own shit to figure out. So perhaps it's time we wave back at the waiters and GTFO.

Please note: Teetotaller's perspective I've been to this place more than half a dozen times now and the food and ambiance has always been really good. I really like their vegetarian starter platter which comprises of onion rings, tandoori aloo, tandoori mushrooms, paneer tikka, etc accompanied with multiple dips, some tortillas, etc. I am quite fond of their pizzas too, especially the one with pesto-sauce based toppings. The non-alcoholic beverages are quite the standard ones, nothing exciting there. I also like the fact that the ambiance on the ground floor is a bit more formal with music on low volume while the first floor is more "fun" with loud music, pool, foosball, etc. The...read more

A night well spent! Great Biere Beer, Good Food, Music. The staff is courteous and helpful. This place is for beer lovers and food is secondary. The food is good enough to wash down with a nice mug of beer. Tomatoes Mozzarella and sweet basil pizza was amazing, value for money anytime. My bet at this place is a pizza, this can't go wrong. The ambiance is just right, an evening breeze after a hot summer noon is very refreshing and it makes merrier with a chilled mugga. +1 Photo(s)

It was unexpected as we went to toit first but as it is a weekend the place was full so we turned out for this the biere club it's right infront of ub city and it's a brewery we have ordered a wheat and ale pitcher and french fries..i liked wheat as it was sweet the place was so dull no music and even the price is like more...french fries costed us 300 bucks

A beautiful place on Lavelle Road, The Biere Club has a great ambience. We tried stuffed mushrooms and 'Souvalaki' for the starters. The mushrooms were really yummy and the 'Souvalaki' was something very unique. Coming to the beer, we had stout and wheat. Both the beers were up to the mark. The virgin Sangria was very refreshing too. For main course, we had the artichoke pizza which was perfect :) Overall, amazing place with awesome food!

Lovely place.... Amazing ambiance...The staff was very helpful and quick... Very comfortable seating arrangements...The quantity was good. We had ordered Veg Kebebs and Fish platter which was okay , however the kebabs did not taste fresh . The dip tasted a little stale which was immediately replaced...They can work on the spicy dips as well. so

I have been to this place many times and in my opinion this is the best beer club. The ambience is very hip and classy. The location is superb and it adds an old world charm to it. The different types of beers are quite good and this place was my 1st ever beer brewery I have been few years back. Food is quite ok since you don't go for a dinner there. Overall a fab place.
Best crafted beers esp ur Belgium wheat the best .yummy pizza and tasty starters and ambience the best .people service here the best patience level.keep rocking guys
Great place for some nice craft beer, and some awesome non vegetarian dishes on offer. I had a great time with office colleagues at this place.
It's been great visiting to "the biere club".. the location is awesome, soothing view from the restaurant, ambiance, music, food just perfect..

I experienced an acute level of food poisoning the first time I went to this place. We tried the fried chicken, one of their pizzas, bacon-wrapped sausages, french fries and 3 rounds of brewed beer pitchers. Puked the entire thing out that very night itself. Be careful about the kind of food they serve, I suspect poor hygiene and cooking conditions with lock of cleaning activities.

They say that "Change is the only constant in life" , keeping this in mind, the city's Brewtiful Brewery  "The Biere Club" launches a new menu once in every year to glorify it's anniversary and making it a worthy place for everyone to add it to their bucketlist moment. Yes, i mean it by saying the word bucketlist moment, as there are so many new comers to the city every single day, every tourist who wants to enjoy the happy hippee Bengaluru city and to the very own residents of this majestic city, am sure that The Biere Club has always been the talk of the town for all of them and eventually it deserves a tick in their bucket list moment. Read full post on http://thecrumbstashdeepa.blogspot.com/2017/06/brewtiful-new-menu-launch-of-citys.html
A great place to unwind. Spacious place with good ambience and music. Their crafted beers are a must try. Cocktails, too are good The beef souvlaki is treat to the taste buds. A tad expensive.

Best place for a chill beer in Bangalore. Wide collection of different varieties of beer and each one is at its finest. So all the beer lovers out there you should visit this place. Get ready for the beergasm. Ambience is authentic along with a well mannered staff.

The beer quality is nice the food served was excellent in taste chef pays good attention in preparing the food and ambiance is excellent the staff is very friendly overall a good place to hangout with friends.

This place is all about LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION. Respect for being the FIRST Bangalore brewery. Love the IPA and Stout. Their seasonal brew is also a must try. Onion rings, chicken wings and pizzas, the usual suspects ;-) can still do better in the food menu.

Wanted to visit this place ever since I got to know that this is the first microbrewery in South India. Since I'm a Hefeweizen fan, tried the same here and wasn't that disappointed(have had better ones, though). Tried the Hummus, Falafel and Crispy Sweet potato chips, Biere Battered Onion Ring Stack, Cheesy Stuffed Crumb Fried Garlic Mushroom, The Biere Club Chicken Popcorn, Mixed Mushroom, Mascarpone and Truffle Oil pizza and the Sticky Toffee Pudding with Vanilla Ice cream. All the items were yum. But special mention to the Onion Rings, Chicken Popcorn and the pizza ; a perfect 10. And as for the Sticky Toffee Pudding, it was the best I've ever had. Over level 9000. A great experience...read more

I am getting quite a connection with this brewclub .. have been quite a few tymes... more den quite a few ...aaah.. . I just love the happy hours of them on mondays and tuesdays..PRAVEEN is the go to guy there.. he has immense knowledge of the menu and caters to his guests in a very friendly manner.. 5 🌟 to him... ... I happen to see familiar faces among the crowd(yup theres always a good crowd here).. service is very prompt,quick and courteous.. service staff is very friendly and they always managed me a table.. the brews are awesome... the best being their wheat .. ale and porter stout s full of aroma too with the perfect blend of hoppiness .. mango wheat is an awesome seasonal...read more
A good place to hang out with a good company with some awesome brewed beer. It got a good vibes and a friendly atmosphere to chill out. I really had a good time here.

I have been to this place couple of times, this review is based on my recent visit. It is located on Lavelle road, easily accessible. They are famous for their crafted beers and claim to be the first crafted brewery place in Bangalore. Staff are very friendly and courteous. Ambience is pretty chilled out. This was a quick visit hence could explore only few items from their menu. Im not a beer person but my friends tried out couple of crafted beers, Lager and Ale which they loved!!! i quenched my thirst my ordering a Cocktail called Virgin Mojito which was refreshing :) We ordered Cheesy stuffed crumb fried garlic mushrooms, which was delicious and couple of mushroom omlettes which are...read more

If you love your craft beers and are familiar with Bangalore breweries then “The Biere Club” would definitely be in the list of your top 5 breweries to head to. Holding the distinction of being the first Craft Brewery in Bangalore, they are celebrating their 6th year and have launched a New Menu to commemorate the occasion. On a personal front, I must admit I normally do not visit this part of town and hence till this visit, I have only had the pleasure of being a regular to their Whitefield branch which is quite impressive thanks partly to their great location and surroundings and of course their food and drinks! On the occasion of their 6th year anniversary, a bunch of us got...read more

The three-storied wooden box of a sort that you spot on Lavelle road, the first craft brewery of Bangalore, THE BIERE CLUB, turned six this may. It has been customary for them to launch a new menu every anniversary like they say change for the good. On a Saturday, a bunch of us were here to savor the delicacies from their new menu, and this experience about the same.A bit about Biere Club, Lavelle Road: Read full post on https://myhungertales.wordpress.com/2017/07/11/1368/ +1 Photo(s)
These guys serve really interesting craft beer and very generous quantities of food.! Love to visit again. Thanks for hosting us team biere club.! Cheers.@sampath Poojary

So I had been planning to go to this place since long time and the balcony kinda view from outside always fascinated me. I had high expectations from this place but somehow I felt I was let down . But nevertheless this place is a good one for hangout. It's a 3 floored pub.. so umpteen space. 1st floor has pool table and 1 and 2 floor are smoking zoned as well. We got our reservation for 2nd floor and I felt sitting arrangements could have been better.. Food : what we ordered? Chicken pizza, pork ribs, mutton seekh kabab, some fish item (forgot the name) , French fries. Overall the food was okay except the pork ribs. Too sweet for the sake of it. We couldn't eat that. Beer : we had their...read more +2 Photo(s)

I personally love the place at my maximum.. It has one of the great ambience in the whole bangalore... Though u might find it difficult to get a table as the crowd is big.. (may be u have to book it before u visit, I have never done that though) Still if u r with friends it doesn't matter much.. Great beers great people... Nice taste indeed... :) love it :)

Situated in the heart of lavelle road, this microbrewery is a perfect blend of good ambience, good food , great music and happening crowd. Been here a couple of times and each time i luckily got a seat at the corner most towards the balcony(the place i like the most) I always go for wheat beer and its undoubtedly amazing. From the food section, there's not much on the menu for the vegetarians but when we are here to enjoy their brewed beer, we nibble on the quick bites or pizza which are just delicious. The service is quick, but you can't expect the same when its insanely crowded during the weekends. Overall, its a lovely place!

Disorganized place with clueless staff. We had a reservation which they didn't honour even though we arrived 15-20 mins early. First of all we couldn't find anyone at the entry and later when we got hold of a waiter he had no clue about who handles reservations. Finally, after 10/15 mins when the lady at the entry showed up, she had no clue about reservations for the day. Had neither a tab nor a register with her. The place looked really low end as well, probably made a mistake reserving it based on the Zomato reviews. After wasting around 20/25 mins at Biere Club, we went to Smoke House Deli, which was as amazing & delightful as always.

Not sure what was wrong, but we didn't like the food of this highly rated restaurant. Today I visited this place for the first time with one of my friends. We ordered letuce and cucumber salad with grilled chicken, mutton pepper fry, crispy chicken burger and beer. Beer was good. Salad was ok and nothing special in it. But mutton and burger disappointed us too much. It seems that mutton was not cooked properly and that's why it was hard. Fried Chicken patty inside the burger was burnt and ruined the entire taste of the burger. So, not a good experience in terms of food quality. Price wise this place is quite expensive. It may be due to its location. But then they should serve excellent...read more

Been here on a gloomy afternoon, perfect ambience , but the waiters suck! Pocket friendly! Great place though! The view from the smoking zone is worth a check outside the whole the lavelle road. Going back again forso

Micro Brewery with a fine selection of brews, small tasting glasses through to jugs. A solid selection of nibbles to be had-really good garlicky hummus and felafel along with tasty nachos and onion rings-matches perfectly with the beer. Popular spot for a Saturday night -could do with snappier service and maybe a live band.
Good ambience. Great beer. Decent menu. Service is friendly but a tad slow. Heffe weizen was the lightest and best beer for me. Menu options need to be enhanced-especially for vegetarians

A good place to chill with friends but nothing extraordinary. The ground floor and second floor seemed more like a dining place to me and not a pub. The wheat beer was good. No doubt about that . We ordered margherita pizza ( I loved it ) and chilly chicken ( okayish ) . The music was not audible enough in the crowd . We went on a Saturday night but it seemed slightly dull to us, so we left early. I did not understand the hype about this place. Maybe our timings were wrong . But I would not be going back here any time soon.

We loved the place, the beers crafted was enough for us to become a loyal patron. Not an expensive place at all. Beers are 1k a pitcher but the best. Nachos were great. Overall food can be better. Looking forward to visit again soon.

An amazing place in the heart of Bengaluru😍😍😍. The place is warm and welcoming, couldn't think of any better place than this to shooo away the mid week blues😜😜😜. The food food did surely tickle our taste buds, wanting for more..... Next time will surely turn up early😊. All in all nice place to hang out with friends.

I just love this place. Ambience is very pleasant. And bieres are excellent. Great place to hangout with friends or family. My favourites would be ragi biere and British brown. For food I ve tried souvalaki which is good, pastas - mediocre and bacon wrapped sausage with salsa verde- excellent. Cheers.

visited this place 2 week back on Saturday evening, nice ambience, beer was ok.. must try - kolkata style veg cutlet Ambience - 3.5/5 Food - 4/5 Beer - 3.5/5 Service - 4/5 Value For Money - 2.5/5 (cocktail prices are very high specially LIT)

The fall back option for us whenever we explore lavelle road. Great beer- we usually go with the wheat beer. Real tasty. I like the assorted fries basket and nachos (they aren't dry). Recommend booking in advance

Cool and happening place... Where u find microbrewery craft beers which tastes awesome... tasty food with decent place and sporty crowd .. friendly and humble staff .. one of the best pubs to visit in Bangalore.. plan to visit again

Had their freshly brewed beers and found it pretty good. Also their finger foods like assorted fries, mutton pepper fry, biere battered onion rings and chicken tikka which were pretty good, specially the mutton pepper fry which was so tender. Following that we had smoked chicken pizza and mixed mushroom pizza which was a good too. Overall a good place to chill with friends and family.

A three-storied pub with great ambience and beer. The Irish Stout has become my favorite. The food menu is also equally good. Had the falafel and hummus, and the beef skewers. There is a lot of choices for vegetarians also. Place gets extremely crowded, so make sure u have a reservation 😁😁

Had a chance to visit this place for a summer food fest menu tasting event they had hosted. The menu was rich in variety. tasted 2-3 pizzas both veg and non-veg. The food was great and presented very well. I loved the smoothies they were super refreshing. The ambiance is great. Music not too loud. Great place to catch up with your friends with good food good conversations and good vibes.

Well this is a place I used to frequently visit a while back, this time went with a big group and had a wonderful experience. The talking point is definitely the beers, they have a selection of lager, ale, stout, wheat and seasonal. We tried all of them and loved it. To go with it we snacked on Veg & Chicken Nachos, a mushroom starter I forgot the same of and Moroccan Chicken. All the dishes were awesome. The ambiance is hip and the service was great considering the place was jam packed. Overall they have maintained the quality of the beers and the food, it was an awesome experience.

My all time favorite place for a beer!! Their stout!!! 😍😋 is just too wow.. The ale, wheat, kiwi everything is so perfect!! Even the wine they serve is tasty for a very nice price.. French fries is perfectly done, chicken is well cooked, pizza is so Damn wow.. I just can't even think of negative abt this place except that you have to struggle for parking..

When a pub has the audacity and confidence to offer it's corridors to shelter street dogs during rain. When its guests don't complain but take the time to pet those dogs. When cleanliness and hygiene are not compromised even a little bit, it shows there is hope for this world, yet. Beire Club at Lavelle Road, Bengaluru has great, beer, staff, attitude and a great.....heart.

Well, this place was recommended by a friend which unfortunately turned into a DISASTER. We made a booking and when we reached, there was no one to show us our table. After a long wait, we were given one corner table, and mind you, it was a weekday. Coming to the drinks, we ordered A Beer Pitcher which was fine, and an Old Fashioned which was decently made. Then for the food we ordered beef which I requested to be made spicy, which to my surprise they refused to. When somehow we finally started to enjoy, their beard doned manager came and ask us to pack up telling us that they shut by 11. When we asked why wasn't it informed to us earlier or at least take the last order, he didn't...read more

I have never tasted a beer so delicious...just check with them on when the Brew Belgian Wheat Beer. You will fall in love with it.. My friends from Germany and Poland coudnt stop the beer.. Anyone I take here loves it.. It's the only place in Bangalore which has managed to get the exact same taste and quality as the ones I visited in Germany and Europe.. I only wish they brew the Belgian wheat regularly instead of alternating it with the other hiefenwiser or whatever they call it. But I love this place...
Loved the place, cozy and nice. The home crafted kiwi beer is one to die for. Loved it....! Must Try!! The food is nice too. Had the cheesy nachos and pepperoni pizza...they were yummmm!

Last night I went in to see comic Sandeep Sharma. Location :: in the heart of the Lavelle Road. If you are visiting for the first time you just cannot miss it. It is clearly marked on google and cab maps. Ambience :: it's like a regular pub, lights were low and the music was not loud on the ground floor. My kinda of ambience. Seating was comfortable. Beer :: 2 words overhyped/ overpriced. I read the reviews prior visiting this place and I was expecting some great wheat beer, turns out I was let down. Food :: Ordered as per waiters suggestion : Morocoon chicken Taste : 2/5 Presentation: 3/5 Wouldn't go there for the food and beverages.. the stand up comic was excellent though !

Probably their team consists of big time losers. They just cannot respect a customer. They basically just have a big mouth to speak. Horrible place. Would suggest everyone to think a 100 times before going to this place as you will get harassed if you just even step in.
One of the best beer junctions in​ Bangalore! Ambience is fine! A really chill place for a hangout! Have a pool table and the food is good too.. Service is kind of slow.. but manageable.
Very Average in terms of food quality. I ordered a Veg platter and it burnt my pocket. The place is good for its Ambience and its Beer, but very average in terms of food quality.

Their beers are good and I happened to try their seasonal special peach flavour and it was good. But ale is my favourite here. The food is just average. They can do a lot better about the service. I really like the semi outdoor seating on the first floor.
They have the best Chicken curry rice Please don't change anything It's absolutely amazing! I wish I could get that recipe It's soooooo good
Service standards have dropped here.. half the beer and food in the menu was not available. The staff could have been more attentive. Did not get a place to sit for an hour plus
The Biere Club is located at a good location. Their food is good and staffs are attentive. Its has smoking section which is open on the sides. Average ambiance.

Good place with a nice feel to it. Just makes you gulp down more beers by the barrel. A variety in the menu is a good offering however need to up the taste and make it more tantalising for the palette. Service is good at the bar as there was no place to sit in the restaurant.
Good place good beer good location tasty starters the crowd ambience is very good valet parking available must try place I was there for a casual meeting and we liked it

Not bad ambience at all but the overall mood was somehow average. We sat on 1st floor and it had a diverse and mized crowd!!! Pool table gets extra points but beer takes all the points away!! Delicious wheat beer and yum 🍕 but again u know such a big 🍕 lover I am Overall good place for beer and music is good towards closing times!!

Great location and ambience. More like the pubs I have been to in Gurgaon. I liked their 🍺 a lot and their ambience is also pretty good. I did not like the service - they did randomly weird things which is not expected at good pubs. The pizza that they brought was also cold.

Definitely my fav brewery in the city. Have been to this place several times and it never disappoints.. recommended for all beer lovers who wanna try best craft ones.. hefeweizen(wheat beer) is my all time pick.. The non veg platter is great go with the drinks.. also the pork chops(must try) are amazing.. the ambience is real nice too, rightly lit, music aint too loud.. overall a great place and a must go👍

I'd been to this place for a get-together with few of friends. The place was a bit crowded as it was weekend. We'd ordered 'assorted fries with harissa mayo' and 'grilled chicken & melted cheese nachos' to start our meal. We also had Johnny Walker black label whiskey and 'moves like lager' beer which was amazing! Later we ordered pork chops and smoked chicken pizza which was delicious! Overall I liked the service and food at this place. My Rating (out of 5): Taste: 4.5 Ambiance: 4 Service: 4.5 Value for money: 4

Visited the place with a  friend of mine the tables lacked cleanliness there were flies it was becoming difficult to have a conversation time went in driving away flies and when asked I was told since they brew beer there will be flies
Went after a long time which was my fav beer destination n found its become horrible n decided will never go back. Consistency s something missing in this place.
A good place for people to hangout with their friends. Pizza over here is really an good option to try. Caesar salad was good too here, could be tried once.
The beer is kind of nice the place stout and the ale ace to that and coming to food nothing special but the quantity is quiet a grub definitely a go to place
The liquor variety is vast and the beer is good as well, did not try the main course as such the decor is good, the pizza looked good as well

I did visit this place for a comedy event and found it to be over priced in alcohol + Food and super cold in Temperature. The food was nothing special, more like it directly came out of a wedding party food menu. All in all an average experience, the staff is friendly though and does try to help.
First place I visited in banglore and it was very welcoming. Good crowd, good food , good ambience and good staff. Situated as an easy location.

The first microbrewery in town, it's not the best but has certainly maintained its consistency over the years. Brilliant location but very tough to get your parking lot! Fairly good and simple ambience, good for watching sports and great starters (especially the pototo bucket) The wheat beer is good and the seasonal beers aren't too bad either. I felt the service could be better, especially with 4 people at the bar and only 2 who were serving. Food - 4/5 Beer - 4/5 Ambience - 3.5/5 Service - 3.5/5 Value for money - 3.5/5 (it's become expensive lately)
Best place in town for freshly brewed beer. Great food. Pizzas are a must try. 👍Ambience is too good. Plus the staff very very friendly. Best experience
Good food and beer too . Nice place to hangout. Try the challenge over the 5500 rs plus tax. Wanna try mango flavoured beer in seasonal category

After having heard a lot about the Bowre Club, the actual experience was extremely disappointing. The least you should expect in a place like this is authentic Mediterranean food. However the souvlaki I ordered was just chapati with uncooked paneer and some salad. The taste was bad. We also ordered assorted fries which were just so so.
First thing you notice on Lavelle Road is this club. Try out the variety of beer they offer. Beer beer and beer and then maybe brownies too. Just go for the beer with a good company of course.
One of the best beer places I have visited. Quick service. Ambience is so lovely. They have pool on the first floor. Spacious. Basically it's very classy!! Loved it

It was raining cats and dogs on a Sunday night when I walked into the biere club and surprisingly it was very crowded. The ambience is amazing. The music is great, the table arrangements and the crowd is amazing. They have a pool at the center with focus lights which makes the place look even cooler. Even though we had booked the seat we had to wait for about 25min to get the seats. The food tastes good. Tried a nacho and a pizza. It's a thin crust pizza and easily serves 2 to 3. The rates are average. The service needs some improvement. The tables weren't clean and there were miscommunication among them on who had cone first to allocate the tables. Otherwise it's a very happening club to...read more
Ambience and service are good. We had ordered nachos, which tasted great; and squid and bacon fry, which was okayish. The beer is good. The place is good for alcoholic beverages.
Beers were good and adequate variety. Starters were descent nothing much to boast about. Ambience is again descent. Overall a bit letdown not meeting the expectations.

At the very first look I liked this place. The location which is just perfect. Checked in and ordered for the beer sampler which costs 50 bucks for a 60ml sample. Belgian strong ale was the club special and was good so we ordered for the same. Tried the nachos and smoked chicken pizza and it was delicious. Also the lychee lemonade is worth a try. Overall satisfied and would definitely visit again.

Very good place to hangout beer iz awesome chilly cron was really amazing N malai mushroom ws mouth melting staff are also very attentive to the table. We really injoyed our good time. Cheers guys 🍻🍻🍻.

Biere Club is a suave, sophisticated urabne place for which we all felt completely under-dressed. Of course you'd expect the place to be expensive and it was. But absolutely no complaints with respect to the service, food and the beer. We had some of the best pizzas, onion rings, popcorn chicken, and my favorite devilishly lip smacking sticky toffee pudding. On the whole, good time with good food. Cheers. +1 Photo(s)

Well, what can be said about this place!! It's already a people's favorite!! Absolutely loved everything here, especially the stout and wheat beer, so crisp and fresh!! Loved the food too, good portions and palatable! Nachos and Calamari were yummy. Would love to visit again! +2 Photo(s)

Biere club is a good place to catch up with friends who appreciate a good brewed beer. I am a big fan of the dark beer. Other brews are fairly ok. The non veg platter is my go to order as it has a lot of variety and is also sumptuous.

We had season beer name as it was so awesome tht I forgot it's name... We drunk too much.. 😂 then we had protein hacker which was full chicken marinated in different flavours... Nice hangout place to with friends.. U can also try 20min challenge
Freshly brewed beer at a nominal rate is the main attraction. The music and crowd is good but average food. A good place to hang on weekends.

Have tried their beers twice now. The first time we tried their seasonal spiced ale (during Christmas last year) and recently tried their pale ale, Belgium wit and stout. While the beers are pretty good, the food still fails to impress. A good place to grab a freshly brewed beer while on Lavelle Road; but you may want to fill your tummy elsewhere.

Lovely place, good food, great music and if you have few friends to hang out to drink beer then you will need nothing. Highly recommend this place for beer lovers. Just be little careful that you don’t sit close to speakers as the music is quite loud and it may just end up spoiling your outing.
The good thing about this place is only the infrastructure of this restaurant but the food is not as good as compared to other restaurants and the service is also poor.

Biere Club is amazing. All the times I had been here, I never was disappointed. The drinks are good and food is so very tasty. Finger food doesn't get much better than this. The staff is courteous and polite. The crowd is always good. The décor is cool and so are the tracks that get played. It's an awesome place to chill with your friends.

Nice place for beer lovers ..tried lager , ale, seasonal(pepper), stout, fruity samples..fish an chips were soft an succulent..moroccan spiced chicken felt like our regular kebabs nothing special..overall food was good..ambience is great and a nice place for hangouts

Ambience- it’s different and best view you can ask for to see Lavelle Road and experience the best beer in town. They have different types of beer which will take you to a different era all together. They have there own brewery which gives you a good idea about the beer being prepared.

I came here with my manager on a Thursday afternoon around 2.30ish. We had ordered the veg kebab platter and omg! It was finger licking awesome! Me being a non vegetarian actually finished eating most of it. It's perfect for two people. Loved it! It had mushrooms, paneer, potatos, brocolli and other vegetables. The dips were soooooo good. Loved this place and the staff- a fun bald guy who actually suggested we try the veg kebab platter instead of the hummus filafel platter. Thanks for the good experience, Beire Club. Finally, got a chance to visit Bangalore's oldest microbrewery. This is an elegant place at a great location in Vittal Malya Road. They have all the brewing details on the wall with the date of last brewing of all the beer. Unfortunately, stout was not available on the day we visited.  We settled for wheat beer which was pretty good. In other drinks, Margarita was also good. The starter platter made a good combination with the drinks. Nachos were delicious too. Overall good experience with prompt service.

Superbly brewed beers, lip smacking finger licking food, friendly staff, relaxed ambience and lovely company: ingredients of a quintessential good time spent. Regardless of what food you'd order at the biere club, it'll be spot on wrt the taste and presentation ... and the beers are rightly brewed, with wheat beer being my favourite and highly recommended. The ground floor is non smoking anf upper floor is smoking permitted and there's a pool table for a quick game with friends.

We decided to take a walk from office and we ended up at this place. The ambience is quite good with lot of artwork on the walls with different messages. Amazing place to hangout on a week day. Especially on Mondays and Tuesdays they've got a 1+1 offer on their brewed beer which is a great deal. The beer is just smooth and amazing. Can easily say it's among the best u get in Bangalore. Service is great as well. This is situated just beside a Lamborghini showroom on UB city road. U can hear and witness lot of sports cars and bikes zooming around on this road which makes this place even more amazing. Superb place. Pretty decent crowd. Great ambience. Best brewed beer offered in Bangalore. If you like pool or foosball, it's a good place. Too crowded over the weekends. Must reach on time. Food is pretty good too.

One of the oldest brewery in bangalore, has always been one of my favorite. They brew some really nice beers and prepare good food. The beauty about this place is that it attracts very diversified group of people, and there is no chaos.

Good place. The non smoking zone is always crowded. A table or 2 are always free in smoking zone. Smoking areas are very well ventilated and the smoke itself is not an issue at all. They do have craft beer. Surprisingly at cheap prices. Starts at 180 to 250 per pint ( inc. of tax). But what I would suggest is that you try a beer sample of all the craft beer available. Will cost you just Rs 50 per sample. 30 ml of beer served in a shot glass. Cheapest craft beer in the entire Bangalore. Mild strength and mild flavour. Would be instant hit with a girl. Pretty decent English decor. The servers are prompt. Worthwhile. Cheers.
