You can't get better Chicken nachos in town, with beer it's the best thing in the world.♥️ Tough onion rings has nothing to look for. Altogether worth the traffic😂

Had been tonthis place for a office get together. Was dissapointed with the types of brew beer they were serving that day. I tasted all of the inhouse brew beer but all of them tasted sad except the dark one. Food is okay amd the ambience is fine. Not worth visiting 2nd time. Full marks to the location only.
The food was delicious, the special beer was amazing. I had a cold and couldn’t taste anything but my eyes and stomach believe that it was appetising.

Our second time around over here and apart from all the good beer that they serve, I finally had something to eat. The Mac and cheese with sun dried tomatoes. Not to sound weird but it wasn’t too cheesy, just tasty enough to go with a lot of beers. Perfect rainy day evening snack, I must say! The ambience and the music is pretty good too. 5 stars for both food and beer. Why I'd give it a 4 star is only because of the slow service. The staff was bit too laid back and took forever to get even a bottle of water. If that is fixed, then everything is good. For more such reviews, follow @twohangrywomen on instagram and facebook.

Nothing fancy about this place..it's like an average around the corner bar. Shittiest things is that you have to pay for the beer tester, I mean who does that. Not only u have to pay for the beer tasting but I have to pay per beer type for the tasting.sad quality beer, no music (probably Monday) and sad food. Please ignore this place if you can
One of the best craft beer I've ever had. Couple your favourite with nachos of your choice and you are good to go. Ambience :- 4/5 Food:- 4/5 Service:- 4/5 BEER:- 4.5/5

Home-brewed beer to fulfill your thrust. Great balcony style of seats with and street view. Food quality and quantity is also balanced with the menu price, service was ok. Good to go during happy hours to enjoy craft beer and nibbles.

Very nice place it's near by UB city. So you can easily find out Biere club. good food and good crowd. Friendly staff........we had hot chicken soup with feta cheese was awesome. Nachos test is excellent. Beer was obsesly super. The biere club is super place in Bangalore . We all friends are very happy and enjoy. Recommended to you. Food - 4/5 Beer - 4/5 Ambiance - 4/5

We started going to this place several times only because of One Special Veg Pizza called "Grilled Mediterranean Vegetable Basil Pesto Pizza". They had the same consistency in taste for that Pizza over 1.5 Years. Unfortunately now from past few months the same Pizza is Not at all that great. Pizzas aside, we like their Potato Wedges & Freshly Brewed Beer.

The biere club, Levelli Road... Me and my friends went on Tuesday early evening... Place is silent little crowd service staffs were friendly but inactive... We ordered Belgian biere isn't that great we try lager which is better food is good... They don't bother to check the comfortability of the customers and feedback of f&b... Ambiance is good nice place to chill out with friends but service needs more improvements.. Had bad experienced this place i won't recommend my friends......

Great location, superb ambiance. Can have a helluva time with friends. Corporate parties are also taken care off. The food is really good, especially the pizza and the nachos. Do give this place a try if you want to have a good time (especially on a Friday/Saturday night)

The food was extremely good but the craft beers could have been better as well as the non alcoholic drinks. The ambience was amazing and the service was also good. You can definitely plan for this place.

It was a rainy Friday evening when I headed to this lovely bar to grab a cold one with a few friends. Having tried all their craft beers, I found their wheat beer absolutely delicious and to be honest, had one too many. Loved the ambience and the staff are very helpful, specially Anush who was very attentive and jovial. Their falafel is a must try and their seasonal mango beer was pretty good. All in all, it's a great place to unwind and kick start your weekend.

Just 2 mins walk from my house, the best beer in the town! I go when I want good food, when I am happy, when I am sad, when I had a rough day at work, basically for any reason I need a beer! And yes not to be forgotten my first date with my husband was with their best beer. Before hitting a party, beer Long Island from Bierce Club is a ritual for us. Keep brewing the good beer! Cheers!! 🍻

I think this brewery sure deserve a place in list of one of the best pub In the city.  Beautiful ambience, vibrant, colourful and lively but not overtly loud. Food is quite good and don't burn a huge hole in the pocket.

Pathetic place...they can't handle crowd if overcrowded....staff becomes very rude...and show attitude as if they are the Bollywood stars...personally I recommend people not to visit this place,if you are looking for good ambiance....

I occasionally visit biere club and tbh its one of the best places in Bangalore to chill . Great beer and food also great service. MR.Praveen was a great host, very friendly and i really appreciate him. Thank you

One of the first breweries in the city , I think it was the first before the other’s reared their head . Have been a fan since it’s launch , be it their nachos , or just some plain old beer for the liking . Especially recommend during the weekends , some real classy crowd , we remember we were stopped from dancing once by the guys there “no dancing allowed ..” (then, not sure how it takes up these days ) , an over sight of the glitzy Lavelle Road , some good friends , hop along ! You won’t be disappointed. Don’t forget their pizza too 🙂

This is where I'd go if I was craving for a good home brewed beer. I need not say anything about this really well know place. They have good music cool beer and best food. I was here with my friend just catching up on old days and Biere Club made my evening that day. We ordered an avacado bread started I'd only order it if like me you are super crazy about avacados other wise it might be too overwhelming. The veg starter was simply superb and filling. And what can I say about the beer I ordered the Stout and it just hit the right spot. Lovely place to catch up with friends and chill with good beer.

We visited this place on a weekday afternoon. Were seated in the partially open terrace area when Bangalore weather was the best! Let down was that we were seated on to our table and the table was extremely dirty. We asked the wait staff to clean it but it took 3-4 reminders for them to actually do it and the place was not crowded. Beer here were good but not the best. Could have been more chilled. Food was good. Naice place to chill. +2 Photo(s)

I think this is the one of the best pub in Bangalore for beer. The ambience is good, cheerful and lively. Staff is extremely polite, with a best service provider. If you are a beer lover then you can't miss this place and must try the wheat beer. If I talk about food then its ok. According to the quantity the food is little expensive. Alcohol is not a problem, it's priced well. And this pub is situated near UB City. So, you get many options to have dinner or dessert. We had cheese nachos, Wheat beer, Stout beer. Service: 5/5 Food and drinks: 4.5/5 +4 Photo(s)
It's located at the most luxurious street in Bangalore 😋😋 it's not at all a pocket friendly but the food is amazing 😎 and the quantity is pretty much okay, could improve on the service 🌿

D 1st brwery in bangalore ......d food r amazing lik moraccan chkn ,chkn wings ,fries.....beers r gr8 lik hefe ,ale beers but service as to improve .....server was little rude ....apart dat evethng vs gr8 ...vll vist agan

The place is famous for it's vast variety of beer with different flavours. Full tray of fries and beer is a perfect combination for this place . They do have multiple floors and live match screening as well. Whenever visit this area I would recommend this place.
Great hangout joint with good food and courteous staff. Good options for vegetarians. The beer collection is excellent. The food choices for a vegetarian are also great.

One of my favourite place to vist for good brewed beer and starters. The ambience of this place and the beer smell drives crazy. Loacated in the middle of lavelle road. A perfect place to sit and relax with fresh brewed beer. Do try Wheat beer and Nachos here. A must try place in bangalore.

Been there on a Friday night with my office colleagues...we ordered mushroom for starter...n I wud really love to say that tandoor mushroom here was so fresh, evenly cooked, smoked flavour with spices blended properly was a treat after a long tiring day. Other dishes were average...if I wud ever go again..it wud b fr the mushrooms.. I had an amazing cheese cake on my second visit to this place...

One of the old brewery in the town. They got good beer. Food is delicious. I liked their nonveg platter. Place is always crowed and requires booking on weekends. Overall Food 4 Ambience 4 Value for money 4 Parking not a big challenge.

Been here twice. This place has good ambience, though we've only got places in the ground floor. Recommended to book a table. Loved the food and drinks. Didn't like the onion rings though. We tried all the beer they had and all of them were great. Probably the only place where I liked the Witbier. Though I generally prefer a stout or a lager. They have some seasonal beer as well.

This was one of the first places where I got introduced to craft beers and still frequent this place in spite of multiple options coming up. My favourite is the fries with the harissa mayo, can just keep eating those :)
Came here last night while our beer hopping evening. I had the dark beer and chicken nachos. Love the vibe of the place, beer quality is good, service is excellent.

I have been to biere club in Whitefield plenty of times and never been disappointed. Yesterday decided to go to their VM road outlet, it's a nice cozy place offering great beers - their food menu is not very extensive . We ordered corn curds salt and pepper , fish tikka and mediterranean pizza in pesto sauce - loved the fish so soft that it melted in your mouth. Salt and pepper dish was different and definitely worth ordering. The portions are good and value for money. The only thing which lacked was music - I don't know why there was no music which was a big downer for us specially on Saturday night.

Biere club is always been my favorite place to have a pleasant afternoon with a good beer and light snack may be. I'm always fond of the environment here and that keeps me getting back to the place again and again. Over the years, I've tried almost all the beer here. The thoroughly enjoy the brewery and its definitely my person favourite place. Not much of the food I've tried here compared to beer but whatever I've tried is always top notch. Cheers to the brewing team who manages to keep me happy with the taste. Should not forget to mention Mr.Raju sir, my usual waiter who's the most friendliest person. Thank you for the service everytime sir. Cheers team biere club (:
Love their mango beer. Beer lovers reall should make their way to this place, so worth it. The ambience is great and the look of the place is great too, especially at nigbt with all the lighting.

In both my visits to Biere Club I have found their beers really good. Especially their seasonal beers are quite unique, like now they are serving a lager flavored with basil and pepper which we all liked. They are the first functional microbrewery in Bangalore (2011). Ambiance and service is good. Food is good but a I find the price a little high.

Been here first time recently. This is a much happening place in the heart of city. Good part, to start with is, they have valet parking in this busy area. Brewerie with a lot of beer varieties with menu items changed seasonally. I being vegetarian, We ordered mixed platter of starters and had good selection served in small portions each. The onion rings are awesome. The staff is very friendly and helpful. Ambience is very energetic with lots of games spread across hall. Great place to hang out with friends.... in Bangalore, a must visit place, especially if you love your beer.
One of the best craft beer in Bangalore. Great food and cocktails. Decent ambiance. Decent music. Non smoking and smoking zone. Can Little expensive Valet parking. Friendly servers. Must try - stout.

Visited this place few month's back. A good place with good ambiance ... Service was OK.Jagat served us well.. But the bear was not so good. And chicken starter was uncooked. ..so not recommended.. Overall OK.

Present on one of the beautiful roads in Bengaluru, Lavelle road,this place gives completely a different vibe. Famous for its brewed beer, it was a must try for us. Tried their wheat flavoured beer. Definitely was a good one. Coming to the food, as we weren't that hungry we just got one pizza and nachos. Had ordered both in veg but later regretted on doing so. Both the pizza and the nachos were loaded with veggies and we got literally bored to finish it. Got a good service but was a big hole for our pockets. The place a little rip off. Just two pints of beer, a pizza and a nachos cost us 1700 bugs!

I would rate this place 5/5 on service levels. Very nice staff and they are also attentive to guests that is usually rare in such places. The food menu was nice - chilly paneer, spaghetti and veg platter were all delicious. The Rose Sangria was well made. Overall a great place in the heart of town.

One of the places where one can have a quick beer and some good food when in between meetings.. or come here .. sit on the first floor ... have a beer or two or more.. watching life go by on the streets below.. 😉 lovely food.. great and courteous service..
Even when more than 50% tables are free, they are not willing to give a proper table for 5 guys. Making us sit on a table of 4. Be sure of table you get before you sit.

Cool place with amazing brewed beers. Spread out across 3 floors and can accommodate good crowd. Staff was extremely nice and interactive. Though I am not a pizza lover but loved their pizza. A must go!!!

I ordered mushroom malai tikka. I think more than 200gms of mushroom. Infact very good quantity. Ordered - chicken cheese nachos. Very good quantity. Drinks- Stout - black color strong and chilled. I wanted some total cheesy starters but no luck here. Overall good place for beer and chilling here.
It's a good place to chill on a Friday night. U can chill here and enjoy the good ambience. Beautiful people and 5 star service. Visit this place if u want to a good vibe.

The Biere Club the first craft brewery in Bangalore city, the best location and the ambience can’t get better. Perfect for a chill brew alone or celebrate with your crew. The grilled salmon is cooked to perfection. Got to try the club and seasonal beers which keep changing every season. And the new menu has all my favourites. Must visit place. Keep it up guys. 👍
The ambience is good Service is good Beer taste amazing Service staff are very friendly I loved the place Food-4/5 Ambience-4/5 Service-4/5 And the view from the pub is good
The biere Club is first brewing in Bangalore Now they're open so many places best thing about biere Club is brewing n their pizza is amazing
Ragi beer available only occasionally is must try. Nachos are awesome. Mutton seekh kabab is good. Don't miss open seating in 1st/2nd floor.
Used to be one of my favourite places to come chill have a beer and unwind after a long day of work but unfortunately the quality of food and beer has come down.

Pathetic service. I think this one at levelle road is understaffed. Visited this place for two times in last week and found it difficult to place the order. They are less of cutlery as well looks like, as there was no serving spoon in any of food we ordered. You will find other beautiful and better places, visit them. Ignore this place.
Amazing place to chill out Grab beer and enjoy a good time. First brewery in bangalore. Great service Great food People should visit this place.

This place serves the best mac and cheese ever! Trust me m a big mac and cheese fan,who has been disappointed with various places on various occasions. But the mac and cheese here is heavenly! The garlic bread along with it could have been better but that's just me nitpicking. The freshly brewed beer is decent enough! The only problem with this place is that the service is a bit slow! I would come back here for the mac and cheese for sure.

A wonderful place to spend quality time with friends. No music so more conversations and a lovely pool table to make you play rather than just sit and drink. Good consistency in the wheat beer and some delicious nachos.

Awesome party place with good food, awesome mocktails and good beer ( was told so). Loved the Tandoori platter and the baked cheese cake. The downside was they missed one of our order and brought something different from what we ordered for another dish.

Raju & shettre at the bar - amazing service as usual - by far the best brewed beer in Bangalore- biere club are the pioneers of brewed beer in Blore and one of the first to open a microbrewery See y’all soon

The beer here is amazinggg! We go here quite often. But last month we went there and tasted the mango beer and it was so good! The stout beer was just mind blowing!The mango beer is one of the most finely brewed beers I’ve ever had! The ambiance is really good with many variations in seating and the first floor is just the best! With the view of lavelle road and there’s a sense of comfort in the ground floor overlooking the brewing machines. The vibe of the place is amazing! Crowd is mixed. The service was fast and prompt! They give you many suggestions which you may need if you’re new to the place. Priced on the steep end but totally worth it! Also, for more updates follow us on...read more

The exterior is the highlight of this place with an attractive bright red set up. The brewery was pretty amazing and they served good craft beer. The interiors were classy with a beautiful bar. The food could be better otherwise it's decent place.

J'adore le *The Biere club*! This place is Always so crowded and thé énergy is super nice I like their craft beers and food, mâkes a perfect place to catch up for friends. Thé staff can bé more friendly and coopérative, doesn't really help if you have staff who are cocky. Hence 3. I Hope thé next time my expérience is better.
The food was not so tasty except the veg platters, moreover it is overpriced. The staff rarely appeared or come to us to ask for the order. Not satisfied with the service. Waste of money.
I love the Biere club for their new and innovative seasonal beer. The food is also delicious.Ordered fries and veg Platter both were good in quantity and taste.

Had high expectations of the finger food but somehow the boxes weren't ticked this time. The chicken wings were not fresh. The fish amd chip cones sounded interesting but the batter was too thick on the fish and parts of it were undercooked. Being hungry, we said we will give it one more go and asked the beef satay. Wasn't great either with the beef being overdone and tough and slathered in sauce. I remember the superlative experience i had at the biere club last time around and was disappointed this turn. Please go back to how you were in the old days.

Located at a beautiful road cruising infront of bootlegger. Place is always crowded but you'll get table in half an hour. Service is nice and I guess the best veg menu option located at any bar in Bangalore.
Great place to hangout with , lager and ale is preferred drinks for me. Playing pool in here adds a note to the place . Staff are well trained and serve you quick .

Nothing can beat the feeling of sipping freshly brewed, cold Beer on a hard and long day. Especially if it's from this aesthetically appealing place. It's guaranteed that one's likeness towards all the commercial brands of beer doing the rounds in the market slowly, steadily fades away after if he/she just drops by this place. Teaming it up with the cheesy nachos topped with refried beans it's the crunchy alternative to the generic peanuts served in all the local bars  across India. A bit on the expensive side this beautiful restaurant/pub is situated on one of the quietest places in Bangalore and is suitable to people of all age groups. It's pretty cool to step into such an ambient...read more
Good ambience and food was assume. It's a very nice place for hangout. Good crowd and specially I thanks to bartender danmendar who help me to choice the nice beer... Definitely come back again😀

A really good place....got a good crowd to play pool with ....very well organised and maintained....the pool table is my favourite here Rajneesh was one of the friendly staff And really love the wide range of beer choices available

We went here for our management outing.. the place is just awesome, the beers and all their drinks were good. It’s on an expensive side, but if you stick to beer you will not feel the pinch. Coming to the food, everything we ordered was just awesome, great taste. The fish and chips, jumbo platters , pizza all were liked by all the team members. The service is good and they were accommodative in arranging our seats to our liking..

One of my favourite microbreweries in Bangalore. In all these years they haven't compromised on quality. Excellent beer. I highly recommend your trying their sampler before prior to deciding your pint. Particularly try their seasonals and their Christmas beer (if you're in town that time of year). What I avoid: their stout High quality food. My favourite place for falafels and hummus (close second is Fava in UB City). Their sharing platters are good too. Ambiance & vibe: very good. Always attracts a good quality crowd.

Great place to visit on a Saturday night. Very good decor and a pool table also on first floor. It is a massive place having ground and two floors. The ale beer we had was not as good as we expected but everything else was awesome.
Nice place good ambience but taste of food is superb, We ordered veg only —Nachos with bens and malai mushrooms tikka and really both were meeting with expectations

Great place to hang out with friends. Ambience is good, good food, good music, great beer, u can also play pool upstairs. I went on a Friday evening and the crowd was pretty good. If u are a beer lover then a must visit place in banglore.
Good vibe! It’s everything it is and it isn’t trying to be anything else. Perfect for a casual beer with friends nothing too extra. Simple menu you get what you come for

I went here after seeing good ratings,,, thought that I will get a better service.... But as soon as went there I ordered mug of beer and Mocktails for my friend... along with drinks ordered Pizza...but it was very disappointing ..the pizza was not on the table after finishing my first drink....I asked to waiter after almost half an hour...he told me it's coming sir....just give me a minute....but it didn't come after 40 minutes also... finally after finishing half of my second drink pizza came on my table.... It was very disappointing.... please improve your service.... Won't visit it again....😗😗😗

This was my first visit to The Biere Club after around 3 years of hearing good things about it! I must say, I was quite impressed. I'm not a beer person..so I tried the Rose Sangria and it was very nice. The starters like Biere Club popcorn chicken, Chettinad prawn & Nachos were yum. For mains, I ordered a Thai chicken green curry and I must say, it was not delish...including the raw papaya salad, which I'm otherwise not too fond of! So, it was a great first experience..and I can't wait to go back again!

Ordered chilli paneer but got some chicken item. Ordered mac & cheese veg pasta got some egg noodles. Confirmed multiple times from the waiter before eating and this *** without even checking confirmed it's paneer. After trying we were sure it's not paneer. Then called another waiter who finally confirmed it's chicken and not paneer. Mistakes happens but 2 times back to back is not acceptable. The first waiter could have spent a moment to confirm before assuring us what the item is. I guess not a good place for vegetarian.

Food - 3.5/5 Service - 4.5/5 Ambiance - 4.5/5 Infrastructure - 4.5/5 Value for Money - 4/5 Nice place. Went there to celebrate my friends birthday. got around 7 people in a massive section of the place. The DJ was keeping the place lit and the people happy, the ambiance was amazing, we also had fun playing pool. Ordered tons of beer and drinks.Some pepper chicken, beef nachos, chicken popcorn and a pork chop. the chicken pepper fry was very delicious but tasted like chicken ghee roast. The heat from the pepper was missing. the beef nachos were delicious with a nice nachos to meat to sauce ratio. The popcorn was mediocre, nothing great. the pork chop should have been the star of the dish...read more

Neat place with good, courteous staff. Food is good with decent quantities - some of them can even serve 2. Beer is refreshing - do ask for the samples (even though paid) before deciding which one to drink.

This place has always been one of my favorites. Beers are made with such perfection, can't seem to find any flaw in them. So is the food. Love the varieties available here. Great ambience, good music & a pool table in the middle. Saturday nights are set here. Finally about our waiter for the nyt, Mr. Raju took care of us pretty well. Cheers to him.

A place that has continental, BBQ and finger food? One exists! It's called biere club at vittal malya, lavelle road, Bangalore. With their amazing variety of foods you should also try their in house brews. Biere club being a pub and microbrewery, make their own beer. Their specialty and most ordered is its wheat beer. Wanna have some pizza, pork chops, meatballs and really good cocktails?? Head over to biere club!

We went here for team party from our office , we ordered lot of platters and food.i loved the chilly panner starter , it was absolutely delicious and so was the pizza.we had lot of alcohol. The place has a pool table , so it makes it more fun to play while drunk , they gave us complimentary shots as we made a huge bill for 6 people

The place was pretty empty on a Saturday night, which made us think whether we made a wrong choice or not. But thankfully the experience proved otherwise. I would specially recommend the Chettinad style prawns, which were suggested by the waiter.
One of the best places I have visited for beer. A very courteous staff. Good food good beer thumbs up to the place. Must visit for all brewed beer lovers.
Best beer in Bangalore. This is a great place to chill with your bros. Superb non veg platter, nachos and pizza. Wheat beer is the best. The also have a pool table on the second floor.
This definitely isn't a place for a college going student, considering the price is a bit expensive. But oh my god, the food, the ambience, the staff, truly amazing. Can't wait to visit again.

The ambience was good. The food and beverage were tasty, especially the chicken ceaser salad. It might be the best salad I ever tasted. Overall, an excellent place to hangout. The only downside is that it's a lil expensive and too many taxes.
There you go with seasons craft beer 🍺 ... Rum and plum in the brewed beer is a must try ..rich aroma and fine thick malt , especially the after taste will make you try one more !!

It was nice and cozy place , staff is very friendly, they are super quick with orders , must try coconut beer & nachos. I strongly suggest that the place can be expanded a little coz every set of tables were quite close... You should pre-book the tables before coming to the club to avoid waiting.

We went here on weekend ,it was a good crowd. the ambience is great,staff are very helpful, specially thanks to Mr. Prabitra and mr. Uttam,who was best service provider and friendly. They suggested us some good food , cocktails and beers. The food is really good specially the pizza ,morraccan chicken and chili chicken . Beer is really good... Food...5/5 Service..5/5 Ambience..4.5/5 ...... definitely visit again..

The thing I enjoyed most about this place was its laid-back, chilled-out ambiance. The place is very beautiful, the interiors are designed so well and it just fits in that corner that it's situated- the red building at the turn! The food is great, drinks are good too. And you can just hang out and play snooker and have an amazing time there.
Food and beer were pretty good. The ambience was amazing. The only thing which irritated me was service, it was really slow. Management is pathetic.

The waiter who served us was quite rude. He misunderstood our order and when we pointed it out to him he acted like it was our fault. Reputed places like this should really train their staff better. A disappointing visit.
Nice place to hangout with friends.. they have their own bruary and quite a variety of beers. Loved their hand toasted pizzas and fussball..

Simply amazing..their beers are just too good.. Also Rajat who always assists us with the best of beer served as per the season and the knowledge he has about beer..really appreciate the warmness we get when ever we go there it's just because of the service given by Rajat.. Do ask for him the next time and you will surely prove me right..

Very nice sort of this old rustic ambience combined with great food. Place is a bit expensive. For starters,we had popcorn chicken and prawn. Had a pizza as well. Very nicely done. Stout was a bit underwhelming. Good experience overall.

Loved the Ragi beer (Seasonal). The brewed beer is of extremely good quality . Me and by boyfriend were looking for something spicy in food, but couldn't find anything. The food wasn't that great, else would have given 5 stars.
Ordered Christmas special beer, the beer was fresh and very crisp. A good place for freshly brewed beer lovers. A definitely must try place..
I loved this place. The food was good, and the staffs here are very friendly and approachable, specially Krishna. Definitely try it out, be it with friends or with your special one. Cheers!

I have visited this place called Bier Club with my friends on weekday . The Ambience is so welcoming and good place to chillout..... it has two floors , ground and first floor.Beers here are good and the food we tried -N-veg Combo Platter , Nachos ,salad and mezze platter. Hummmus dip was sooo good.Nachos can be little better as it was nt so fresh.overall  the food were great. The prices are on little heavy side but worth the experiences. keep it up. we'll soon visit again.
Been to Biere Club many times, always found the ambience great. Pizza is just delicious. Please don't try beer here, you will get addicted to it's taste, it's so nice.

Been here twice and love the vibe and offerings of fresh beers Lager being my favourite all time,great 🎱 pool tournament on Thursdays which is fun and well organised to meet up with a bunch of great friends food wise loved the morrocan chicken starter great preparation to my liking assorted fries etc give a shoutout to Mr Jagat and Mr Praveen at the pool area for an excellent and funfilled evening

So this was the first place I landed on this brewery hopping trip to Blore. Amazing laid back place with some good brews and food .. it's places like these is why I loom forward to my trips to Blore. Pretty laid back amazing ambience. Good food and people
Loved the ambience there. Location is prime in the city and it was crowded when I visited the place. Chill place to hangout with friends. Enjoyed the time there.

The have some of the best crafted flavours in beer and the place is jst placed perfectly at corner can have best view of the surrounding and abt food u can give a try as didn’t ate much had the barbeque chicken which was good ..
The ambience is good and so is the diversity in the menu for drinks and food. The nachos could have less sauce and more beans and tortilla............
Nachos are highly palatable .. View from II floor is fantastic (smoke friendly)!! Wheat & Stout are the must haves..Ambience,Food,Service,Staff——10/10
Went this afternoon amazing food and Had tried the strawberry brewed beer which was outstanding.we had ordered lamb sheekh and spicy chicken pizza was pretty awesome.

Amazing place to hangout with friends or family. I visited with my family. The ambience is perfect, not so loud not so chill. We tried Re-fried beans melted cheese Nachos, Cold coffee(amazing), Truffled mac N cheese and Potatoes roasted with Kefta spice,chilli and mint. Everything was #amazing.
Very nice place to visit in the weekend. Go with friends and enjoy the food and drinks. The place is pretty crowded and there may be a waiting time before you get a seat.

Finally visited one of the much talked about places. Visited with my best fren after an event on a weekday. Was peaceful. Ambience : Very nice. Loved the lights and the painting on the walls Food: Veg Lasagne was very tasty. Aglio Olio was tasty as well but a bit too much oil. Service: We were asking for suggestions with one of the staff member and all we got is wrong information. He did not know what is veg Florentine. Also, when I was ordering Spaghetti, the description mentioned AOP and I asked what exactly is that (since I am a vegetarian) and he was unsure but said it’s there different kind of oils. The food is good with lot of verity. Take some time to get served. the staff is very friendly. The restaurant is in prime location. Not much spacious but manageable.

The grub is great across both vegetarian and non-vegetarian, plenty options with some standouts like the sausages, mushroom cheese poppers and the Moroccan chicken. If you're a beer enthusiast or simply looking for a cozy spot to unwind in Bangalore, The Biere Club on Lavelle Road is a must-visit. Known for its freshly brewed beer, this place offers a variety of beer styles to suit different tastes. But it doesn't stop there – their creative beer cocktails are a highlight, blending flavors you wouldn't expect with a base of fresh craft beer. Food-wise, The Biere Club doesn't disappoint. Their fish and chips are crispy, light, and perfectly cooked, while their burgers are hearty, juicy, and come with a unique local twist, setting them apart from the standard pub fare.
